author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: INYUNYANA yothisha iSadtu isiphakamise ukuthi ifuna ukuthi kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando wase-Afrika esifundweni i-History ezikoleni zakuleli. Le nyunyana isamile ekutheni ifuna lesi sifundo sibe yimpoqo kubona bonke abafundi. ISadtu isho lokhu nje, uMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, ukhiphele umphakathi ukuthi uphawule ngemigomo ethinta lesi sifundo somlando ezikoleni. UMnyango ukwenze lokhu ukuze uqinise ukufundiswa kwalesi sifundo, kusuka kaGrade 4 kuya kaGrade 12. UNobhala Jikelele weSadtu, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, uthe bebelokhu besho ukuthi bafuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando othinta izwekazi i-Afrika, hhayi amazwe aphesheya. "Sifuna kugxilwe ekufundisweni ngezinto ezithinta i-Afrika, kungagxilwa kakhulu ezintweni ezithinta amazwe ase-Europe. Sethemba ukuthi le migomo ekhishelwe umphakathi, nathi esizophawula ngayo nge-History, izobalula eyokuthi sibe yimpoqo lesi sifundo." Uthe uma isifundo siyimpoqo, sizokwenza ukuthi abafundi bazi la besuka khona nokuthi kwenzakalani ezweni labo. UMnuz Terence Khala oyibamba lomkhulumeli woMnyango, uthe bese kunesikhathi bebheka izindlela zokubuyekeza ukufundiswa kwalesi sifundo ezikoleni. Uthe kwaqokwa nethimba elalibheka ukubuyekezwa kwalesi sifundo eMnyangweni. "Leli thimba lalibheka indaba yokuthi kubuyekezwe uhlelo lokufundisa lesi sifundo, ukubheka ukuthi izincwadi zalesi sifundo zihambisana nokuphakanyisiwe ngokufundiswa kwalesi sifundo kanjalo nezinhlelo zokucija othisha abafundisa lesi sifundo. Umbiko wethimba wathulwa ePhalamende, esigungwini soNgqongqoshe bezemfundo, kanjalo naku-Umalusi." Uthe bazwile ngokuphawula okukhona okuthinta ukufundiswa komlando ngelakuleli, njengoba kunabakhathazekile ngokuthi kungenzeka kushiywe ngaphandle ezinye zezinto. Uveze ukuthi kuvalwa ngeSonto, ngo-Ephreli 19, 2026, ukuphawula komphakathi ngemigomo. Abafuna ukuphawula bangabhalela ku: Director-General, baqondise ku: Florence Modipa, oyiChief Education Specialist: Curriculum Policy, Department of Basic Education, 222 Struben Street, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele ku:Department of Basic Education, Private Bag X895, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele nge-email ku:[email protected].

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Ungqongqoshe wezokuThuthukiwa koMphakathi uSisisi Tolashe uthembise ukuthuthukisa izinsiza kusebenza ukwehlisa imigqa emide kwabathola izibonelelo zikaihulumeni. INHLANGANO ekhokha izibonelelo i-South African Social Security Agency (Sassa), iveze ukuthi ayizikhokhi izibonelelo ngezimpelasonto, imiSombuluko noma ngamaholidi. Le nhlangano ithe ayizikhokhi futhi izibonelelo nangosuku lokuqala enyangeni. Ikusho lokhu ngemuva kokudedela uhlu lwezinsuku zokukhokhwa kwezibonelelo kuze kuphele lo nyaka, kulandela ukuvumelana noMnyango kaMgcinimafa. I-Sassa ithe ngaso sonke isikhathi ikhokha izibonelelo ngokwehlukana kwezinsuku. "Kuqale kukhokhwe isibonelelo sabantu abadala, kulandele esabaphila nokukhubazeka, bese kugcina esesondlo sabantwana. Uma kwenzeka usuku lokukhokhwa kwesibonelelo lungempelasonto noma ngeholidi, imali iyoze ingene ngosuku olulandelayo," kusho i-Sassa. I-Sassa iveze lokhu njengoba ngenyanga ezayo kuzoba namaholidi ePhasika kuleli. Iveze ukuthi isibonelelo sabadala sizoholwa ngoLwesine, u-Ephreli 2, 2026. Esabaphila nokukhubazeka siholwe ngemuva kwePhasika, ngo-Ephreli 7. Kuzobe sekulandela esabantwana esidume ngeqolo esizoholwa ngo-Ephreli 8. I-Sassa imemezele nezindaba ezimnandi kwabahola izibonelelo njengoba zizonyuka kusuka ngenyanga ezayo. Ukunyuswa kwezibonelelo kumenyezelww nguNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, ngesikhathi ethula isabelomali sezwe ngoFebhuwari, ePhalamende. Isibonelelo sabadala nesabaphila nokukhubazeka, sizonyuswa ngo-R80 siye ku-R2 400. Esamasosha sizonyuka siye ku-R2 420. I-Foster Care izonyuka ngo-R40, ibe ngu-R1 290, kanti imali yeqolo izonyuka ngo-R20, ibe ngu-R580. I-Sassa inxuse ukuthi abantu bangajahi ukuyokhipha imali ngoba uma isikhona ngeke isaya ndawo. Iyalele nalabo abazoba nenkinga yokungayitholi imali ukuthi bangalindi kodwa banikele emahhovisi alolu phiko ukuze bathole izizathu zokungaholi. Okunye okugcizelelwe ukuthi kumele baqikelele ukuthi imininingwane yabo iyiyona kanti bangashayela enombolweni ethi: 0800 60 10 11 ukuze basizakale. ISassa iqinisekise izinsuku zokuthola izibonelelo ngenyanga ka-Ephreli 2026

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo oshisa izikhotha, uNothando Hlophe, obeyingxenye yomcimbi obekuboshelwe kuwo uBenjamin Dube WENZE ezibukwayo umculi ocula owokholo oyinkakha kule ndima uBishop Benjamin Dube, ngesikhathi ecula ngokuhlanganyela neThe Zulu Kingdom Choir ePlayhouse, eThekwini. Le nkakha ebibabaza ikhono eliyisimanga leThe Zulu Kingdom Choir, bekungokokuqala inandisa ngokuhlanganyela naleli qembu elisungulwe ngo-2020, uSiphiwe Bulose wakwaNyuswa, eThekwini. Le khonsathi ebizwa ngeSongs and Hymns, ibibophele abaculi abanohlonze okubalwa kubo u-Ayanda Ntanzi, Nothando Hlophe, Sindi Ntombela nabanye. UMphathiswa eMnyangweni wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga noMnuz Siphiwe Bulose ongumhleli womcimbi iSongs and Hymns ebinedili lomcimbi ngempelasonto UDube ushaye amanoni akhe amadala, kwahlanya abantu ebambisene neThe Zulu Kingdom Choir, baze abantu bacela impinda. UDube ubenesikhathi sonke sokuzilolonga nale khwaya kwaNyuswa ngoLwesihlanu, okuyilapho etshele khona amalungu alo ukuthi ngendlela abenza ngayo baya kude emculweni. "Kuyangijabulisa ukuthi leli khwaya linekhono eliyisimanga kangaka. Empeleni singabaseGoli, siyaziqhenya ngekhono eliseKZN kwezomculo, lesi sifundazwe sibusisekile ngokuba nekhono kule ndima yomculo," kusho uDube. Kuhlanye izihlwele esenandisa nekhwaya ecula izingoma zakhe okubalwa ethi, Ngiyakuthanda, ayishaye abantu bavukwa wumoya. Kube sekungena u-Ayanda Ntanzi, abantu bavukwa yisithunywa ngamanoni akhe ahlukene asezakhele igama ngawo. Inkundla ivalwe yintandokazi emculweni wokholo uNothando Hlophe, ohlanyise izihlwele ngezingoma zakhe ezishisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku okukhona kuzo ethi, Empini Sothini, Sithumele Wena nezinye. Eyokuphuza ukuqala komcimbi igcine igqibeka njengoba abaculi begile izimanga esteji. Kucacile ukuthi isasasa lawo lizokhula njengoba ubuhanjelwe abantu abahlukahlukene kukhona nezikhulu zikahulumeni okubalwa kuzo abaPhathiswa beminyango ehlukene njengoba bewuhanjelwe owezeMpilo uNkk Nomagugu Simelane-Mngadi noNksz Mbali Shinga ohola uMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: SEBENGABASHADENE osaziwayo bakuleli uKhuli Chana noLamiez Holworthy, kule mpelsonto ababophe elikasofasilahlane BAVEZE ukuthi isiqalo sabo esisha sothando ukuzibophezela emshadweni, osaziwayo bakuleli uKhuli Chana noLamiez Holworthy, okusabalale izithombe zabo njengoba beziwushaya. Laba abaneminyaka bethandana, umshado wabo udonse izinsuku ezintathu njengoba kuvele ukuthi uqale ngoLwesihlanu, eNorth West. ULamiez uveze ukuthi akuthanda kakhulu ngomyeni wakhe ukuthi uthanda izingane zakhe. Uthe ehlangana naye, wayenendodakazi eneminyaka emihlanu, afike wayithanda njengeyakhe. "Bengihlala ngiyintombazane egxile emthandazweni kakhulu, kuningi ebengikuthandazela ngibeke isikhathi sokuthi kwenzeke, ngempela kwenzeke ngendlela ebengifisa ngayo. Umyeni wami ungikhombise uthando ngendlela ebengingayilindele. Ngangithi ungumuntu nje wesilisa ozodlala ngami kodwa izinto azenzile siqala ukuthandana, zibe zinkulu kakhulu. Ungikhombisile uthando," kusho uLamiez. Uveze ukuthi kuningi angabe uyakusho ngomyeni wakhe okuhle amenzele khona kodwa ngokugcina enze isethembiso somshado ayemthembise, sona uyohlala emthanda, emhlonipha. UKhuli Chana, ogama lakhe langempela uKhulane Morule, uthe yisiqalo sempilo yabo lesi kwezothando. Uthe uyamhlonipha kakhulu umkakhe ngendlela ayiyona njengoba ebemeseka kukuhle kukubi. Laba umshado wabo omhlophe ube yimfihlo ngoLwesihlanu, kanti ubuhanjelwe osaziwayo, abangani nezihlobo. Usongwe izolo. UKhuli noLamiez baqala ukuthandana ngo-2018, futhi bahlala kafushane ngaphambi kokuba uKhuli akhokhe ilobolo ngoNovemba 2, 2019. Kuthiwa izinhlelo zomshado zenziwe esithe ukuze uzoba sezingeni eliphezulu. Kumenywe kuphela nabangani abasondelene nabo, umndeni nedlanzana lo saziwayo. Le mikhosi kuthiwa ayilona neze ihaba kodwa kuhlelwe umshado wesintu owenziwe ngesimanje obuwubukhazikhazi. ULamiez noKhuli sekunesikhathi eside beyizithandani ezithandwa kakhulu eMzansi, ezaziwa ngokusebenza kwazo ngokuzinikela nokubonisa uthando emphakathini.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UMuzi okushaywe kuwo umsolwa eMzomusha Kubulawe osolwa ngokuba yilungu le-West Gang ngesikhathi kudutshulwana namaphoyisa eNanda. Umsolwa, olinganiselwa eminyakeni engamashumi amabili ubudala, ubethungathwa ngamacala amaningi okugebenga kuhlonyiwe namanye amacala anodlame. Utholwe namhlanje ekuseni yithimba leSAPS Task Team yaseNanda kanye neSAT Enforcement,  esusela emininingwaneni yophiko lwezobunhloli - ecashe endlini eyikamelo elilodwa eMzomusha. Umsolwa kuthiwa uzame ukudubula amaphoyisa kodwa kwashayeka yena kuqala washona ngemuva kwalokho. Kutholwe isibhamu sohlobo lwe-9mm.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IZIDAKAMIZWA ezitholwe ngamaphoyisa kwabesifazane esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo eGoli KULINDEKELE ukuthi bavele namuhla eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park, abesifazane abahlanu, okuthiwa babanjwe nezidakamizwa bezishutheke ezithweni zangasese esikhumulweni sezindiza, i-OR Tambo, eGauteng, izolo. Lokhu kudalulwe okhulumela amaphoyisa ezingeni likazwelonke, uLieutenant Colonel Amanda van Wyk. Uthe amaphoyisa eSouth African Police Service (SAPS) esebenzisana ngokubambisana nabe-Airports Company South Africa (ACSA), abophe abesifazane abahlanu ngecala lokushushumbisa izidakamizwa. “Zingabiza inani elingaphezu kuka-R5 million izidakamizwa ababanjwe nazo, ebebezithukuse emizimbeni yabo,” kusho uLt Col Van Wyk. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa olwenziwe, luveza ukuthi bebelibangise ezweni iChina, kodwa bezodlula eDubai. “Ukuseshwa kwabo okuholele ekutheni kutholwe izidakamizwa ebezithukuswe ematekini, ezikhindini zangaphansi kanjalo nasezithweni zangasese,” kusho uLt Col Van Wyk. Uqinisekise eyokuthi kulindeleke ukuthi bayobingelela imantshi namuhla ngamacala ayamaniswa nokushushumbiswa kwezidakamizwa. Wathi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IZINKOMBA ziveza ukuthi ingase iphinde yenyuke intengo kaphethroli, udizili nopharafini ngenyanga ezayo Image:  Tumi Pakkies / Independent Newspapers UMFELANDAWONYE wezinyunyana zabasebenzi, iCosatu, uhlabe ikhwelo kuhulumeni ukuthi uphinde uqhamuke nezinye izindlela zokunciphisa ukuzwela kokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli nodizili, okulindeleke ukuthi kwenzeke ekuqaleni kukaMeyi. Ekuqaleni kwenyanga intengo yelitha likaphethroli u-93 no-95 inyuke ngo-R3.06. Ekadizili u-500ppm inyuke ngo-R7.37 kwathi elika-50ppm lanyuka ngo-R7.51. Ilitha likapharafini linyuke ngo-R11.67. Lokhu kunyuka kwentengo kudalwe yimpi ephakathi kwe-Iran ne-Israel (ebambisene ne-United States of America). Iphazamise ukuthuthwa kukawoyela ongahluziwe eStrait of Hormuz. Uhulumeni wamemezela ukuthi uzokwehlisa isikhashana intela kaphethroli ngo-R3 isuka ku-R4.10 yaba ngu-R1.10 ilitha. Kudizili yehle isuka ku-R3.93 yaba ngu-R0.93 ilitha kule nyanga futhi kuzophinde kubuyekezwe ngezayo. Lokhu wathi kuzowulahlekisela ngo-R6 billion emnothweni. Uhulumeni ekhasini lawo kwi-X, uveze ukuthi ukunyuka kwentengo kawoyela nokushintshashintsha kwamandla erandi, kulindeleke ukuthi kunyuse intengo kaphethroli ezinyangeni ezizayo. ICosatu ithe imibiko yakamuva yeCentral Energy Fund, iveza ukuthi intengo yelitha likaphethroli ingase yenyuke ngo-R3, R10 elikadizili no-R7 kwelikapharafini. “Lokhu ngokunye ukushayeka emnothweni onyuka ngo-1% kule minyaka engaphezu kuka-10 nasempini yamazinga okungasebenzi aku-41.1%. I-International Monetary Fund isivele ikwehlisile ukuqagela kokunyuka komnotho ngo-2026, yakubeka ku-1% isuka ku-1.4%,” kusho iCosatu. Ithe ukwehliswa kwentela kaphethroli inyanga eyodwa yigxathu elihle kodwa kudingeka okunye ngokushesha. Ithe inovalo lokuthi abasebenzi nomnotho ngeke bakwazi ukumelana nokunye ukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, udizili nopharafini. “Udizili ubalulekile ezithuthini zomphakathi abasebenzi abathembele kuzo kanjalo nopharafini osetshenziswa yizinkulungwane zemindeni. Abasebenzi bavele bacwile ezikweletini, banakekela izihlobo eziyisikhombisa umsebenzi ngamunye, bachitha u-40% womholo wabo kwezokuthutha futhi ngeke bakwazi ukumelana nokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, kadizili nekapharafini.” ICosatu ithe kumele kuphinde kwehliswe intela kaphethroli nenye intela. Ibalule nokuthi kumele kuqhanyukwe nezindlela zokwehlisa intengo kapharafini. Okunye ithe wukuthi kwenziwe izithuthi zomphakathi zishibhe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IBHOKISI ebelithwele isidumbu sikaNksz Happy Mthethwa ngesikhathi kuqhubeka inkonzo yomngcwabo wakhe izolo UZITHAKASELE umndeni izindaba zokuboshwa kobeyisoka lowesifazane obulawe ngesihluku ngeledlule, eNkwezane, eDoringkop, KwaDukuza. Ngokusho kukadadewabo kamufi, uNksz Kholeka Mthethwa, umsolwa ubhadanywe amaphoyisa eMelmoth, lapho okuthiwa ubebhace khona. Ubebaleke kulandela isigameko sokugwaza aphinde anqume uNksz Happy Mthethwa (35), ngeSonto eledlule. UNksz Mthethwa utshele Isolezwe izolo, ukuthi kubajabulisile ukuthola lezi zindaba ngesikhathi kusaqhubeka inkonzo yomngcwabo kamufi. “Izindaba zifike ngenduna yendawo, ethe itshelwe ngamaphoyisa ukuthi ayisidlulisele lo myalezo njengoba thina besingatholakali. Sijabule ukuthi lithi liya phansi ibhokisi likadadewethu, naye zibe sezimkhalele,” kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uthe babone injabulo nasebusweni bezingane zikamufi uma kuvela eyokuthi sezimkhalele umsolwa. Uthe njengoba ezovela enkantolo, abakulindele ukuthi inkantolo imdedele ngebheyili umsolwa ngesihluku asenze kumufi. “Sizobe sigcwele khona nomphakathi siyosho ngazwi linye ukuthi akangadedelwa nhlobo ngebheyili. Sifuna abolele phakathi,” usho kanje. Umufi kuthiwa ubesanesikhashana esincane efudukele eGoli, ukuyozama amatoho. Kuthiwa ubebuyele izinkonzo zePhasika ngempelasonto edlule, njengoba kuthiwa wahamba wayokhonza impelasonto yonke nezinye izihlobo. Kuthiwa wathi uma ebuya ngeSonto ekuseni, wahlala isikhashana, wase ethi usaya emzini obekuhlala khona isoka lakhe ukuyolanda izingubo zakhe ngoba uselitshele ukuthi abahlukane. Kuthiwa akabange esakwazi nokuzithatha izingubo njengoba kwasuka ingxabano emzini owakhelene nalowo obekuhlala kuwo isoka, lamgwaza, wayowela kuveranda wakwamakhelwane, lapho okuthiwa nakhona lafike lahosha ummese, lase limnquma phambi kwabo. NgoLwesihlanu, kusabalale izinkulumo eziqoshiwe lapho belisho khona ukuthi alizisoli nhlobo ngokumbulala. Lezi zinkulumo kuthiwa belizithumela kwi-group ka-WhatsApp womphakathi, limsola ngokungaziphathi kahle, lathi lalishilo ukuthi lizovele limbulale. Liphinde lathuka namadoda endawo, lathi limbulele ngoba wonke angabafazi. Siye koshicilela amaphoyisa engakaphawuli ngokuboshwa kukamsolwa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Imboni yezimoto ingaphansi kwengcindezi njengoba ezinye izinkampani zidiliza UNOBHALA Jikelele weMotor Industry Bargaining Council (MIBCO), uPaulos Masemola, uthi uma izinkampani, izinyunyana zabasebenzi nabanye abasembonini yezezimoto bebambisana ungancipha umonakalo ozodaleka ngokudilizwa kwabasebenzi. ENingizimu Afrika isimo sishubile njengoba izinkampani zidiliza. Muva nje iFord Motor Company of Southern Africa imemezele ukuthi izodiliza abasebenzi, inkampani ekhiqiza amathayi iGoodyear ivalwe thaqa eGqeberha, iMotus isanda kudiliza abalinganiselwa ku-86 nezinye izinkampani. UMasemola uthe iqiniso wukuthi imboni ingaphansi kwenkulu ingcindezi. “Uma izinkampani ziqhubeka nokuba ngaphansi kwengcindezi yezomnotho, ukudiliza abantu kuba yiyona ndlela yokugcina eziyithathayo ukuze zizokwazi ukuqhubeka nokusebenza. Lokhu kodwa akusho ukuthi kumele zingakwenzi ngendlela enobulungiswa nevikela amalungelo abasebenzi,” kusho uMasemola. Uthe njenge-MIBCO badlala indima ebalulekile uyokuthi konke kwenzeke ngendlela. Uqhube wathi uma ukudiliza kuqhubeka, abantu abanamakhono bazoshoda ngoba abanye bazohamba bengaphinde bebuye embonini yezokuthutha. Uveze ukuthi kunezindlela zokunciphisa umonakalo abale kuzo ukunciphisa izikhathi zokusebenza, ukwehlisa isikhashana amaholo nokusiza abasebenzi abathintekayo ngemali. “Isifundo wukuthi ukuxoxa kusenesikhathi kuyasebenza. Uma abasebenzi, izinkampani nabasembonini bebambisana, kungenzeka ukuthi kunciphe umonakalo, kugcineke amakhono futhi imboni isimame.”

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuboshwe amaphoyisa amabili ngokuzama ukungena nezidakamizwa ejele Image: Itumeleng English / Independent Newspapers Amaphoyisa amabili angaphansi kweTembisa SAPS, aboshelwe ukutholakala nezidakamizwa eBoksburg Correctional Centre. Lokhu kwenzenge ngoLwesithathu cishe ngabo-09:30 ekuseni, isikhulu sezokuHlunyeleliswa kwezimilo esisejele laseBoksburg, ngesikhathi senza imisebenzi ejwayelekile yokulawula ukungena, senze uphenyo ezimotweni ezingena emagcekeni. Ngesikhathi kuseshwa, lesi sikhulu simise imoto emhlophe ye-SAPS ebinamalungu amabili e-SAPS, oyedwa egqoke umfaniswano wamaphoyisa, omunye egqoke izingubo zabantu. Ngesikhathi lisesha imoto, isikhulu sithole upulasitiki oluhlaza esinamaphilisi e-mandrax angu-82 kanye nensangu, ufihlwe ngaphansi kwesihlalo. Amaphoyisa amabili abe eseboshiwe. Laba bobabili bazovela enkantolo maduze.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ISIKHULU esiphezulu se-IEC uMnuz Sy Mamabolo Image: Jacques Naude / Independent Newspapers ISIKHULU esiphezulu seKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli, i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC), uMnuz Sy Mamabolo, siyalele amaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi asheshe alungise uhlu lwabantu azofolosa ngabo okhethweni oluzayo. UMamabolo uthe amacala amaningi ababewaxazulula okhethweni lukazwelonke nolwezifundazwe lwango-2024, ayemayelana nezikhalo ngabajutshwe amaqembu. "Amaqembu kumele kuthi kushaya uJulayi 30, abe eseyiphothulile eyohlu lwabantu abazowamela. Aba maningi amacala okwadingeka siwaxazulule ayethinta abantu abazojutshwa amaqembu okhethweni lwango-2024," kusho uMamabolo izolo ngesikhathi bekhuluma ngamalungiselelo okhetho, ekomitini loMnyango wezaseKhaya ePhalamende. UMamabolo uthe zizoba zimbili izimpelasonto zokubhalisela ukuvota ngaphambi kokhetho. "Eyokuqala kwamenyezelwa ukuthi izoba ngoJuni 20 no-21. Eyesibili izoba ngasekuqaleni kuka-Agasti." Uthe balindele ukuthi lufakwe ngokusemthethweni emqulwini kahulumeni usuku lokhetho ngo-Agasti. Lokhu kuzokwenziwa nguNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu kuleli, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. UHlabisa kulindeleke amemezele usuku lokhetho ngaphambi kokuphela kukaJuni. Ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube ngoNovemba noma uJanuwari. UNksz Dawn Mbatha, isikhulu esibhekele imali kwikhomishini, uthe banesabelomali sika-R4.75 billion kulo nyakamali. Uthe bayaxoxa noMnyango kaMgcinimafa ngemali njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni. UMamabolo uthe baqinisa izinhlelo zabo ukuze kungabi nezikhalo ngemiphumela yokhetho. "Sizowamema namaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi alethe abacwaningi abazobheka uhlelo lwemiphumela esilusebenzisayo ukuze kungabi nezikhalo. Kwaba nezikhalo okhethweni lwango-2024 ngezinkinga ezithinta ibhodi eliveza imiphumela yokhetho," usho kanje. Lezi zinselelo zakhalisa amaqembu amaningi. Kwakucima ibhodi isikhathi eside. Kwenzeka lokhu nje iMKP ifuna luhlehliswe ukhetho oluzayo, ikhala ngokuthi kumele lubanjwe uma sekuxazululwe isikhalo eyasifaka mayelana nemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024. I-IEC yazichitha izikhalo zeMKP kanti leli cala elafakwa yileli qembu kulindeleke ukuthi liqulwe eNkantolo yezoKhetho ngenyanga ezayo. Umholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uthe ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi," kusho uZuma.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMMELI kaNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, u-Advocate Dali Mpofu, eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, izolo, ecaleni lezibhelu zango-2021 Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media ISAZI sezomthetho wokusetshenziswa kwezinkundla zokuxhumana, uNkk Emma Sadleir, simile ekutheni indodakazi yomholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, yayilokhu iyiphehlile eyodweshu ngesikhathi sezibhelu zango-2021. Sikusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi sifakaza eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, lapho ummeli kaNkk Zuma-Sambudla, u-Advocate Dali Mpofu, ekhale ngokuthi lo ngoti ufakaza ngaphandle kombiko ofanele, obizwa ngokuthi i-expert report. Lo ngoti ubehlonywa ngemibuzo ngobufakazi bakhe abethula phambilini, abuqoqa enkundleni yokuxhumana i-X, wase ebhala i-memorandum ngalokho akuthola. Wabe esenikezela ngombono wakhe ngokuziphatha kukaNkk Zuma-Sambudla. UNkk Sadleir utshele inkantolo ukuthi umqulu awusebenzisile ukwethula ngawo ubufakazi bakhe i-memorandum, akuwona umbiko (expert report). Uthe lokhu kwenzeka ngesizathu sokuthi abophiko loKlebe abeza kuye ukuzomtshela ukuthi kudingeka acubungule okwakubhalwe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, abazange babuye kuye ukuzomtshela ukuthi ahlanganise lo mbiko ngoba uzoba wufakazi enkantolo. Uthe wathi uma esebizelwa enkantolo, waphoqeleka ukuthi athule ubufakazi bakhe esebenzisa ayekubhale kwi-memorandum. Uthe mabili amacala abophiko loKlebe ababethe bafuna abalekelele kuwo; elokuqala elalabo ababegqugquzela udlame besebenzisa inkundla yokuxhumana uWhatsApp, bese elesibili kube eliqondene nommangalelwa (uNkk Zuma-Sambudla). Uthe emva kokuhlanganisa i-memorandum yakhe eyayihambisana nombono wakhe wokuthi likhona icala okufanele aliphendule enkantolo ummangalelwa, wabe eseyihambisa kwabophiko loKlebe. Emphosa imibuzo uMpofu, uthe bashaya amakhala ngokwethula kwakhe ubufakazi ngaphandle kombiko wesazi (expert report). “Uyavuma kodwa ukuthi lo mqulu othule ngawo ubufakazi akuyona i-expert report kodwa yi-memorandum? Sizophakamisa ukuthi ubufakazi bakho buchithwe ngoba inkantolo ayikwazi ukulalela ubufakazi besazi ngaphandle kombiko,” kubeka uMpofu. UNkk Sadleir uphendule ngelithi ukuthi ubufakazi bakhe ubethule ngaphandle kombiko, abukuguquli ubuqiniso balokho akuthola njengesazi. Wengeze ngelithi ngisho ngabe wayewuhlanganisile umbiko uMpofu ambuza ngawo, wayezothatha khona lokhu akubhale kwi-memorandum, akunameke lapho ayezobhala khona umbiko. Uthe akazange asazi isizathu esenza oKlebe bangabe besabuyela kuyena ukuzomtshela ukuthi akahlanganise umbiko wesazi. Ecacisa ngokunye athi wakuthola, uthe kwakungama-tweet angu-2 uNkk Zuma-Sambudla awafaka ekhasini lakhe esikhathini esingamahora angu-36 kulandela ukuboshwa kukayise. Phakathi kwawo, uthe kwakukhona eyayithi “Siyanibona” (“we see you”), athe wayebalula izindawo ezehlukene lapho okwase kuqubuke khona udlame. UNkk Sadleir uthe ngokucubungula kwakhe, lokhu kwakukhombisa ukuthi ugqugquzela udlame, kukhombisa injabulo, ukuthakasela kanjalo nokubonga. Uthe ikhasi lomuntu ofana noNkk Zuma-Sambudla lithathwa njengelinomthelela kubantu njengoba linabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-360 000. Uveze nokuthi ungumuntu odumile, ozalwa owayengumengameli nakho okuba nomthelela ekutheni into ayishoyo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ilalelwe abantu abaningi. Uveze ukuthi lokhu kwabonakala nangesibalo sabantu abaphinde bafaka ayekuphanyeke kule nkundla yakhe emakhasini abo. IJaji uMnuz Mbuzeni Mathenjwa, lilihlehlisele inamuhla icala, ukuze kulethwe ufakazi omusha. UNkk Zuma-Sambudla, ubeswenke econsa ngesudi yakhe emnyama, eshaye nezicathulo zakhe ezimnyama ezihambela phezulu. Ubebukeka ezikhululekele, kuthi uma kuthathwa ikhefu, abonakale exhawula abeMKP ebebezomeseka, aphinde athathe izithombe nalabo ebebefuna ukushutha naye. Phakathi kwabebezomeseka bekukhona noyilungu leMKP ePhalamende, uMnuz Vusi Shongwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UGIXABEZWE ngeminyaka ewu-95 ebhadla ejele, owesilisa olahlwe ngoxhaxha lwamacala okudlwengula nawokugqekeza imizi eNtabamhlophe naseWembezi. USabelo Khumalo oneminyaka engu-36, ugwetshwe yiNkantolo yesiFunda sase-Estcourt. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uCaptaion Ntathu Ndlovu, uKhumalo wenza la macala phakathi kuka-2021 no-2023. “Utholwe enecala lokuhlukumeza abesifazane abayisihlanu. Abagilwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-15 no-36 kanti lona wesilisa wayebahlukumeza ezehlakalweni ezehlukene,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu. Enaba, uKhumalo uthe wayegasela emakhaya abo abagilwa, angene ngaphakathi ezindlini ngokungemthetho, abadlwengule bese ebaphuca izinto zabo. Uthe inkantolo ngaphambi kokuba idedele isigwebo esimfanele, ilalele bonke ubufakazi bokuthi izenzo zakhe zabakhahlameza kangakanani abagilwa emqondweni, zabashiya behlale bethuka izanya ngokuphepha kwabo. “Ugwetshwe iminyaka engu-75 ngamacala amahlanu okudlwengula, waphinde wagixabezwa ngeminyaka engu-20 ngaphezulu, ngecala ngalinye, kwamane okugqekeza awenza,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu. Uthe abaphenyi bophiko lweFamily Violence Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit (FCS) Estcourt, basebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi uKhumalo unikezwa isigwebo esinzima. Uthe lokhu bakwenze ukukhombisa ukuthi ezobulungiswa ziyazinikela ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi abesifazane nezingane abangenamandla okuzivikela, umthetho uyabavikela. “Abenzi bobubi bayajeziswa ngezenzo zabo. Lesi sigwebo sizothumela umyalezo oqinile wokuthi ukuhlukumeza ngokobulili kanjalo nobugebengu obunodlame ngeke kubekezelelwe,” usho kanje.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Ithemba kuqashwa othisha baka-Grade R Image: Independent Newspapers Archives BAQALA emsebenzini ngenyanga ezayo, othisha abangu-500 abazofundisa uGrade R KwaZulu-Natal, abaqashwe nguMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni. Bese kunesikhathi ibangwa indaba yokuqashwa kothisha abafundisa leli banga kulesi sifundazwe. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe laba basebenzi baqala ngo-Ephreli 1, emsebenzini, wathi babaqasha ukuze baqinise isisekelo semfundo kulesi sifundazwe. "UMnyango uzibophezele ekulandeleni umthetho wezikole iBela, okubeka kucace ukuthi uGrade R, usuyimpoqo kuleli. Siqinisekisa nokuthi othisha abafundisa leli banga, baneziqu ezifanele kanti abafundi sifuna bafundiswe ngabantu abazinikele," usho kanje. Uthe labo thisha bazokwehlisa nesibalo sabafundi emakilasini kulandelwa umkamo obekiwe wokuthi uthisha oyedwa ufundisa abafundi abangaki ekilasini. "Ukuqinisa esisekelweni semfundo kuzokwenza ukuthi zibe zinhle izithelo emabangeni aphezulu, kubalwa no-matric. Labo thisha bazosiza kakhulu nasezindaweni zasemakhaya, lapho bezovulela khona iminyango abafundi abahlala kulezi zindawo." Uthe bahleli befuna ukuqikelela ukuthi umfundi oqala isikole, uthola imfundo esezingeni. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kusanothisha abangaqashiwe abahlala bekhala ngokunqaba kwemisebenzi emnyangweni. Iningi labo lize liqhinqe emahhovisi oMnyango lifuna izikhulu zibaqashe. Leli qulu likhala ngosizi elibhekene nalo njengoba lafunda kodwa alikwazi ukuthola umsebenzi. UMnyango wesifundazwe ubhekene nengcindezi yokungakwazi ukuvala ezinye izikhala ngenxa yokungeneli kwesabelomali. Izikhala okubalwa ezabahloli, abaphathi bamasekethe oMnyango kanjalo nezabasebenza emahhovisi, azivaliwe ngenxa yokushoda kwemali. Inkinga yemali yenza lo Mnyango ungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka osebenza nabo. Abanye babo kubalwa inkampani esabalalisa izincwadi ezikoleni, okudingeka yenzele uMnyango isikweletu sokuthenga i-stationery nezincwadi ukuze abafundi baqhubeke nokufunda. Nezikole zithwala kanzima njengoba nemali yama-norms and standards, eyenza izinhlelo ezehlukene iphuza ukufakwa ngenxa yokushoda kwemali.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IJaecoo J7 SHS engenye yama pług-in hybrid asanda kufika eNingizimu Afrika UKUNYUKA kwentengo kaphethroli kuphoqa abanini bezimoto bacabange ukushintshela ezimotweni ezingama-hybrid kunokuthenga ezihamba ngogesi wodwa, ngokocwaningo olwenziwe yiYazi. IYazi yinkundla yokwenza ucwaningo kusetshenziswa uWhatsApp. Kulezi zinsuku kulokhu kubikwa ukuthi intengo kaphethroli nodizili izonyuka uma kuqala u-Ephreli. Umthelela omkhulu wokunyuka kwentengo kawoyela ongahluziwe ngenxa yempi yeMelika ibambisene ne-Israel abagadla e-Iran. NgoLwesithathu i-IOL ibike ukuthi intengo kadizili kungenzeka inyuke ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R10 ilitha ngo-Ephreli 1. Lokhu kungenza intengo yelitha ibe ngaphezu kuka-R30 okokuqala ngqa emlandweni wakuleli. Intengo yelitha likaphethroli yona kuvela ukuthi izonyuka ngemali engaphansi kancane kuka-R6. Ucwaningo lweYazi lwangoMashi luveze ukuthi abantu abaningi bazimisele ngokushintshela ezimotweni ezingonhliziyombili (ama-hybrid) asebenzisa uphethroli nenjini kagesi. Ama-hybrid ahlukene njengoba kukhona anebhethri elizishaja ngesikhathi imoto ihamba kanti amanye abizwa ngama plug-in hybrid wona ashajwa eziteshini zokushaja, ezingakabi ningi kangako kuleli. Ucwaningo luveze ukuthi ukunqanyulwa kukagesi okuhleliwe nokushoda kwezindawo zokushaja yikho okuvimba abantu ukuthi bakhethe izimoto ezihamba ngophethroli nangodizili. Kwamanye amazwe athuthukile lolu uhlobo lwezimoto ezihamba ngamandla kagesi nama-hybrid seziya ngokwanda mawala.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa uGeneral Fannie Masemola Image: Kamogelo Moichela / IOL News UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa kuZwelonke, uGeneral Fannie Masemola, uthi umsulwa ezinsolweni abekwa zona. UMasemola uthe akukho okuphambene nomthetho akwenza ngesikhathi kukhishwa ithenda yezigidi zamaRandi eyanikwa inkampani kasomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi evele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, izolo. UMasemola ubekwe icala lokuphula imigomo yokusetshenziswa kwemali yomphakathi iPublic Finance Management Act. Inkampani kaMatlala yanikezwa ithenda kaR360 million, kodwa yabuye yahoxiswa ithenda emva kwezinsolo zokungalandelwa kwemigomo. UMasemola uthe akalazi icala abekwa lona. "Ngiyazi ukuthi mina ngimsulwa. Akukho okuphambene nomthetho engikwenzile. Ngizodedela inkantolo yenze umsebenzi wayo. Kufanele engabe ngijaha izigebengu kodwa ngilapha namhlanje ngibekwe amacala okuphula imigomo yokusetshenziswa kwemali." Akucaci ngekusasa likaMasemola emaphoyiseni njengoba kukhona abafuna ukuthi amiswe emsebenzini bese kuqala uphenyo ngokuthi kufanele yini aqhubeke nokuphatha isikhundla. UMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, waveza ukuthi uzonquma maduze ngodaba lukaMasemola. UMasemola utshele abezindaba ukuthi sebeke baluxoxa lolu daba noRamaphosa. "Ngeke ngihambe nginekela izwe izinto engizixoxa nomengameli. Ngizolinda isiphetho sezingxoxo." UMasemola unxuse amaphoyisa ukuthi aqhubeke nomsebenzi wawo, angaphazanyiswa wukuboshwa kwakhe. "Amaphoyisa awaqhubeke enze umsebenzi wawo. Awaqhubeke asebenza ngokuzikhandla. Kungenzeka ukuthi ngiboshiwe njengamanje, kodwa bona kufanele baqhubeke nomsebenzi wabo. Ziningi izinto esizitholayo njengoba siphenya amacala ahleliwe. Sisezithendeni zabantu abathinteka ebugebengwini. Sesiyazi ukuthi obani abenza ubugebengu obuhleliwe." Icala elibhekene noMasemola lihlehliselwe uMeyi 13. Icala likaMasemola lihlanganiswe nelinye elibhekene namaphoyisa athwese amacala athinta ithenda efanayo. UMasemola uzovela nalamaphoyisa uma esebuyela enkantolo. Amaphoyisa angu-12, asolwa ngokuhlanganyela kuleli cala, abhekene namacala ahlanganisa ukukhwabanisa, ukushushumbisa imali nokuphula imithetho yemali. Amaphoyisa phambilini anikezwa ibheyili ephakathi kuka-R40 000 kuya ku-R80 000 ngokwahlukana. UMatlala naye uthweswe icala elithinta ithenda, uzovela nezikhulu zamaphoyisa uma icala selibuyela enkantolo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IMEYA kaMasipala wesiFunda uMgungundlovu, uMnuz Mzi Zuma UMASIPALA wesiFunda uMgungundlovu udingisa umshayeli weloli yamanzi obanjwe oqotsheni edayisa amanzi. IMeya, uMnuz Mzi Zuma, ithe abasafuni ukuphinde babone lo msebenzi esebenza ezindaweni ezingaphansi koMgungundlovu. Umsebenzi uqashwe yinkampani ehlinzeka umasipala ngezimoto zamanzi. UZuma uthe utshele izikhulu zomasipala ukuba zitshele inkampani eqashe lo msebenzi ukuthi akasadingakali eMgungundlovu. Lo msebenzi ubanjwe edayisa amanzi eMaqongqo, ngaphansi koMasipala waseMkhambathini. Ngesikhathi ebanjwa edayisa amanzi, bekufanele ngabe uhlinzeka amanzi ezindaweni ezingaphansi koMasipala waseRichmond. IMaqongqo neRichmond ziqhelelene ngebanga elingaphezu kuka-60 KM kanti lezi zindawo zihlukaniswe yizindawo ezingaphansi koMasipala waseMsunduzi. Umshayeli ubanjwe ethela amanzi emzini yabantu ekhethekile. UZuma uthe umuntu uma efuna ukuthelelwa amanzi emzini wakhe, kufanele awathenge amanzi kwamasipala bese umasipala uthumela imoto ezomthelela leso sibalo samanzi asithengile. Uthe imizi ebithelelwa amanzi ilo mshayeli, ibingazange iwathenge amanzi kumasipala. UZuma uthe abashayeli abadayisa amanzi benza ukuthi abantu bagcine bengawatholi amanzi ngenxa yokuthi abashayeli bawayisa kulabo abasuke bewathengile. "Kunabantu abangawatholi amanzi. Ngesikhathi ngikhuluma nabantu, kukhona abathe kunamasonto amabili bengathelelwa amanzi. Nina ninemizi yenu eniyithelela amanzi. Abantu uma bebona imoto yamanzi, baphuma nezigubhu namabhakede, nina niyabadlula ngoba kunemizi eniyithelela amanzi. Umphakathi wonke awunawo amanzi, le mizi ethandwa inina ithola amanzi." UZuma uthe isenzo salo msebenzi senza ukuthi umasipala ulahlekelwe imali. "Usuqhuba ibhizinisi lakho. Ithina esithwala izindleko zebhizinisi lakho. Thina sikhokha imali wena uziqhubela ibhizinisi lakho. Sikhokhela ukuthi umphakathi uthole amanzi, nina nihambisa amanzi lapho enazi khona ukuthi nithola imali." UZuma uthe lo mshayeli uzodala ukuthi abantu abangawatholi amanzi badinelwe umasipala. "Ulindiwe eRichmond kodwa wena usuzakhele uhlelo lwakho ukuthi uzosebenza kanjani. Sizothukwa abantu eRichmond, ulindiwe eRichmond. Wena uyashushuluza yonke le ndlela. Le moto ohamba ngayo ine-tracker. Umqashi wakho uzofuna ukuthi simkhokhele imali eningi uma ebuka ibanga olihambile. Uthunywe eRichmond wena uziyela lapho othanda khona. Nakhona lana awuzile ukuzosiza abantu uzoziqhubela ibhizinisi lakho." UZuma uthe inkampani eqashe lo msebenzi kuzofanele imtholele umsebenzi kwenye indawo. "Asifuni ukuphinde sikubone la eMgungundlovu. Akuyona indawo yokuganga lena."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ULungelo KM osejoyine uhlelo iDaily Thetha kwiSABC 1 Image: Instagram/Lungelo KM UZONCELISA amawele uLungelo KM Mdletshe, odume nge-podcast yakhe yakwi-YouTube njengoba esejoyine uhlelo, iDaily Thetha kwiSABC 1. ULungelo KM uzakhele udumo nge-podcast yakhe i-Engineer Your Life lapho kufika khona abantu abahlukene bexoxa ngempilo yabo. Ngesikhathi kuqala isizini yesikhombisa yeDaily Thetha edlala ngo-11 ekuseni, umenyezelwe njengomunye wabethuli bayo. Ujoyine umsakazi woKhozi FM uNeliswa Cele, Ursula Mariani noGcina Mdikane. ULungelo KM uthe uletha izisombululo ohlelweni okuyinto ayenza emsebenzini wakhe wansuku zonke njengoba engunjiniyela kagesi. Ukuncelisa kwakhe amawele kuqinisekiswe ekhasini le-podcast yakhe kwi-X. UNeliswa uthe ukuba wumsakazi kumlungiselele ukuthi angene kwithelevishini. Uthe kuhluke ngokuthi abantu akhuluma nabo uyababona bukhoma nendlela abazizwa ngayo kwazise kusuke kunezethameli e-studio. “Yonke into yenzeka bukhoma, kumele ucabange ngokushesha. Kuyajabulisa, kumnandi futhi ngiyakuthanda." Kulolu hlelo oluqoshwa bukhoma, kukhulunywa ngezihloko ezihlukene ezithinta abantu. Ababukeli balo abase-studio, emgwaqweni nasemakhaya bayakwazi ukuphawula. Kuphinde kulandwe nongoti abazonaba kabanzi ngezihloko okusuke kukhulunywa ngazo. Phambilini lolu hlelo lwake lwethulwa wuKini Shandu, Tumelo Mothotoane, Pearl Shongwe ongasekho, owayenguMiss SA uLalela Mswane nabanye.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Ministry of Human Settlements UNGQONGQOSHE wokuHlaliswa kwaBantu, uNksz Thembi Simelane, uveze ukuthi babalelwa ku-3.4 million, abantu ababhalisele ukuthola izindlu. UNksz Simelane uthe lesi sibalo usithole ohlwini lwabantu abafuna izindlu , i-National Housing Needs Register (NHNR). "Umbiko weCensus ka-2022, uveza ukuthi zibalelwa ku-2.1 million izindlu ezidingekayo. Ngokombiko ofanayo elakuleli linezindlu ezingu-17.8 million, kanti u-13% wabantu uhlala emijondolo," usho kanje ephendula imibuzo eNdlini yoMkhandlu weziFundazwe ePhalamende kuleli sonto. Uthe bahlele ukuthi kusuka onyakenimali u-2024/2025 kuya kunyakamali u-2029/20230, bazokwakha izindlu ezingu-230 000, baphinde bakhiphe neziza ezingu-314 000. Uveze nokuthi basemkhankasweni wokuphucula nemijondolo. Mayelana nomonakalo odalwe yizikhukhula zakamuva eLimpopo, Mpumalanga, Gauteng, Eastern Cape naKwaZuku-Natal, uthe bafuna ukuthola ukuthi zidale umonakalo ozodla malini. "Sibheka nendlela yokungenelela kwezinye izindawo ezikhahlanyezwe yilezi zikhukhula. Singenelela ngokuthumela izinto zokusiza uma kunomlilo, senze ucwaningo ngezindlu ezicekeleke phansi siphinde sibheke neyokuhlinzeka ngezindlu zesikhashana." Uthe uma sekuphothulwe lonke ucwaningo, bazobe sebazi ukuthi kudingeka malini. "Izifundazwe ezithintekayo sezinolwazi ngomthelela wononakalo odalekile kwingqalasizinda nokuthi kungase kudle malini ukuyilungisa. Lokhu kuzosigqugquzela ukuthi sikwazi ukufaka isicelo esikhwameni sezinhlekelele," kusho uNksz Simelane.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABAFUNDI bajabulele umnikelo wezicathulo ovela kwabeNdabe Dignified Funerals.Esithombeni banoSihlalo wayo uMnuz Ndabe Ngcobo kwesokunxele nothishanhloko waseBhekaphambili Primary, uDkt Sthenjwa Ncwane IZIHLATHI zivakashele izindlebe kubafundi bezikole ezimbili zaseLamontville, eThekwini, benikelelwa ngamapheya ezicathulo. Isolezwe lijoyine abeNdabe Dignified Funerals kanjalo nabeDurban Solid Waste behambisa lo mnikelo izolo eBhekaphambili Primary kanjalo naseGijima Primary. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, Isolezwe ligubha iminyaka engu-24 lasungulwa USihlalo weNdabe Dignified Funerals, uMnuz Ndabe Ngcobo, uthe lo mnikelo uyindlela yokubuyisela emphakathini kanjalo nokukhombisa ukuthi abafundi babalulekile. “Ngokuletha lo mnikelo, asigcini nje ngokufaka izicathulo ezinyaweni zabo kodwa sibanika ukuzethemba, isithunzi nokuziqhenya uma beshaya kancane beyongena emakilasini,” kusho uNgcobo. Uthe bahlose ukuthi benze umehluko, balethe ushintsho empilweni yengane ngayinye kancane kancane. “Ukwenza umehluko akuhlale kusho ukuthi kufanele ushintshe umhlaba wonke kanyekanye kodwa kuqala ngezenzo nje ezincane, eziletha umehluko,” kusho uNgcobo. Abafundi babonakale bekuthakasela ukunikelelwa ngezicathulo baphinde baphiwa nezinye izipho. Kuphinde kwatshalwa izihlahla nabakwa-DSW ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izikole zihlanzekile, futhi ziyanakekelwa. Lokhu kuzogqugquzela ukuthi banakekele imvelo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNkk Thuli Khumalo USHAYA amakhala umndeni wowesifazane okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa ngesihluku kanye nendodana yakhe eNgwelezane, eMpangeni. Kulesi sigameko esenzeke ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uNkk Thuli Khumalo (56) nengane yakhe yomfana uMbuso Khumalo (13). Kuthiwa izidumbu zabo zitholwe ekhaya, zinamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Ngokusho kwesihlobo esicele ukungadalulwa, umndeni kawuyizwa kahle eyokubulawa kwabo “yisigebengu”. Sitshele Isolezwe ukuthi esinye isihlobo esisondelene nomufi, sitshele umndeni ukuthi isigameko senzeke sikhona naso ekhaya. Kuthiwa sithe sona besicashile ngesikhathi isigebengu sigwaza sibulala owesifazane nendodana yakhe. “Okudidayo wukuthi esitatimendeni asibhalise emaphoyiseni, uguqukile kulokhu akusho emndenini, wathi ufike isigameko sesenzekile kodwa umbonile umsolwa kancane,” kusho isihlobo. Elanda ngalokhu okuthiwa isihlobo sikutshele amaphoyisa, umthombo uthe siwatshele ukuthi sifike ekhaya sibuya emsebenzini, saqaphela ukuthi akukhanyisiwe endlini kodwa kuvuliwe. “Uveze ukuthi uthe esengaphakathi wabona isithunzi sithi shazi, wazitshela ukuthi uMbuso. Uthe uhambe wayokhanyisa ngasekhishini, lapho abone khona ukuthi akuyena uMbuso kodwa isigebengu esiphethe ijazi lakhe ne-laptop, maqede, saphuma sabaleka,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi isihlobo sitshele amaphoyisa ukuthi siphumile sasijaha isigebengu, esivele seqa uthango, sawa, sashiya phansi i-laptop nejazi. “Uthe ngesikhathi esebuyela endlini, ilapho abone khona ukuthi uMbuso ulimele, wase etshela omakhelwane,” kusho umthombo. Umthombo uthe ngesikhathi kufika umndeni nomakhelwane endaweni yesigameko, lesi sihlobo besingakayikhulumi ekalona wesifazane. “Kubuze umndeni ukuthi uphi uThuli, kwayima kuqala ecingwa. Yiso sihlobo esijike samthola kuqala phansi kombhede, naye egwaziwe,” umthombo usho kanje. Uthe awekho amaconsi egazi abeconse aze ayofika ngaphansi kombhede. Uthe basola sona isihlobo lesi ngokufa kwalaba ababili ngenxa yokushintshashintsha inkulumo uma sichaza okwenzekile. Umthombo uveze ukuthi basola ukuthi lesi sihlobo sifike sagwaza lona wesifazane, sase sifihla isidumbu sakhe ngaphansi kombhede. “Sisola ukuthi uMbuso yena ubulawelwe ukuthi ubone okuthile, naye wasale esebulawa,” sisho kanje. Umthombo uqhube wathi okunye okwenza bashaye amakhala ukuthi bathole ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule, ukuthi lona wesifazane ubehlukunyezwa kuleli khaya. “Yena uMbuso uke wagijima waya emzini wesinye isihlobo, eyocela ukuthi sizolamulela unina ngoba uyashawa. Nebala waficwa eshaywa ngempela,” kusho umthombo. Uthe yena futhi uMbuso ubethi uma edlala nezinye izingane, akhiphe amazwi athi ziyajabula zona ngoba abazo omama abashaywa muntu. “Siwatshelile amaphoyisa konke lokhu nokuthi sifuna uphenyo lwawo luqale khona egcekeni ngoba aseneme ngezitatimende ezingafani,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uLt Col Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngoLwesine. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka," kusho uMagwaza. Uthe akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: U-MARTHA Mani obesebenza kuMasipala waseMfuleni, eMnyangweni wezeziMali, ongcwatshwe kulandela isigameko esinyantisayo sokubulawa kwakhe esitolo samasondo, eVanderbijlpark. Luthathwe wuphiko lwe-Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) uphenyo lokubulawa kowesifazane obesebenza njenge-accountant kuMasipala waseMfuleni, eVaal. UMartha Mani wadutshulwa wabulawa ngoMashi, ngaphandle kwesitolo samasondo eVanderbijlpark. Lesi sigameko sokubulawa kwakhe saqoshwa kwi-CCTV, esisabalale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Phambilini, uMartha ubeqashwe eMnyangweni wokuqoqwa kwezimali zikamasipala kwathi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi wakhushulelwa esikhundleni sokuba yi-accountant. Ngokubika kwe-eNCA, kuthiwa uMani uvundulule inkohlakalo ehambisana namathenda. “Wavula icala elayiswa koKlebe, waphinde wavula elinye icala lokusabisa futhi ngicabanga ukuthi axhumene la macala ngoba kukhona lapho atshela khona umngani wakhe ukuthi kunomuntu okhokha amasheke omgunyathi kumasipala, bese imali ingangeni kuma-akhawunti abo,” kusho umfowabo uLerato Rantsofu. Amaphoyisa athi uMani ufike endaweni yesigameko ngemoto yohlobo lweVolkswagen Polo emhlophe kanti abasolwa kuthiwa bebehamba ngeVolkswagen Polo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka. Kwi-video esabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, le ntokazi ibonakala imi phakathi kwezimoto ezimbili ngesikhathi ehlaselwa. Owesilisa uqhamuka ngemuva kwakhe, avulele ngenhlamvu, kuthi uma ewela phansi, adubule ngezinye ngaphambi kokuba abaleke. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseGauteng, uNoxolo Khweza, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi likhona icala lokubulala elibhalisiwe, kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu. "Imbangela yalokhu kubulala ayikaziwa. Uphenyo lusaqhubeka, akekho osaboshiwe okwamanje," kusho uKhweza.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa nenxusa elisha alijube eMelika uMnuz Roelf Meyer ngama-90s UVIKELE isinqumo sokujuba uMnuz Roelf Meyer, njengenxusa elisha laseMelika uMnuz Cyri Ramaphosa, emva kokugxekwa. URamaphosa ugxekwe ngokuqoka uMeyer, owayenguNgqongqoshe ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Wayehola izingxoxo eqenjini iNational Party, kubhungwa ngokuqedwa kobandlululo kuleli. URamaphosa uthe uMeyer, ubelokhu ethembekile futhi ethanda izwe lakhe. "Lonke inxusa elimele elakuleli kwamanye amazwe, kumele lilandele umyalelo liphinde likwazi ukugqamisa imigomo yezwe lethu. Uma lihluleka ukwenza lokhu, liyobuyiselwa kuleli," usho kanje. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo eGoli, njengoba bekunengqungquthela ebheka umnotho. URamaphosa uthe akazange abheke ukuthi uMeyer useka liphi iqembu ngaphambi kokuba amjubele kulesi sikhundla. Utuse iqhaza likaMeyer, wathi angakwazi ukubhekana nezimo ezinzima ngenxa yamava anawo kwezithinta izingxoxo zokuphemba uxolo. "Unamava kwezithinta izingxoxo zokuphemba uxolo okuyinto aseyenze emhlabeni jikelele. Useqalile ukuxoxa neminyango ehlukene yaseMelika kanjalo nezikhulu zakhona." UMeyer ungena esikhundleni esashiywa nguMnuz Ebrahim Rasool, owaxoshwa eMelika ngenxa yokugxeka uMengameli wakhona uMnuz Donald Trump. Elakuleli linyambanambana kuTrump, olisola ngokuthi kunodlame olubhekiswe kubalimi abamhlophe abaphucwa nomhlaba wabo. Yize esetshelwe izikhawu eziningi ukuthi lokhu kungamampunge, kodwa uTrump akezwa mshini. URamaphosa uthe akangabazi ukuthi uMeyer uzowenza ngempumelelelo lo msebenzi wakhe. "Sethemba ukuthi uzokwamukelwa nguTrump. Nathi sisanda kwamukela inxusa laseMelika, uMnuz Brent Bozell." Ekhuluma ngezithinta umnotho, uthe umkhakha wezamanzi kuleli kuhambisa ngelonwabu ukutshalwa kwemali kuleli. "Ingqalasizinda endala, ukungaphathwa ngendlela komasipala kunqinda izinguquko ngokushesha kuleli. Ukungahlinzekwa ngendlela kwamanzi kubantu, kwenza nokutshalwa kwemali kuhambe ngelonwabu." Uthe umsebenzi omkhulu nokutshalwa kwemali kwenzeka komasipala wathi kudingeka bavuke emaqandeni. Udalule nokuthi abantu abaningi baqashwe osomabhizinisi abazimele kuleli, ngakho kudingeka athuthukiswe ukuze sande isibalo sabantu abasebenzayo kuleli. URamaphosa uthe abantu bakuleli baziwa ngokuphanta. "Noma ikuphi la ngihamba khona ikakhulu emalokishini, uthi uyadlula ubone kukhona ibhizinisi elithile. Yinto eyayivele ikhona phambilini le. Ukuthi ibhizinisi liyachuma noma alichumi, olunye udaba lolo. Okubalulekile ngukuthi abantu bakuleli bayaziwa ngokuthi bayaphanta, abafuni ukuhluleka. Iyona nto okumele siyigqugquzele," usho kanje.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ISIKHULU samaPhoyisa kuMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi Image: Armand Hough / Independent Newspapers SIZOVELA enkantolo nozakwabo ocashunwe ngamaphoyisa, isikhulu samaPhoyisa kuMasipala waseKurhuleni esimisiwe, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi. UMkhwanazi oboshwe ngempelasonto, uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg, namhlanje. UMkhwanazi usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi "Cat" Matlala. Kusolwa ukuthi uMkhwanazi wagunyaza ukuthi izimoto zikaMatlala zifakwe amalambu aluhlaza futhi kwavela kwiKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga, ukuthi uMkhwanazi kunemali ayeyithola kuMatlala. Ngaphandle kwalokho, uMkhwanazi uphinde abhekane nezinsolo okubalwa kuzo nezokufihla ubufakazi ecaleni lokufa komuntu. UMkhwanazi ushaqwe ngamaphoyisa kungakapheli izinsuku ezingaki eqede ukwethula ubufakazi phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga, lapho ebephekwe khona ngebhodwe elincane. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe, uthe uMkhwanazi uboshwe yithimba eliphenya amacala asuka kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga. UMkhwanazi ubhekene necala lenkohlakalo nelokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. UBrigadier Mathe uthe ukuboshwa kukaMkhwanazi akuhlangene nobufakazi obethulwe kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga, wathi futhi akuhlangene nophenyo obeluqhutshwa uphiko olugade ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa, i-Ipid. Uphenyo lwe-Ipid lwaphakamisa ukuthi amaphoyisa kaMasipala waseKurhuleni, asolakala ecaleni lokufa komuntu, kufanele athathelwe izinyathelo. UMkhwanazi naye uyathinteka kuleli cala. UBrigadier Mathe uthe kukhona abanye abasolwa abasazokhalelwa amasongo kaSigonyela. "Ithimba liyaqhubeka nomsebenzi walo. Kukhona abanye abasolwa ithimba elisezithendeni zabo. Amacala aphenywa asukela ezinsolweni zenkohlakalo ophikweni lwamaphoyisa kaMasipala waseKurhuleni." Izolo, kuphinde kwaboshwa esinye isikhulu sakuMasipala waseKurhuleni. UBrigadier Mathe uthe lesi sikhulu siboshwe sisesikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo International Airport. Sibhekene necala lenkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. "Sizovela enkantolo kusasa (namhlanje)."

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UTHISHANHLOKO osamisiwe esikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, ejabulela isinqumo senkantolo sokumisa ukukhishwa kwamakhamera esikoleni Image: STHEMBISO MNGOMA BAPHUPHUME injabulo abazali basesikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary, eChesterville, kulandela ukuthi iNkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu, ivune bona ngolwamakhamera afake emakilasini alesi sikole. Lo mbango oqale ngasekupheleni kukaJanuwari nonyaka, ugcine ufinyelela enkantolo ngoMsombuluko, maqede yakhipha isinqumo sokuthi angakhishwa. Kwasuka umsindo kulesi sikole, kwaphazamiseka ukufunda amasonto amathathu ngenyanga edlule, ngesikhathi othisha beSadtu belaxaza ukufundisa, befuna akhishwe amakhamera emakilasini. Ngokusho kukaMnuz Babalo Majola, osesigunwgini esilawula isikole, uthe basizwe yiNatu, ukuqhubezela lolu daba enkantolo. “Udaba saluyisa enkantolo ngosizo lweNatu, kulandela ukuthola incwadi eMnyangweni wezeMfundo, ithi kufanele siwakhiphe ngokukhulu ukushesha amakhamera. Sabe sesithola usuku enkantolo kulandela ukwenza isicelo sokuthi lulalelwe ngokuphuthuma udaba,” kusho uMajola. Uthe kubajabulisile okunqunywe yinkantolo. “Ijaji lishiye elingalazi eMnyangweni ngodaba lwamakhamera, lase linquma ukuthi angakhishwa. Lokhu kusijabulisile ngoba yikho ebesikufuna futhi nabazali bajabule kakhulu ngoba bebevele belwela ukuthi angakhishwa,” usho kanje. Uthe selokhu luqalile ukukhulunywa nokususa umsindo olwamakhamera, bebelokhu bemile kwelithi awangakhishwa ngoba awusizo kubafundi nothisha kulesi sikole, okuthiwa sinenkinga yokungenelwa yizigebengu mihla namalanga. Uthe abanalo ulwazi lokuthi kuzokwenzekani ngenqwaba yothisha beSadtu abalaxaza ukufundisa. Labo thisha bafunga bagomela ukuthi ngeke babuye ukuzofundisa uma amakhamera engakakhishwa. “Asazi ke ukuthi bazokwenzenjani njengoba isinqumile inkantolo ukuthi awangakhishwa amakhamera,” usho kanje. Ubasole ngokuthi uma babenganeme ngamakhamera afakwe emakilasini, kwakufanele bakhulume nenyunyana yabo ingenelele, bangashiyi abafundi esithubeni. Uthe abakuthola kubazali abasadiniwe namanje, ukuthi abasabafuni ngisho bangashintsha umqondo bathi bayabuya, wathi kusukela balaxaza ukufundisa labo thisha bathola abetoho abakhokhelwa yibo, kusaqhubeka bona. “Esesikufisa ukuthi uMnyango ungenelele ekutheni kuqashwe ngokugcwele labo thisha ababambile njengamanje,” usho kanje. Kulesi sikole kugcine kumiswa uthishanhloko, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, izinyanga ezintathu. Nakuba uMnyango ugcizelele eyokuthi ummisele ukungaziphathi kahle emsebenzini, okumayelana nokunqaba ukubuyisa uthisha owawina elokuxoshwa ngendlela engafanele kulesi sikole, abazali banenkolelo yokuthi ujeziselwa eyokushaya phansi ngonyawo kwabo, bethi amakhamera awayi ndawo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo omusha othi The Phoenix oqale ukukhonjiswa kwi-e.tv izolo KUBUYA izinkakha zabalingisi asebenesikhathi bengabonakali ekulingiseni, njengoba izolo isiteshi i-e.tv, sethule umdlalo othi The Pheonix, okwezongena esikhaleni semidala okulindeleke ukuthi iphele maduzane Umdlalo iScandal! obusukhonjiswe iminyaka engu-20, nomdlalo iHouse of Zwide izogcina ukubonakala kulesi siteshi ngoJuni kanti kulindeleke ukuthi kuqhubeke ukwethulwa kweminye imidlalo. Lo mdlalo omusha uqale izolo ngo-7 ebusuku kulesi siteshi. Intokazi egcine ukubonakala ilingisa emdlalweni iThe River, kuMzansi Magic, uTango Ncetezo, izobe ilingisa indawo ephambili kuwo. Ekhuluma ngawo uTango, uthe ukhuluma ngowesifazane ogama lakhe uKholeka, ogxile ebhizinisini njengoba nozakwabo benamapulazi adayisa insangu. "Umdlalo okhuluma ngowesifazane osemncane ongena shi kuleli bhizinisi ngemuva kokuthi kudutshulwe umyeni wakhe obesatshwa futhi kulo mkhakha. Uba umsolwa kwabaningi ukuthi uyena obulale umyeni wakhe, ushiya konke njengoba ebehlala ekhaya engenzi lutho, kodwa uyasukuma uyalwa njengoba efuna ukugeza igama lakhe futhi efuna ukuqhubeka nokumisa ibhizinisi lomyeni wakhe," kusho uTango. Uthe abantu abaningi bafuna ukumbona engaphumeleli uKholeka, kodwa oyedwa wabangani bomyeni wakhe uyameseka ukuze aphumelele kukho konke akwenzayo. "Umdlalo lona nami ongifundise okuningi njengoba ngibonile ukuthi abanye abantu besifazane babhekana nobunzima obunjani uma kudlule abayeni babo, ikakhulukazi uma bengosomabhizinisi." Uthe:"Abantu basemzini nabo banokwabo, osomabhizinisi ahlanganyele nabo emsebenzini, bonke babheke ukuthi bangakuthatha kanjani konke akusebenzele, kodwa uKholeka yize ebhekene nalesi simo, ugcina ebonile ukuthi akasukume alwe, njengoba kufika nezingane akade engazazi okuthiwa ezomyeni wakhe. Izingane zisuke zifuna amafa. Baningi abazofunda ngalo mdlalo." Kulo mdlalo abanye abalingisi abazobonakala uDumisani Mbebe, Zikhona Bali, Lulama “AJ” Nyembezi, Yonda Thomas, Tyson Mathonsi noBrenda Ngxoli. Ngeledlule lesi siteshi simemezele umdlalo omusha othi Emzini: A Family Legacy ozoqala ngo-Ephreli 13 ngo-9 ebusuku, kuwo kulingisa phambili uWiseman Mncube.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IZOBA ngeSonto enkundleni yezemidlalo iPrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu inkonzo yomngcwabo kaLady Apostle Nonhlanhla Gama webandla lamaZayoni i-Trust in Christ Ministries IZOKWENZELWA enkundleni yezemidlalo iPrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu, kusuka ngo-5 ekuseni inkonzo yokugcina ka-Lady Apostle Nonhlanhla Patricia Gama webandla lamaZayoni elidume iNingizimu Afrika yonke i-Trust in Christ Ministries. Ngaphambi kwenkonzo yokugcina kaLady Apostle Gama (43), oshone entathakusa ngoMsombuluko, kuzoba nenkonzo yomlindelo ezoba KwaMashu Indoor Sports Centre namhlanje ngo-10 ebusuku. Kuthintwa uMfu Vusi Gama, ongumholi waleli bandla nomyeni kamufi, uthe umkakhe bazomkhumbula kakhulu ngokuthi ubewumholi omqoka kakhulu ebandleni futhi kuwuyena obhekele ukuhola ibandla ikakhulu ohlangothini lomama bebandla nentsha yesifazane. KWAKUJATSHULWA amalungu ebandla embathisa uMfu Vusi Gama nomkakhe uLady Apostle Nonhlanhla Gama (ongasekho emhlabeni) Image: FACEBOOK/TRUST IN CHRIST MINISTRIES “Sizomkhumbula ngeqhaza lakhe elimqoka ebandleni lokuqinisekisa ukuthi ibandla lihlala libumbene, esithemba ukuthi abazalwane abasele ebandleni bazoqhubeka kulowo mgudu ukuze ibandla liqhubeke liye phambili nomsebenzi kaNkulunkulu ungalimali,” kusho uGama. Eqhuba, uthe benze ngamabomu ukuthi kuthi uma kuphela umlindelo ekuseni, kungene inkonzo yomngcwabo ekuseni ngo-5 ngenhloso yokuthi kushaye u-11 sekuqedwe yonke into ngenxa yokuthi baningi kakhulu abantu abezayo abasuka ezindaweni ezihlukene ezweni. IZIKHATHI ezazimnandi kuMfu Vusi Gama noLady Apostle Nonhlanhla Gama (ongasekho emhlabeni) Image: FACEBOOK/TRUST IN CHRIST MINISTRIES I-Trust In Christ Ministries ngelinye lamabandla aseZayoni ahlonishwayo ngenxa yeqhaza elimqoka alibambile ukukhulisa nokuthuthukisa umculo wamaZayoni kule minyaka ewu-32 lasungulwa okufakazelwa wukuthi manje selinamagatsha awu-49 ezweni lonke.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umsakazi omusha woKhozi FM uMsizi Maphumulo Ntaka osexolisile ngokungezwakali okokuqala ohlelweni obekumele alusakaze kusuka entathakusa ngoMsombuluko USEVEZE ukuthi udidwe wusuku obekumele angene ngalo, abezitshela ukuthi uMsombuluko hhayi entathakusa ngeSonto, umsakazi omusha emsakazweni Ukhozi FM, uMsizi Maphumulo Ntaka (32). UMsizi kulo msakazo kumele asakaze uhlelo oluthi Dabulukusa, olungena ngo-12 kuya ku-3 entathakusa ngoMsombuluko. Uphinde angene ngoMgqibelo ekuseni, kusuka ngo-7 kuya ku-9 ekuseni noZama Mseleku, besakaza uhlelo Kuhle Kwethu. Ekhuluma neSolezwe lo msakazi othezwe wuKhozi FM emsakazweni iNanda FM, uveze ukuthi iphutha libe ngakuyena kodwa futhi usexolisile kubaphathi kanjalo nakuzakwabo uNkosinathi Mshengu, owagcina esesakaza amahora ayisithupha. "Ngibonga nje ukuthi lolu daba seludlulile, ngixolisile kakhulu kubaphathi kanjalo nakuzakwethu uMshengu ngokwenzekile. Mina bengingazitsheli ukuthi kumele ngingene ngeSonto kodwa bengithi ngizongena ngoMsombuluko ebusuku. Kube nokudideka nje lapho kuphela, kodwa udaba lwaxoxwa kwadlula," kusho yena. Uthe uvalo lumshaye lwameqa ezwa ukuthi bekumele angene nini njengoba yena ebenganake lutho, ebazi ukuthi konke kuhamba kahle. "Bengizihlalele nje ekhaya nomama nogogo, ngingazitsheli ukuthi kumele ngiye emsebenzini. Kodwa manje ngimagange, ngilindele ukuhlangana nabalaleli engixolisa kakhulu nakubo ukuthi abangizwanga. Abanye baze bakuveza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi bebengilinde ngabomvu. Kodwa mhla sengiqala ukuzwakala emoyeni, ngiyofika ngixolise ngokwenzekile, nakuye uzakwethu ngisazophinde ngixolise kanjalo nakubaphathi," kuchaza yena. UMsizi uthe waqala ukusakaza esaseDurban University of Technology (DUT), lapho ayenza khona iziqu zakhe zePublic Relations. Ngemuva kwalokho uthe wabe esethola ithuba emsakazweni iDurban Youth Radio (DYR), kwathi muva nje waba yingxenye yomsakazo iNanda FM. Ukuba semsakazweni uKhozi FM, uveze ukuthi kufike engalindele njengoba ubengazi ukuthi kuzosheshe kufezeke iphupho lakhe lokuba kulo msakazo ngokushesha. "Bengizitshela ukuthi kusekude kimi ukuthi ngibe yingxenye yalo msakazo, kodwa konke kusheshe kwenzeka ngingalindele. Ngesikhathi besibiza ngamaholidi kaKhisimusi, ngangithi yinto ezokwenzeka idlule, nakho ukuzozwakala lezo zonsuku oKhozini kwaba yinto enkulu kakhulu. Ngakho sibonga ithuba elisibeke la umuntu ekhona manje," kuchaza yena. Uveze ukuthi abasakazi abafana nozakwabo uTshatha noDJ Sbu, yibona abantu akade ebukela kubo kakhulu emsakazweni.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMNUZ uMfundiseni Mpanza onguMfundisi Jikelele webandla noMfu uKenneth Mngwengwe bephahle uMbhishophi uScelo Mpungose enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika yebandla lamaZayoni, Isiqalo Sokuthula Kwama Krestu Church of God in Zion ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule IBANDLA lamaZayoni, Isiqalo Sokuthula KwamaKrestu Church of God in Zion, lisebenzise umbuthano wokukhumbula iNkosi uJesu Kristu - uMkhosi wePhasika, ukuqinisa izinhlaka zobuholi baleli bandla - obekuhlangene nokugubha iminyaka ewu-20 lasungulwa. Lokho kwenzeke ngenkathi leli bandla, okumanje linamagatsha amabili - lihlangene kule nkonzo yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal ngempelasonto edlule. Kulo mbuthano kukhushulwe uMfu uMfundiseni Mpanza obewuMfundisi webandla nowakwakhe uNkk Smangele Mpanza, banikwa izikhundla zokuba wuMfundisi noMfundisikazi jikelele bebandla - okusho ukuthi yibona asebebhekele wonke amagatsha ebandla, inhlalakahle yawo, wukukhula nokubambisana kwabazalwane bawo. UNKSZ uThandi Nxumalo nowakwakhe uMnuz uLeonard Mpungose, abagcotshelwe ukuba wuMfundisi noMfundisikazi bebandla, bephahle indodana yabo uSiphesihle Mpungose, enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule UMnuz uLeonard Mpungose nowakwakhe uNksz uThandi Nxumalo noMnuz uMfanafuthi Magwaza begatsha laseNtuzuma, eThekwini, bona banikwe imisebenzi yokuba ngabeFundisi nomFundisikazi bebandla ngokubambisana. UMnuz uLindokuhle Nxumalo, ongumholi wekwaya yebandla - yena unikwe isikhundla sokuba wuMshumayeli webandla. ONksz uHlengiwe Nxumalo noNkk uNonhlangla Dludla begatsha laseNdulinde, noNksz uGirlie Hlanguza noNksz uZandile Biyela begatsha laseNtuzuma - bona bagixatshezwe ngomsebenzi wokuba woGosa bebandla, okusho ukuthi yibona asebebhekele ukuphatheka kahle kwabazalwane uma kuhlangenwe ezinkonzweni ezinkulu nezimqoka ebandleni. UNKSZ uGirlie Hlanguza, ongomunye wabagcotshelwe ukuba wuGoso webandla - enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule Umholi waleli bandla, uMbhishophi uScelo Mpungose, uthe bewubuholi bebandla babone kusemqoka ukuthi bahloniphe laba bazalwane ngale misebenzi ngoba bebona ukuzikhandla kwabo nokukhombisa amakhono nesineke kwabo kuyona bengakayigcotshelwa. “Nanokuthi ukuze ibandla likhule ngendlela efanele liyadinga ukuthi libe nazo zonke izinhlaka ezimqoka neziyinsika yokuthi liye phambili, yingakho sizamile ukuthi sivale zonke lezi zikhala ebezivuleke ngenkathi kuhamba abanye abazalwane ebandleni, sase sengeza nakuleyo misebenzi emqoka kodwa ebingenabantu abayenza ngokugcwele,” usho kanje. KUSUKELA kwesokunxele wuMnuz uJabulani Ntuli, uMfu uKenneth Mngwengwe, uMfu uLeonard Mpungose, uMfu uMfanafuthi Magwaza noMvangeli uSabelo Khumalo besenkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule UMpungose ukhuthaze laba bazalwane ukuthi bahole ibandla ngobuqotho futhi baqinisekise ukugwema ukusebenzisa amandla abanikwe wona nabathenjwe ngawo ukuphilisa abazalwane ngesandla sensimbi, ngoba ngenye yezinto lezo ezibuyisela ibandla emuva.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: OMUNYE wabasunguli beLadysmith Black Mambazo u-Albert Mazibuko ongasekho emhlabeni Image: Instagram/Ladysmith Black Mambazo UBEKHONZE ukucobelela abeza emuva kwakhe ngolwazi uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko obese esele yedwa njengomunye wabayibamba kuqala iLadysmith Black Mambazo okugcine kumenele esibhedlela ngeSonto ebusuku. UMazibuko (77) odabuka eMnambithi, ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini abese enamasonto engeniswe kuso ngokusho kwemenenja yeMambazo, uXolani Majozi. Uyibambe iminyaka neqembu njengoba aqala ngo-1969 ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi ekunandiseni ngonyaka odlule. Ushona nje, bese esele yedwa njengowaba khona iMambazo iqsungulwa kwazise umsunguli wayo uJoseph Shabalala washona ngo-2020. “Ulwazi abenalo belubalulekile kakhulu. Njengomuntu obesesele kwababekhona kusungulwa iqembu, ubewumthombo wolwazi nokugcinwa komlando obaluleke kakhulu,” kusho uMajozi. Uqhube wathi ngisho behambela izindawo befundisa ngaphansi kohlelo lwabo iLadysmith Black Mambazo Mobile Academy, uMazibuko ubebamba iqhaza elikhulu ekufundiseni hhayi kuphela ngesicathamiya kodwa ngomculo wakudala jikelele nangesiko. “Ngisho nizixoxela nganoma yini, ubekushiya kukhona akufundise khona. Ubungadingi ukuthi uze umcele.” Uthe eqenjini bese ethathe umhlalaphansi ngokucula kuphela. Ngesikhathi eshiya, kwethulwe amalungu amasha uGagamela Shabalala noBabuyile Shabalala. “Ubengasekho esteji kodwa konke okunye esikwenzayo, ubeba yingxenye yakho njengokubonakala uma sizilolonga noma sinezinye izinhlelo." UMajozi uthe izindaba zokushona kwakhe ziyihlukumeze kakhulu iLadysmith Black Mambazo, okumanje inomjikelezo e-United States of America. “Baphatheke kabi kakhulu ngoba bebejabule ngokuthi umjikezo uyaphela ngale kwezihibe. Noma bebazi ukuthi akaphathekile kahle kodwa bebenethemba lokuthi bazokwazi ukubuya bamvakashele.” Uthe amalungiselelo okumbeka abengakaphothulwa. “Bekunombono wokuthi kulindwe iMambazo ibuye ngempelasonto, bese kuyaqhutshekwa kodwa sizonazisa uma konke sekuphothuliwe.”

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: 1008556652__20260221__0 ZIMANGZE abaningi izindaba zokudlula emhlabeni komlingiisi uCynthia Shange oshone izolo ekuseni esibhedlela eThekwini ZITHINTE abaningi emkhakheni wokulingisa izindaba zokudlula emhlabeni kwenkakha, uCynthia Shange, izindaba zokushona kwakhe zivezwe yindodakazi yakhe uNonhle Thema ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. UCynthia waba ngowokuqala ukumela elakuleli emcimbini kazime kaMiss World. Akagcinanga lapho wabuye wazakhela igama emkhakheni wokulingisa emdlalweni uShaka Zulu, Deliwe, Isivumelwano neminye. Ikhono lakhe ekulingiseni ugcine ukuligqamisa emdlalweni iMuvhango. UCynthia oke waphumela obala ngokuthi uhlushwa yisifo sikashukela waze wanqunywa izinzwane, kuvela ukuthi ushonele eThekwini entathakusa izolo. UNonhle uthe "Kubuhlungu ukunazisa izindaba zokudlula emhlabeni kukamama wethu. Ngiyanicela ukuthi nisibeke njengomndeni emikhulekweni yenu kulesi sikhathi esinzima," kusho uNonhle. Iningi losaziwayo lizwelane nale ntokazi iveza lezi zindaba ezishaqise abaningi. Umculi uThembi Seete uthe:"Phephisa sisi, siyazwelana nani ngokunehlele." UNhlanhla Mafu uthe:"Oh phephisa sthandwa sami". Inkakha endimeni yomculo uYvonne Chaka Chaka ithe:"Owesifazane omuhle kakhulu, lala uphumule sisi." U-Anele Mdoda uthe:"Oh sisi, sengathi uNkulunkulu anganengama wena nomndeni wonke. Ubengumuntu onomlando omkhulu umama asikhombise wona. Phephisa ntombi." I-IFP ifanise uCynthia neqhawe emkhakheni wokulingisa. "Ushiye umlando onothile oyobonwa yizizukulwane ngezizukulwane. Waqala ukuzakhela igama ngeminyaka yawo-1970 ngemuva kokuthatha isicoco sikazime sikaMiss South Africa. Akagcinanga lapho waqhubeka esimela emazweni lapho angenela khona umcimbi kaMiss World ngo-1972, eLondon. Waba ngowokuqala omnyama ukwenza lokhu. Ubonakale emidlalweni ehlukene elingisa izindawo eziphambili, ngakho imisebenzi yakhe siyibonile ijabulisa izinkumbi zabantu kuleli. Njengeqembu sidlulisa amazwi enduduzo emndenini wakhe nakubo bonke asebenze nabo," kuchaza isitatimende se-IFP.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Itumeleng English / Independent Newspapers KUNTWELA ezansi ngezikhalazo zabasebenzi bakahulumeni abafuna ukuvunyelwa ukuthi bajoyine noma iyiphi i-medical aid kuleli, bangaphoqwa ukuba yingxenye yeGovernment Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS) kuphela ukuze baxhaswe. Isikhalazo sabo sizobhungwa ezingeni likahulumeni, njengoba abaholi bezinyunyana zabasebenzi bekhalaze kwiPhini likaMengameli wezwe, uMnuz Paul Mashatile izolo, ngokubiza kuka-GEMS, ngesikhathi evula umhlangano weNational Economic Development and Labour Council (NEDLAC), ePitoli. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi izinyunyana zamashela i-GEMS, zikhala ngokunyuswa kwemali ngo-9.5% kulo nyaka. Izinyunyana zifuna kwehliswe imali, kubuyekezwe kabusha ibhodi le-GEMS kuphinde kwenziwe uphenyo ngokusebenza kwemali kulesi sikhwama. "Abaholi bathe angiyithinte eyokunyuswa kwemali yi-GEMS. Asikayixoxi futhi asikasithathi isinqumo mayelana nodaba lwe-GEMS, lokuthi sivumele abasebenzi ukuthi bazikhethele. Bakhalile ngokuthi abasebenzi abasakwazi ukumelana nokunyuka kwemali yi-GEMS yingakho befuna ukuzikhethela," kusho uMashatile. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi abasebenzi uma bengewona amalungu ka-GEMS abalutholi uxhaso kuhulumeni njengoba lesi sikhwama sasungulelwa ukubahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo olungambi eqolo. Iningi labasebenzi lifuna ukuvunyelwa ukujoyina ezinye izinkampani zama-medical aids kuleli kodwa baqhubeke nokuxhaswa nguhulumeni, njengoba enza ku-GEMS. Uthe abamile bahlabela phambili neyokuqaliswa kweyomshwalense wezempilo kuleli, i-National Health Insurance. "I-NHI iwumthetho owadlula ePhalamende wasayinwa nanguMengameli. Kukhona abangeneme abayisa uhulumeni enkantolo, yinto esiyilwayo enkantolo kanti, asimile siyaqhubeka nayo." Odabeni oluthinta ukuhoxiswa koxhaso lwaseMelika, obelusiza empini yokulwa neHIV/AIDS kuleli, uveze ukuthi uhulumeni kaMnuz Donald Trump, awukayimisi unomphela imali oyifaka kulolu hlelo. "Sibheka izinhlelo zokuthi sikwazi ukuzimela singathembeli kuhulumeni waseMelika ngalolu xhaso. Sifuna ukuthi uma sekufika isikhathi sokuthi lolu xhaso lunqanyulwe, sibe sesikwazi ukuzimela." Uveze nokuthi balwa nobugebengu kuleli njengoba kujutshwe namasosha ukusiza kule mpi ezifundazweni ezigubuzelwe wubugebengu. Uthe kutshalwe nemali ezinhlelweni zokuqinisa imingcele engenela kuleli, ukuvala izimpahla ezingena kuleli ngokungemthetho. Ukhulume nangendaba yokungasebenzi kwentsha, wathi akumele kube yinto ejwayelekayo ukuthi izinga lokungatohozi liphezulu. "Kumele sihlale siyilwa eyezinga eliphezulu lentsha engasebenzi kuleli, kungabi yinto eyamukelekayo. Siyazi isimo asisihle, abanye abasebenzi abanaso isiqinisekiso ngekusasa labo lapho betohoza khona," kuqhuba uMashatile. Uncome neqhaza lezinyunyana ekulweleni abasebenzi, wathi kudingeka kubanjiswane ukulwa nesihlava sokushoda kwemisebenzi kuleli.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UDJ Lamiez Holworthy uzobe ekwabazonandisa emcimbini iMetro FM Music Festival ezoba seThekwini kule nyanga KULINDELEKE ukuthi udonse amehlo abaningi kuleli, umcimbi wamaMetro FM Awards, njengoba abalesi siteshi ngokuhlanganyela nenkampani i-Executive Concerts, sebememezele ukuthi uzobe uhambisana neFestival yomculo. Le micimbi izoba seThekwini ngo-Ephreli 25. Umcimbi wezindondo uzoba seNkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre, kuthi i-festival ibe sePeople's Park khona eThekwini. Abahleli bomcimbi bathe bafuna ukulethela abantu ubumnandi njengoba umcimbi wezindondo uzobe ubukwa bukhoma kobhazabhaza bama-TV, ePeople's Park. UVictor Dlokolo osethimbeni lokukhangisa lalo mcimbi uveze ukuthi, baqhamuke naleli qhinga ukuze bajabulise abantu ngezindlela ezehlukene ngoba akuwona wonke umuntu othanda umcimbi wezindondo. UMAFIKIZOLO wemgoma ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko naye ozoba yingxenye yalo mcimbi "Le micimbi yomibili izoba ngosuku olulodwa, lokho sifuna ukukugcizelela, ukuze abantu bangabi nokudideka. Abangathandi ukuya kowezindondo sithe asibenzele i-festival ukuze bajabule nathi. Sibophele abaculi abasezingeni eliphezulu abazobagcina bejabule umcimbi wonke," kuchaza uVictor. Uthe bonke abazohambela le micimbi bazobhema bakholwe njengoba kuzobe kubungazwa umculo wazo zonke izinhlobo. "Kulezi zinsuku abantu ngeke uze ubathinte uma kuza emculweni wePiano, Maskandi, Hip hop neGqom. Sibophele abaculi abahlukene ukuze sijabule nabantu. Abazohambela i-festival bazojabulela ukubona abaculi okukhona kubo uYoung Stunna, Babalwa M, DJ Tira, Lamiez Holworthy, Lerato Kganyago, Khuzani, Big Nuz, Dlala Thukzin nabanye," kusho yena. Uthe uhlelo lomcimbi luzobe luphethwe uSomizi, Tbo Touch noSizwe Dhlomo. I-festival uthe izoqala ngo-2 ntambama kuze kube phakathi kwamabili. Amathikithi alo mcimbi uthe ayatholakala eWebtickets, ePick n Pay naseBoxer ngoR300 noR750 iVIP. Kwenzeka lokhu nje abaculi bamatasa bakhuthaza abalandeli babo ukuthi babavotele eminxeni ehlukene abaqokwe kuyo ukuze bamuke nezindondo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE weMfundo eyiSisekelo uNksz Siviwe Gwarube SILULELWE inyanga ezayo esokuphawula ngemigomo ethinta isifundo somlando, iHistory ezikoleni zakuleli. Bekumele kuvalwe ngeSonto ukuphawula ngemigomo ethinta lesi sifundo kodwa uNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, walula isikhathi. Umnyango ufuna abantu baphawule ngemigomo kulesi sifundo, kusuka kuGrade 4 kuya kuGrade 12. Okhulumela umnyango, uMnuz Terence Khala, uthe silulwe ngezinsuku ezingu-30, isikhathi sokuthi umphakathi uphawule ngemigomo. "Manje sekuzovalwa ngoMeyi 19, 2026 ukwamukela ukuphawula komphakathi ngemigomo. Lokhu sikwenze emuva kokuba bebebaningi, abasafuna ithuba lokuphawula," usho kanje. Ugqugquzele abasafuna ukuphawula ukuthi bakwenze lokhu ngokushesha. "Siwumnyango sifuna ukuthi lesi sifundo sifundise abafundi ukucabanga ngendlela ehlukile, baphinde bafundiswe ngomlando wezwe." Inyunyana yothisha iSadtu, ifuna ukuthi kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando wase-Afrika. Le nyunyana isamile ekutheni ifuna lesi sifundo sibe yimpoqo kubona bonke abafundi. UNobhala Jikelele weSadtu, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, uthe bebelokhu besho ukuthi bafuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando othinta izwekazi i-Afrika, hhayi amazwe aphesheya. "Sifuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngezinto ezithinta i-Afrika, kungagxilwa kakhulu ezintweni ezithinta amazwe ase-Europe. Sethemba ukuthi le migomo ekhishelwe umphakathi, nathi esizophawula ngayo nge-History, izobalula eyokuthi sibe yimpoqo lesi sifundo." Uthe uma isifundo siyimpoqo, sizokwenza ukuthi abafundi bazi lapho besuka khona nokuthi kwenzekani ezweni labo. Abafuna ukuphawula bangabhalela ku: Director-General, baqondise ku: Florence Modipa, oyiChief Education Specialist: Curriculum Policy, Department of Basic Education, 222 Struben Street, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele kwi:Department of Basic Education, Private Bag X895, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele nge-email ku:[email protected].

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, nendodana yakhe, uThingo Makhathini, asebenze nayo kwi-albhamu yakhe ezophuma ngoJuni Image: Instagram/Nduduzo Makhathini UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, ujatshuliswa ukuphrojusa i-albhamu yakhe entsha  ngokuhlanganyela nendodana yakhe, uThingo, akubona kuzoheha nentsha. UNduduzo ophinde abe wuthisha womculo njengoba eneziqu zobudokotela kuwo, ulungiselela ukukhipha i-albhamu, i-The Myth We Choose ngoJuni. Kumanje usekhiphe ingoma eyendlalelayo ethi Kuzodlula. Uthe i-albhamu uyiphrojuse ngokuhlanganyela noThingo Makhathini (18). “Ukusebenzisana noThingo akuyona into eqalayo. Kwi-albhamu yokuqala eyayithi Sketches of Tomorrow (eyaphuma ngo-2014), babekhona abantwana uNailah, uThingo noMoyo becula. Balokhu beqhamuka bevela emsebenzini ngezindlela ezahlukile kodwa useyaqala ukuhlala esihlalweni sokuthi kube wuyena umdidiyeli noma uphrojusa kule albhamu,” kusho uNduduzo ekhuluma naleli phephandaba ese-United States of America (USA), lapho enomjikelezo khona. Uthe izingane zakhe ziyawuthanda umculo ngoba beziwufunda ezikoleni zamabanga aphansi kodwa uThingo uyena obonakala ngathi ufuna ukuwuqhuba. “Ulethe izithako ezintsha ezenza ukuthi lo mculo nabantu abancane ngokweminyaka bazowuthanda kakhulu.” Uthe baningi asebenze nabo okubalwa kubo uBlack Coffee, umkakhe u-Omagugu, Dalisu Ndlazi, Lukmil Perez, Ayana Sikade, Shabaka Hutchings, Robin Fassie, Keenan Ahrends, Thando Zide noMuneyi. Uthe i-albhamu likhuluma ngomlando nendlela okuthiwa abantu bavela ngayo emhlabeni. “NgesiZulu kuthiwa sadabuka ohlangeni, kube khona abantu abanjengoMvelikuqala kube khona oNomkhubulwane. Siyabheka ukuthi mhlawumbe lezo zindaba zendabuko zixhumana nekusasa? Yiziphi kulezi zindatshana esizikhumbulayo nokuthi ziwukhanda kanjani umlando wethu nendlela yokuziphatha? Ngizama ukuxhumanisa lokho njengoba mhlawumbe eminyakeni eyikhulu ezayo, sikhulume ngoNomkhubulwane ukuthi yiziphi izindaba ezintsha eziyokwakha abantu nemiphakathi nendlela yokuziphatha.” Uphethe ngokudlulisa amazwi enduduzo ngokudlula emhlabeni kuka-Albert Mazibuko weLadysmith Black Mambazo, asebenze naye. Muva nje, bakhiphe i-albhamu ngokuhlanganyela neMambazo, kubalwa noMbuso Khoza ethi One Voice – One World. “Abantu abanjengobaba uMazibuko babe negalelo nanokuthi babe nendlela yokuthi yini abafuna ukuyishiya siyikhumbula ngabo lokho okuyifudumezayo inhliziyo ngesikhathi sokukhala. Basishiye nolwazi oluningi, basishiye namathuba amaningi futhi sizohlala sibakhumbula ngamagalelo abo. Kuye kuthiwa umuntu onjengobaba uMazibuko akahambi usekhona, uphila kumculo nezimfundiso nakho konke akwenzile emhlabeni.”

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-DA, uMnuz Geordin Hill-Lewis UMHOLI omusha we-DA, uMnuz Geordin Hill-Lewis, ufuna iqembu lakhe kube yilo eliphatha uhulumeni kazwelonke. UHill-Lewis uthe ufuna ukuthi iqembu lakhe lingagcini nje ngokuba ingxenye yohulumeni wokubambisana kodwa kube ilona eliphethe ngokuzimela. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma engqunqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi be-DA ebiseGoli, ngempelasonto. UHill-Lewis uhlule loyo ohola i-DA kuMasipala waseSedibeng, uMnuz Sibusiso Dyonase, embangweni wokuhola iqembu. UHill-Lewis uthembise ukukhulisa i-DA. "Umbuzo okhona ukuthi ngabe i-DA izokuba yini iqembu eliphethe. Impendulo ithi yebo. I-DA izokhula ibe iqembu eliphethe uhulumeni kazwelonke. Angifuni nje ukuthi sigcine ngokuba ingxenye yohulumeni wokubambisana. Ngifuna ukuthi kube ithina esiphethe uhulumeni kazwelonke." Uthe okuzokwenza ukuthi i-DA iqhubeke nokukhula ukuthi yenza into yamehlo lapho iphethe khona. "Omasipala abaphethwe i-DA baphethe kahle. Isabelomali siphasiswa ngesikhathi futhi siphathwa ngendlela. Abantu abahlwempu bayazithola izidingo lapho kuphethe khona i-DA. Ezifundazweni esiphethe kuzo nakhona senza umsebenzi oncomekayo. Ongqongqoshe beDA abakuhulumeni kazwelonke nabo benza kahle kakhulu. Abanye bazi ukukhuluma nje, bazi ukugxekana nathi, thina siyasebenza." Uthe okubasalele ukuba bangenise lapho bengavotelwa khona. "Abantu abaningi sebebonile ukuthi i-DA iyakwazi ukuhambisa izidingo. Okusele ukuthi thina sisondele eduze kwabantu. Lokho akusho ukuthi sekufanele silaxaze labo abasivotele." UHill-Lewis uthe bazoqhubeka nokuzibamba ziqine kuhulumeni wokubambisana. "Kufanele siqhubeke nokuphikisana nemigomo evimba ukukhula komnotho kuhulumeni wokubambisana." Phakathi kwabaholi abaqokelwe ezikhundleni, kubalwa umholi we-DA eGauteng, uMnuz Solly Msimanga, oqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo weFederal, uNgqongqoshe wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, oqokelwe kwesePhini lokuqala likaSihlalo kwathi uNgqongqoshe wezokuXhumana, uMnuz Solly Malatsi, waqokelwa kwesePhini lesithathu likaSihlalo. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Ashor Sarupen, liqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo womkhandlu we-DA.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ubucwebe obutholwe kubasolwa ababoshiwe Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal abophe abasolwa abahlanu abaneminyaka ephakathi kuka-20 no-44 ubudala eMlazi kulandela ukugetshengwa kwesitolo sobucwebe enxanxatheleni yezitolo eMhlanga ngeSonto, 12 Ephreli 2026. Ngesikhathi beboshwa kutholakale ezinye zezinto okusolakala ukuthi zebiwe ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa elungisa indawo yesigameko enxanxatheleni yezitolo, athole imininingwane emqoka yokuthi abasolwa esigamekweni sokugebenga bebefuna ozothenga izimpahla ezebiwe eMlaza. Amaphoyisa ophiko lweProvincial Murder and Robbery kanye neThekwini District Task Team asukumele ngokushesha abhekisa amabombo eMlaza athungatha abasolwa. Ngokulandela umkhondo ngolwazi olutholakelela, amaphoyisa abophe abasolwa abahlanu (5) ezintatha zangoMsombuluko, Ephreli 2026. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso, kutholwe ubucwebe obulinganiselwa ezigidini ezintathu zamarandi kanye nezimpahla zokugqoka, amakhadi asebhange kanye nama-router. Abasolwa ababoshiwe babekwe amacala okugebenga amabhizinisi kanjalo nokuzama ukubulala. Bazovela eNkantolo yeMantshi eThekwini ngoLwesithathu, 15 Ephreli 2026.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: USOMABHIZINISI uManzini Zungu no-Albert Mazibuko ongasekho KUTHINTEKE abantu abaningi ngokudlula emhlabeni komunye wabasunguli beLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, oshonele esibhedlela eThekwini ngeSonto ngemuva kokugula. Umqondisi weqembu iSoweto Central Chorus eliqophe neMambazo ingoma ethi Usuku Oluzayo, uManzini Zungu, uthe baphatheke kabi ngokushona kukaMazibuko. “Sigcine ukumbona emcimbini iChristmas with Mambazo eThekwini abewuthamele njengesibukeli eqhubeka ngokugqugquzela ngobukhona bakhe. Impilo nomsebenzi wakhe kushiya umlando wangunamaphakade emculweni eNingizimu Afrika futhi bonke ababe nenhlanhla yokumazi bazomkhumbula,” kusho uZungu. Uthe ubeyincwasimende egqugquzele wonke umuntu. “Ukusebenzisana kuSuku Oluzayo nokunandisa ndawonye eziteji ezihlukene, kusishiye nenkumbulo esingasoze sayikhohlwa." Umnikazi wenkampani yokuqopha ophinde abe yisifundiswa, uSipho Sithole, uthe akulahlekelwe iNingizimu Afrika kuphela kodwa umhlaba wonke. “Kule minyaka edlule u-Albert Mazibuko ubengisiza futhi ewumthombo wolwazi obalulekile ngesikhathi ngibhala incwadi ngempilo kaJoseph Shabalala ongasekho. Mina naye sivakashele iTheku namalokishi alakhele kanjalo namapulazi aseMnambithi lapho uJoseph Shabalala no-Albert Mazibuko bekhule bengabasebenzi neziqashi khona,” kusho uSithole. Uthe akasoze amkhohlwa. UNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, uthe alisoze lalibaleka iqhaza likaMazibuko ekugcineni nasekuqhakambiseni umculo wesintu emazweni omhlaba. “Sinxusa bonke abantu baKwaZulu-Natal nasezweni jikelele ukuthi babeke umndeni wakwaMazibuko emithandazweni ngalesi sikhathi esinzima nokuhlonipha iqhaza lakhe ngokugubha umculo nesiko akugcinile,” kusho uNtuli. IMeya yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, igqugquzele amaciko asakhula ukuthi afunde kuMazibuko ngokuzihlonipha nokuthobeka. “U-Albert Mazibuko ubengaphezu kokuba wumculi, ubewafundisa amaciko eza ngemuva futhi ewumuntu abukela kuye.
