Ukushona kwakhe akukhona ukulahlekelwa komndeni wakhe neLadysmith Black Mambazo, kodwa okwezwe lonke,” kusho uXaba. Abantu badlulise amazwi enduduzo enkundleni yokuxhumana i-Instagram. UJeremy Loops uthe bazomkhumbula kakhulu. USekgwama Makhosazane uthe: “Awu kodwa alale ngokuthula ubaba impela umsebenzi wakhe mukhulu siyabonga.” “Siyabonga ngomculo baba uMazibuko, lala ngoxolo,” kusho uPearlzzz

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ICitroën Basalt entsha ezoshumbisa umbango wabathengi esigabeni samaSUV amancane angama-coupé Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: CITROËN BASALT KWA-CITROËN South Africa bazimisele ngokuqhubeka nokudlondlobala kuleli ngokwethula i-SUV entsha eyi-coupé, iBasalt, abanethemba elikhulu ngokwenza kahle kwayo. Ngo-2016 le nkampani ihoshe imfe emakethe yakuleli ngenxa yokubhimba kwezinto ngaphambi kokushaya ibuya isingaphansi kweStellantis. IStellantis ngenye yezinkampani zezimoto ezinkulukazi emhlabeni eyengamele okubalwa kuzo yona iCitroën, Jeep, Peugeot, Opel nezinye. Kusuka ngo-2023 lapho kwethulwe khona iC3 entsha, iCitroën ilokhu ikhula kancane kancane kwazise ngaloyo nyaka yadayisa izimoto ezingu-877. Nyakenye leso sibalo sifike ku-4 926 futhi, ngokwethula iBasalt, bakholwa wukuthi sizonyuka. Eminyakeni edlule le nkampani yaduma kabi ngokugqoza kwamaphathi kodwa bathi konke lokho sekuwumlando. IBasalt ingena phakathi kweC3 ne-Aircross elayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa. Ihlukene ngezinnhlobo ezimbili okuyiPlus neMax. Zombili zinamaLED headlights, amaLED daytime running lights namaLED fog lights. ICitroën Basalt ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED futhi inamarimu angu-16 inch Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Zihamba ngamasondo anamarimu angu-16-inch futhi igabade zilishiye ngo-180mm. IBasalt yinde ingu-4 352mm nokuyenza ivuleke ngaphakathi bese iba nebhuthi engu-470 litres. Ngemuva ngesikhathi siyivivinya eGoli kuleli sonto ngibone kuhlaleka nokho kumele ugade ikhanda uma ungena ukuze lingashayi ngenxa yokhakhayi oluyisibaca. Ngemuva futhi kunezimbobo ezimbili zokushaja nezokukhipha umoya we-aircon. Ngaphambili kune-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10 inch lapho uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo. Kwi-Max kwengezwe ikhamera eveza ingemuva uma uhlehla, isiteringi esiyisikhumba kanjalo nezipikha ezimbili. Zombili zine-digital instrument cluster engu-7-inch eveza imininingwane ebalulekile. Isiyonke ngaphakathi ayikhalisi nhlobo yakheke kahle. Ngaphansi kwebhonethi bafake injini engu-1.2 llitre turbo kaphethroli. Inamandla angu-81kW ne-torque engu-205Nm. Le njini eyi-three cylinder futhi ejwayelekile kwezinye izimoto zale nkampani, ino-gearbox oyi-6 speed automatic. Sinqamula ezintabeni nasemajikeni emigwaqo ebheke eHartbeespoort, eNorth West, ibizwakala inamandla enele sihamba sibabili phakathi. Nokudlula ezinye izimoto bekungabi yinto enzima ngoba ibiphendula indlela ebenginyathela ngayo. Ngiyizwe intofontofo ngaphandle komoya wangaphandle obuthanda ukuba nomsinjwana ngaphakathi. KwaCitroën bathi iphephile ngoba bayifake ama-airbag ayisithupha, Electronic Stability Programme (ESP), ayihlehli uma usuka nendaweni enyukelayo, iyasho uma umoya wehla emasondweni, ABS nokunye. Ngaphakathi iCitroën Basalt ine-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10 inch exhume kuyo iselula nye-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo KwaCitroën bathi uma ubusezinhlelweni zokuthenga iSuzuki Fronx okanye umzala wayo iToyota Starlet Cross, yima wo ngoba iBasalt yimbangi yazo. Ngendlela abayethemba ngayo ukuthi amakhasimende azoyamukela kahle, babheke ukuthi kuphele unyaka kudayiswe angaphezu kuka-1 300. Citroën Basallt PLUS 1.2 Turbo 6-Speed Automatic – R354 900 Citroën Basalt MAX 1.2 Turbo 6-Speed Automatic - R 369,900.00 Zombili zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi amane noma u-60 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-100 000km.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALELA ukubuya kwethambo lomyeni okuthiwa ushonele eRussia, ngenyanga edlule, owesifazane waKwaVukaphansi, eMakhabeleni, eKranskop. UMnuz Sihle Makhaye (44), okuthiwa wayehambe nethimba labangu-13 ukuyosebenza eRussia, ngoDisemba nyakenye, kuthiwa ushonele kuleliya zwe ngoMashi 28, nonyaka. Lokhu kudalulwe yinkosikazi yakhe, uNksz Sibonile Ndwandwe, ngesikhathi icela usizo lokubuyiswa kukamufi kuMphathiswa wezokuThutha esifundazweni, uMnuz Siboniso Duma. Elandisa lona wesifazane, uthe umyeni wakhe wahamba nabanye ngohlelo lwe-agent ethize, eyabatholela amathikithi ebhanoyi, yabathembisa ukuthi iyobafaka emsebenzini phesheya kwezilwandle. Uthe akanalo ulwazi olwenele mayelana nalolu hambo ngoba umyeni wakhe ubengesiye umuntu ovulelekayo ngokuxoxa ngezinto zakhe. “Angazisa kona nje ukuthi baya eRussia, uthole umsebenzi,” usho kanje. Uthe ngoMashi 28 nonyaka, uthole ucingo obelumazisa ukuthi umyeni wakhe usedlulile emhlabeni. Uqhube wathi akutholile ukuthi laba ayehambe nabo bagcine bebuyiswa ngempelasonto yePhasika. “Umfana ebengilokhu ngixhumana naye, ubelokhu engitshela ukuthi i-agent ayisatholakali,” kusho uNksz Ndwandwe. Uthe okumkhathazayo ukuthi akasebenzi ngakho akazi ukuthi uzothathani ahlanganise nani. “Ngiyafisa ukuthi uyise wezingane zami angcwatshwe ekhaya ngendlela yosiko lwethu singamaZulu kodwa amandla engingenawo,” usho kanje. Uthe abenxusa lakuleliya zwe bamtshele ukuthi phakathi kwezinto ezingenziwa ukuthi ashiswe noma angcwatshelwe khona le, wathi bathe konke lokhu kufanele kube yizindleko zomndeni. “Kukho konke lokho anginalutho, ngiyalucela usizo. Ngifuna ukuthi abantwana bami bakwazi ukuphola, bazi ukuthi uyise wahamba emhlabeni, wangcwatshwa, ithuna lakhe balibone. Angifuni ukuthi kuvele kuphele kanjalo ngenxa yokuswela kwami amandla,” kubeka uNksz Ndwandwe. UDuma ujube oyiNhloko yoMnyango wakhe, uMnuz Max Mbili, ukuba ahole ithimba ebeliyobheka isimo salo mndeni, wathembisa ukuthi naye uzowuvakashela masinyane uma kuvela ithuba. Uthe usexhumene nabaholi bakuhulumeni. “Phakathi kwabo kukhona noNgqongqoshe wezobuDlelwano namaZwe oMhlaba, uMnuz Ronald Lamola, ukucaba indlela eya phambili,” kusho uDuma. Uphinde wayalela ihhovisi lakhe ukuthi libe umxhumanisi phakathi kwalo mndeni kanjalo nezinhlaka zikahulumeni ezithintekayo. Ududuze umndeni, wawufisela ukuqina ngesikhathi esinzima obhekene naso. Laba abaya eRussia, kuthiwa bafika baba yingxenye yabantu ababelwa impi ephakathi kweRussia ne-Ukraine. Abanye basola nendodakazi yomholi weMKP, uNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, ngokuthi iyona eyabafaka emshikashikeni wokuyolwa le mpi. UNkk Zuma-Sambudla wasula nasePhalamende njengoba kuqhubeka uphenyo ngalolu daba.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUBA kuhle kanjena uma ibandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke - selenza iNkonzo yalo yesiVuno kahlanu ngonyaka NGOKUJWAYELEKILE amabandla amaningi amaZayoni avame ukusebenzisa inyanga uJulayi noma u-Agasti ukwenza iNkonzo yaminyaka yonke yesiVuno, okusetshenziswa yona ukuphana izipho zezithelo, amaveji nokudla okwehlukene - ukukhombisana uthando nokunakekelana. Kepha abebandla lamaZayoni, i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke, egatsheni laseZimbokodweni, eNingizimu yeTheku, bakwenza ngendlela ehlukile lokhu njengoba sebekwenze umkhuba wabo abawenza kahlanu ngonyaka. UMvangeli waleli bandla, uMnuz Nkosinathi Dladla, uthe lo mbono wabafikela ngokuthi bekuhlale kubakhathaza ukuthi uma beyokhonza kubo kamzalwane othile, abatatazelele uma sekuqediwe ngoba efuna ukukhipha unyawo lokukhombisa ukubabonga ngokungenisa endlini yakhe. UMNUZ Nkosinathi Dladla, uMvangeli webandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke “Sibone lapho ukuthi kufanele senze uhlelo olunjena ukusiza ukuthi uma sivakashele umzalwane ukuyokhonzela kubo noma kwakhe, kube yithina esiletha nezipho kuyena, ukusiza ukugwema ukuthi angene agamanxe ephaketheni elungisa okudliwayo. “Kusisiza nangokuthi abazalwane bazane, futhi sikwazi ukwazi lapho okudabuka khona abazalwane esikhonza nabo ebandleni, kungaze kube wukuthi siyoze sifike emakhaya abo ngoba nakhu sekuvele isifo noma into embi edinga ukuthi siye khona,” kuchaza uDladla. Eqhuba, uthe lo mbono baqale ukuwenza ngo-2019 futhi kubonakala uthela izithelo ezinhle kakhulu ebandleni njengoba kuze kube yimanje, emalungwini abo awu-175 egatsheni labo, sebewenzele u-46% wawo ezindaweni zalapho edabuka khona. KUBA kuhle kanjena uma ibandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke - selenza iNkonzo yalo yesiVuno kahlanu ngonyaka Uthe le nkonzo bayenza kahlanu ngonyaka okuba yingoFebhuwari, Ephreli, Juni, Agasti nango-Okthoba - kanti futhi bazama ukuthi ibe nobulungiswa ngokuthi njalo uma bezoyenza, benza i-draw yokuhlalukisa ukuthi elandelayo iya kuliphi ilungu lebandla. “Nalapho sekuthengwa ukudla esizoya nakho kulelo lungu, siyahlukanisela ukuthi lelo nalelo lungu lizothenga kudla kuni. Konke sikwenza ngokubambisana ukuze kungabi wumthwalo emalungwini ebandla, kunalokho kwakha futhi kuqinisa ukubumbana ebandleni,” usho kanje. UDladla ukhuthaze nabanye abazalwane bakwamanye amabandla ukuba bakhuthalele ukwenza izinhlelo ezifuze lezi ngenhloso yokwakha nokuqinisa ukwazana kubazalwane, okungasiza ukuthi amabandla akhule futhi kungabi lula ukuthi abe nezinxushunxushu. KUBA kuhle kanjena uma ibandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke - selenza iNkonzo yalo yesiVuno kahlanu ngonyaka Omacekeceke banamagatsha awu-14 aseGamalakhe, amabili KwaMadlala, KwaMakhutha, eMlaza, eKenville, eNanda, Esikhawini, eGoli, KwaNdengezi, eClermont, eHammarsdale, eMolweni nalena yaseZimbokodweni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: AZITHI vu izintokazi ezidumile kuleli ngamahlebezi alokhu evela ngazo kulandela ukuboshwa kwesikhulu sikahulumeni, uKagiso Michael Lerutla, oyimenenja yedolobha kuMasipala waseKurhuleni. UKagiso osamisiwe uboshwe esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo kwaphinde kwavela ukuthi ubeyotetemuka nenye yezintokazi asondelene nazo okuthiwa ibiyogubha usuku lwayo lokuzalwa. NgoMsombuluko ube esevela enkantolo noBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi oyisekela mphathi wamaphoyisa ezemimgwaqo Ekurhuleni. UMkhwanazi usamisiwe emsebenzini. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abantu baveze ukuthi uKagiso,imali kaMasipala ubeyichitha ngokuphilisa kahle izintokazi abethandana nazo. Kulezi zintokazi kubalwa uMawhoo ongumculi, Sithelo Shozi okuvela ukuthi washiya phansi ukuba uDJ ngenxa yokuba sebudlelwaneni noKagiso. Enye yezintokazi ezikhonjwa kuye uCyan Boujee, okuvela ukuthi umuzi asanda kuwusabalalisa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ubuthengwe uyena uKagiso. Ngemuva kokuboshwa kukaKagiso, uCyan uvele wasusa zonke izithombe abezifake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, nokuvele ukuthi ucisha ubufakazi ngempilo ayiphilayo. UCyan akakwazanga ukuthula kuvela lezi zindaba wathi yena ukhethe ukususa izithombe zakhe ngoba kuyisinqumo azithathele yena sona hhayi ngoba kuboshwe uKagiso. Image: Instagram/Cyan Boujee "Ngithathe isinqumo sokuvala ikhasi lami ngoba ngithanda ukwenza lokho ngenxa yokuthi ngifuna ukuthatha ikhefu khona. Ngingakujabulela ukuthi abantu bayeke ukukhuluma izinto ezingekho ngami ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ngicela ningangixhumanisi nabantu engingahlangani nabo, bese ngithule isikhathi esingangonyaka nilokhu nikhuluma, ningihlanganisa nabesilisa baseVenda, abaseZimbabwe, nemishado engingayazi nithi ngiyingxenye yayo. Angikuthandi lokhu enikwenzayo. Ngiyaphuma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngizobuya futhi," kuchaza yena. Kwenye yezinkulumonoGogo Skhotheni, uCyan uke wakuveza ukuthi wake waba nokungaboni ngao linye noSithelo njengoba amthathela indoda yakhe. Uthi naye wagcina ngokuthi athathe indoda kaSithelo nokwenzeka bengazi bobabili kodwa bagcina bazi ukuthi kwenzekani. Izolo kuvele izindaba zokuthi ama-akhawunti amabhange kaCyan asevaliwe nathi lokhu akazi ukuthi kudalwa yini. Imizamo yokuthola uSithelo noMawhoo ayiphumelelanga njengoba izingcingo zabo bezingangeni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka KUNENHLANSI yethemba ezikoleni zaKwaZulu-Natal, emva kokukhangiswa kwezikhala ezibalelwa ku-3 000 zothishanhloko, amaphini othishanhloko kanjalo nabazobhekela izifundo. Lezi zikhala zikhangiswe ngaphansi kwesekhula uHRM Circular 10, ka-2026. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uveze uthe bakhiphe izikhala ezingu-3 002 zothishanhloko, amaphini abo kanjalo nabazobhekela izifundo. Uthe bazikhangise ukuze kuqiniswe ezemfundo esifundazweni. "Sizinikele ekutheni siqinise imfundo esifundazweni. Simile ekutheni sifuna ukulokhu senza kahle uma kuziwa emiphumeleni." Uthe akuzovalwa kuphela izikhala kodwa kuzoqiniswa ukuphathwa kwezikole. "Sibeka abafundi phambili yingakho siqinisa ukuphathwa kwezikole. Sinxusa othisha ukuthi bazifake izicelo ngesikhathi esibekiwe kulezi zikhala ezikhangisiwe," usho kanje. Ezikhaleni ezikhangisiwe zingu-1 784 abazobhekela izifundo, babengu-673 othishanhloko, bese bebangu-545, amaphini othishanhloko. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi kuhlale kunesikhalazo esifundazweni, kothisha abangaqashiwe abakhala ngokungadedelwa kwezikhala eMnyangweni. UMnyango uhlale ukuveza ukuthi ubhekene nengcindezi yemali eyenza ungakwazi ukuvala ezinye izikhala. Othisha abangaqashiwe baze bamashele emahhovisi oMnyango, kokunye balale ngaphandle kwawo izinsuku, bekhala ngendlala yomsebenzi. Kuba nombango uma kukhangiswe izikhala zothishanhloko, amaphini abo kanjalo nababhekele iminyango. Okususa umsindo ukuthi baningi abasuke begaqele ukunyuselwa kulezi zikhundla zokuphatha. Uqophe umlando uMnyango wesifundazwe emiphumeleni ka-matric yanyakenye, ngokulala endaweni yokuqala uma kuqhathaniswa nezinye izifundazwe. Lokhu kwenzeka phezu kwezinkinga lo Mnyango obhekene nazo zokungakwazi ukuvala izikhala zabahloli, nabaphethe amasekethe ngenxa yemali. UMnyango uhluleka nawukukhokhela ngesikhathi osomabhizinisi osebenza nabo ngenxa yemali. Kwaze kwangenelela noNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, kanjalo noNgqongqoshe kazwelonke, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, enkingeni ebhekene noMnyango kodwa isimo asikashintshi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abasolwa abane abebehlela ukugebenga ibhizinisi eMofolo Image:  Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspapers Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abalisa abane abasolwa ngokuba yizigebengu kwathi ababili baboshwa kulandela isigameko sokudubulana namaphoyisa eSoweto, eGoli ngoLwesithathu. Okhulumela oKlebe eGauteng, uColonel Katlego Mogale, uthe isigameko senzeke ngemuva kokuthi uphiko lwezobunhloli eModus Operandi Centre luveze ukuthi kunequlu elalihlela ukugebenga kuhlonyiwe ibhizinisi esiteshini iKwezi, eMofolo. UMogale uthe ithimba lezinhlaka eziningi ezihlanganisa amalungu oKlebe iTactical Operation Management Section, Badboyz Security, kanye neGauteng Highway Patrol balandele lo mbiko bahlonza nezimoto okuthiwa zihamba abasolwa eduze kwezakhiwo ababeqondiswe kuzo. "Ithimba lilandele izimoto ebezichaziwe eduze kwalapho bekuzobanjwa khona inkunzi. Ngokubona kwamaphoyisa, abasolwa bahlukana phakathi ngesikhathi bebaleka ngezimoto zabo ezimbili amaphoyisa abajaha. “Ngesikhathi kujahwa abasolwa, kube nokudubulana, kwalimala abasolwa abane, kwaboshwa ababili,” kusho uMogale. Abasolwa ababoshiwe kulindeleke ukuthi babhekane namacala okubalwa awokugebenga ibhizinisi, ukuzama ukubulala, nokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni. UMogale wengeze ngokuthi kuthungathwa umsolwa wesikhombisa obaleke ngezinyawo ngesikhathi bejahwa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ISouth African Health Products Regulatory Authority (SAHPRA) igunyaze ukusebenza kwe-Lenacapavir, okungumjovo wezinyanga eziyisithupha wokugwema i-HIV KUNENHLANSI yethemba ngempi ebhekiswe kwi-HIV eNingizimu Afrika, njengoba sekufike umjovo ozosiza ukuvikela abangakasuleleki ngaleli gciwane. Lo mjovo, i-Lenacapavir, uzosiza ngokuvikela abangakahaqwa yigciwane ukuthi lingabe lisabangena. Abangakasuleleki bazojovwa kabili ngonyaka. UMnyango wezeMpilo umemezele ukuthi ifikile imijovo engu-37 920 ye-Lenacapavir kuleli. Okhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Foster Mohale, uthe abantu bazojova kabili ngonyaka. "Umuntu uzojova kanye ezinyangeni eziyisithupha, aphinde ajove ezinyangeni eziyisithupha ezilandelayo ukuze angasulelekile nge-HIV. Inhloso ukwehlisa abantu abahaqwa yileli gciwane." Uthe bahlose ukuvikela izingane ezincane zamantombazane, abesifazane abasebancane kanjalo nabesilisa abalala nabanye besilisa. "Sihlose nokuvikela nabadayisa ngomzimba nabanye. Sifuna ukukucacisa ukuthi lo mjovo uzovikela abangakahaqeki, awulona ikhambi lokulapha ingculazi." Uthe maduzane bazowethula emphakathini lo mjovo kanti kulindeleke uthulwe ngumengameli wezwe. I-DA ikwamukele ukufika kwawo, yathi uzosiza kakhulu empini yeHIV kuleli. Ithe abangakahaqeki bazovikeleka ekutheni bangasuleleki ngaleli gciwane. "Elakuleli linesibalo esiphezulu sabantu abane-HIV emhlabeni jikelele. Babalelwa ku-8 million abaphila ne-HIV kuleli. Babalelwa ku-6 million abadla imishanguzo ama-ARV. Lo mjovo uzoshintsha izinto kuleli." Leli qembu lithe lifuna uMnyango uvele ePhalamende ukuze uzothula uhlelo lokusabalalisa lo mjovo emphakathini ngokushesha.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UBUKEKA usekude ukuphela umdonsiswano kwiNFP, njengoba kulindeleke ukuthi akuphonsele inselelo ukuxoshwa kwakhe kuleli qembu, uMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Mbali Shinga. Umthombo osondelene noNksz Shinga, uthe uzosiphonsela inselelo isinqumo sekomiti esithi akaxoshwe eqenjini. Isinqumo sokuxoshwa kukaNksz Shinga simenyezelwe uNobhala Jikelele weNFP obambile, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, izolo. UNksz Shinga ulahlwe yicala lokushaya indiva umyalelo weqembu wokuba aseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, esasifakwe yiMKP. UXaba uthe uNksz Shinga unikeziwe ithuba lokuthi azikhalele ukuthi kungani kungafanele anikezwe isigwebo esiqinile kodwa wakhetha ukungalisebenzisi lelo thuba. "Wacela ukuba alulelwe isikhathi sokuthi enze izethulo. Wacela ukuba anikezwe umnqamulajuqu wangoMashi 22. Usihlalo wekomiti wachitha isicelo sakhe kodwa wamlulela kwaze kwaba u-Ephreli 17. Akazange alisebenzise leli thuba anikwa lona." UXaba uthe osekungasindisa uNksz Shinga ukuthi ayozikhalela phambi kwekomiti elibheke ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP. Ukoxoshwa kukaNksz Shinga kusho ukuthi uzophunyukwa yisikhundla sokuba uMphathiswa nesokuba ilungu lesiShayamthetho. UXaba uthe luzoqala maduze uhlelo lokuqoka ozongena esikhundleni sikaNksz Shinga. Umthombo osondelene noNksz Shinga, uthe luselude ukhalo oluzohanjwa. Umthombo uthe uNksz Shinga ngeke ajahe ukuya enkantolo. "Umthetho weqembu umnika igunya lokuthi aphonsele inselelo isinqumo ekomitini elibhekele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP. Uzoqala ayilwe ngaphakathi ngaphambi kokuthi agijimele enkantolo." Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaNksz Shinga ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa futhi engazange awuphendule umyalezo awuthunyelwe. Sekunesikhathi eside uNksz Shinga elengelwa yizembe. Ubuholi beqembu baqale bazama ukumkhipha esiShayamthetho ngonyaka owedlule, lapho babuphakamisa khona ukufaka umholi weqembu, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, esikhundleni sakhe. Lo mzamo awuzange uphumelele njengoba kwatholakala ukuthi ubuholi beqembu, abuzange bulandele imigomo ngesikhathi buzama ukuhoxisa uNksz Shinga. Emva kwalokho ubuholi bamisa ubulungu bukaNksz Shinga kodwa bahluleka ukummisa emsebenzini wakhe wokuba ilungu lesiShayamthetho. Ubuholi beNFP bufuna iqembu lihoxe kuhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal futhi kade bayalela uNksz Shinga ukuba asule esikhundleni sokuba uMphathiswa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umholi we-IFP uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: Doctor Ngcobo/ Independent Newspapers UNGQONGQOSHE wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, ufuna kuqiniswe izinhlelo zokuvikela abantu kwizinhlekelele ezihlasela kungazelele muntu. UHlabisa uthe izikhukhula zango-2022 KwaZulu-Natal, zenza abantu abevile ku-40 000 bangaba nendawo yokuhlala. "Kwafa abantu abangu-500 ngenxa yalezi zikhukhula. Muva nje kube nezikhukhula eLimpopo, ezidale omkhulu umonakalo. Abantu balahlekelwa imizi yabo, baba ondingasithebeni," kusho uHlabisa ekhuluma engqungqutheleni ebibhunga ngezindlela zokubhekana nezinhlekelele ezweni, eGoli muva nje. UHlabisa uthe elakuleli libhekene nesimo sokuhlasela kwezinhlekelele ezehlukene. Ubale izikhukhula, isomiso, imililo yequbula, izimvula ezina ngamandla kanjalo neziphepho. "Lokhu kudalwa ukuguquguquka kwesimo sezulu. Kudingeka kube nezinhlelo zokukwazi ukuhlonza izinhlekelele zingakahlaseli." Ukhale ngokuthi abesifazane, izingane, abaphila nokukhubazeka nabadala, yibona ababa yizisulu zezinhlekelele. "Noma ikhona imithetho yezinhlekelele kodwa ngeke isebenze iyodwa. Kudingeka ubuholi obunqala ukubhekana nalesi simo. Kudingeka nokubambisana ezinhlakeni ezehlukene ukuze inqotshwe le mpi." Uthe kudingeka kwenziwe izinhlelo kusenesikhathi kuphinde kube nezinto ezizosheshe zihlonze uma kuzoba nenhlekelele ukuze kusheshe kuxwayiswe abantu. "Omasipala baneqhaza elibalulekile odabeni lwezinhlekelele. Kodwa babhekene nezinselelo, ezinye zazo zifaka indawo okwakhiwe kuyona imizi, ukuvumbuka kwemijondolo kanjalo nezinye. Kudingeka kucetshiswe abantu ngolwazi ngezinhlekelele." Ubalule nobuchwepheshe wathi buneqhaza elibalulekile ekutheni kusheshe kuhlonzwe izinhlekelele. Uthe kumele kwakhiwe ingqalasizinda esezingeni ukuze ikwazi ukumelana nesimo esinzima sokushintsha kwezulu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-MK Party uMnuz Jacob Zuma Image: WILLEM PHUNGULA UMHOLI weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, ufuna kuhlehliswe ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo. UZuma ufuna ukhetho okufanele lube phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari, lubanjwe uma sekuxazululwe isikhalo esafakwa yiMKP mayelana nemiphumela yokhetho lukazwelonke nezifundazwe lwango-2024. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma namalungu eMKP ngeSonto ebusuku emhlanganweni obuhanjelwe yizinhlaka zeqembu esifundeni iTheku. IMKP yaphonsela inselelo imiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024, lapho yaba yiqembu lesithathu ngobukhulu ePhalamende. Inhlangano eyengamele ukhetho, i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC), yazichitha izikhalo zeMKP. Icala elafakwa iMKP kulindeleke ukuthi liqulwe eNkantolo yezoKhetho ngenyanga ezayo. UZuma uthe ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. Unxuse amalungu eqembu ukuba asho ngazwi linye ukuthi aluhlehliswe ukhetho oluzayo. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi." Umhlangano wangeSonto ububizelwe ukuzolungiselela ukhetho. UZuma unxuse amalungu eqembu ukuba asebenze ngokuzikhandla uma sekuqale umkhankaso wokhetho. Uthe bafuna ukunqoba ngamalengiso kuMasipala waseThekwini. Ngokwemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024, iMKP iyona eyathola amavoti amaningi eThekwini, okusho ukuthi ngabe yilona leli qembu eliphethe umkhandlu ukuba kwakuvotelwa omasipala. IMKP ibinemihlangano yokulungiselela ukhetho kuzo zonke izifunda zaKwaZulu-Natal. Imihlangano ibihanjelwe abaholi abaphezulu kwiMKP okubalwa kubo unobhala jikelele, uMnuz Sibonelo Nomvalo, nephini lomholi weqembu, uDkt John Hlophe. Kusuke umsindo kweminye imihlangano okubalwa obusesifundeni iMoses Mabhida kanye nasesifundeni Ilembe. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kusabalale ama-video amalungu eMKP kulezi zifunda exabana wodwa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uMnuz Sanele Thembani UYISE wowesilisa waseWaterloo, eVerulam, owadutshulwa wabulawa yiphoyisa likaMasipala weTheku engenze lutho ngo-Agasti 2023, useveze ukuthi sekuzokwehla nobuthongo emuva kwesigwebo esitholwe yimantshi yesifunda. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi ngoLwesithathu, iNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini, igixabeze ngeminyaka ngu-45 ebhadla ejele uMandlenkosi Gumbi (50), owayeyiphoyisa lomkhandlu ngesikhathi enza icala. Ubethweswe amacala amathathu okukhona kuwo elokubulala kanjalo namabili okuzama ukubulala. Ngosuku lwesigameko, uGumbi kuthiwa wadubula uMnuz Sanele Thembani (24) emgwaqweni u-M4 ngasePick n Pay Hyper, eDurban North. Ngokombiko wamaphoyisa, uGumbi wayeyingxenye yamaphoyisa ayenesivimbamgwaqo kule ndawo kodwa ngokwalaba ababehamba ngemoto umufi athulela kuyo, kwakunengozi yomgwaqo. Kuthiwa umnikazi we-double cab, umufi ayehleli kuyo nabanye esikhenkeni, wanquma ukujika aphindele emuva ebona ezinye izimoto zijika, zibona ingozi. Kuthiwa yilapho uGumbi adubula khona kathathu ebhekise evenini, inhlamvu yanemba uThembani. Uyise kamufi, uMnuz Mzomuhle Thembani, uthe kumjabulisile ukuthi ekugcineni umuntu owabulala indodana yakhe ngaphandle kwesizathu, ajeziswe. “Sengizoke ngilale nobuthongo ngazi ukuthi nakuba ingane yami ingeke isavuka kodwa nomuntu owayibulala naye uvalelwe eziseleni ezimnyama. Ngizothi noma ngimcabanga umntanami, ngiduduzwe ukuthi naye umenzi wobubi usezikhindini,” kusho uThembani. Uthe kumjabulisile ukuthi uGumbi agcine egwetshiwe ngoba ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala, ubekhombisa ukudelela futhi enethemba lokuthi uzophunyula ngoba eyiphoyisa. Uqhube wathi neminyaka anikwe yona bajabule ngayo ngoba uthe uma embalela, wabona ukuthi uyophuma ejele eseyinganekwane. “Ngiyazi ukuthi kungenzeka angayihlali yonke iminyaka engu-45 kodwa ngiyazi ukuthi uyophuma eseyinto ongayazi,” kusho uThembani. Uthe uGumbi ugwetshwa nje, yena ubengasalubhadi enkantolo, esededela amanye amalungu omndeni ukuthi aqhubeke nokuthamela icala. “Bengivele ngikhushukelwe umoya ngibe yinqaba, ikakhulukazi uma esekhuluma into ekhombisayo ukuthi akazisoli ngokubulala ingane yami futhi ezama ukuzithethelela,” usho kanje. Uthe bekungamkhathazi ukuhamba ngonyawo lonwabu kwalo icala ngoba abaphenyi be- Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID), babebathembisile ukuthi nakanjani lizomgojela ekugcineni. Uthe nemantshi ebilengamele icala iliphathe ngesinono, wathi ubezwa uma bembikela akade beyile ukuthi belungafakwa. Uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi ibulawa indodana yakhe, yase iphothule izifundo zazenyuvesi, isimatasa nokuthola izincwadi zokushayela. “Ubulawa nje, wayesethole ngisho nosuku ayezoyohlolwa ngalo ukuze athole izincwadi zokushayela. Lawo maphepha ngisawabekile namanje emotweni yami, akuvumi ngiwalahle,” kusho uThembani, othe njalo uma eke wawabheka lawo maphepha, izinyembezi zivele zigcwale amehlo. Ngesikhathi imgweba imantshi, uNkk Sophie Reddy, ithe ithumela umyalezo oqinile wokuthi amaphoyisa akufanele asebenzise igunya lawo lobuphoyisa ukwenza okungafanele. Isole uGumbi ngokubulala umuntu owayengenze lutho, ngoba edinwa ukuthi umnikazi wemoto akamgqizanga qakala ekubeni ewumuntu womthetho.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma (ngakwesokudla) nethimba lakhe behambele irenki yaseDurban Station beyohlola isimo njengoba kubhekwe emaholidini ePhasika KUKHISHWE isexwayiso esishubile kubashayeli abazophuza bese beshayela izimoto KwaZulu-Natal. UMphathiswa wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, uthe abazothi nsi, kwabazoshayela bephuzile esifundazweni. Ukusho lokhu izolo ngesikhathi ehambele irenki yaseDurban Station kanjalo neyaseYMCA. UDuma uthe ukuhambela kwabo kula marenki athathwa njengamanye aba matasa kakhulu ngezikhathi zamaholidi, kumayelana nokuyohlola isimo ukuthi ngabe konke kuhamba kahle yini njengoba kubhekwe kwimpelasonto ende yePhasika. Uthe umuntu ophuzile uba nenkinga yokungaboni kahle emehlweni, agcine engaboni kahle nalapho sekufanele ehlise isivinini. Uveze ukuthi kwizivimbagwaqo zabo, sebehambisana nabama-ambulensi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi umuntu obanjwa ephuzile, uthathwa khona lapho igazi. “Uma like laveza ukuthi kukhona utshwala obungu-0,8, kusuke kuveza ukuthi sekwedlulele kokusemthethweni okuvumelekile,” kusho uDuma. Uphinde wakhuza nabahamba ngesivinini esiphezulu, wathi lokho kuyazibanga izingozi. “Kuyiqiniso ukuthi ngesikhathi senyanga yezokuthutha u-Okthoba kanjalo ngangoDisemba, KwaZulu-Natal asibanga nazo izingozi ezinjalo kwabemboni,” kusho uDuma. Uthe ukwephulwa komthetho kwabemboni abajwayele ukuhlangabezana nakho, ukulayishwa kwabantu okwedlule esibalweni esivumelekile, kanjalo namathayi agugile. “Uma ushayela imoto enamathayi ayimpandla, kufanele ucabange ukuthi uthwele abantu, uthi uma ufaka amabhuleki, imoto ingakwazi ukwenza okufanele,” kusho uDuma. Uthe kulabo abazokwephula umthetho kufanele bazi ukuthi amaphoyisa omgwaqo atshalwe yonke indawo, nezivimbamgwaqo zithe chithi-saka kuso sonke isifundazwe. “Asixoleli,” kusho uDuma. Okhulumela usoseshini iDurban Station Long-Distance Taxi Association, uMnuz Mcabangeni Nala, esika elijikayo, uqinisekise uDuma ukuthi erenki yabo ayikho imoto ‘eyikhehla’, wathi abaye bakusabe ukuhlangabezana nezingozi emgwaqweni. “Asinavalo lokuthi imoto ngeke ifike lapho iya khona. Futhi asinankinga yamasondo (angekho esimeni),” kusho uNala. Ephawula ngokunyuka kukaphethroli uthe abanazinhlelo zokukhuphula imali ngoba bayazi ukuthi abagibeli badonsa kanzima. “Ngeke uthi kade ukhushulwa izolo, bese nathi isithi siyayikhuphula imali yokugibela namuhla,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IMEYA kaMasipala waseMfolozi iKhansela uXolani Bhengu nethimba lezinhlekelele behlola umonakalo odalwe yisiphepho KwaMbonambi, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal SISHIYE kukhalwa isishingishane sesiphepho esihlasele ku-ward 7, u-8, u-9 no-17 ngeSonto kusihlwa endaweni yaseNtuzuma naseMvazane, KwaMbonambi, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba kuvele ukuthi sishaye kwezwela emizini ebalelwa ku-70 ecekeleke phansi. IMeya yakuMasipala waseMfolozi, iKhansela uXolani Bhengu, yithimba lezinhlekelele kulo Masipala nomholi waku-ward 17 iKhansela uWiseman Njoko - bahambele kule ndawo ukuyohlola umonakalo owenzekele ukubheka ukuthi ungalungiseka kanjani. IMEYA kaMasipala waseMfolozi iKhansela uXolani Bhengu ehlola umonakalo odalwe yisiphepho KwaMbonambi, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal UBhengu udlulise amazwi enduduzo emndenini ethintekile kulesi simo, wase edalula nokuthi ithimba lezinhlekelele lizoqoqelela umbiko ogcwele ngomonakalo owenzekile, bese udluliselwa eMinyangweni efanele ukuthi kulungiswe lesi simo ngokushesha. “Kanti futhi sesibabikelile nabe-Eskom ukuthi basisize ukulungisa isimo sikagesi endaweni njengoba lo monakalo ukhinyabeze ukusebenza kogesi, futhi sinxusa nabanye abantu ukuthi bafake isandla kule mindeni ekhinyabezekile sibe sisalinde usizo olufanele,” kusho yena.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto okutholakale kuyo umsolwa edindilizile Utholakale edindilizilw emotweni umsolwa  ozilimaze ehlomisa iziqhumane ngesikhathi kugetshengwa imali enkabeni yedolobha laseKranskop ngoMsombuluko, 13 Ephreli 2026. Lo mlisa utholakale eshonile emotweni ebisetshenziswa ebugebengwini emgwaqeni owubhuqu ngaseTugela River, obheke eNkandla ngoLwesibili, 14 Ephreli 2026. Imoto yemali ibanjwe ntambama kwathathwa imali engadalulwanga kanti onogada abathathu kubikwa ukuthi baphucwe izibhamu. Kubikwa ukuthi kuphinde kwadunwa izimoto ezine ezisetshenziswe abasolwa ukubalekela. Abasolwa baphinde badubula bebhekise esiteshini samaphoyisa ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi, nokho alikho iphoyisa noma ilungu elilimale. Umkhankaso wokuthungatha abanye abasolwa, okukholakala ukuthi okungenani bangu-12, uyaqhubeka.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Isiphithiphithi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana uVusi Nova ezingcwaba UVusi Nova, ucasule abalandeli bakhe bebezibuza ukuthi kazi abaphuthelwa yini isimemezelo sokushona kwakhe ngesikhathi bebona ama-video ezungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ebonakalisa umngcwabo wakhe. Okuthuse abaningi ukubona imibhalo yenkampani yakwaCebolethu iyingxenye yalo mngcwbo, kodwa kwehle amaphaphu sekucaca kubantu cha akufiwe, kodwa lo mculi uqopha ivideo. Kubikwa ukuthi konke lokhu bekwenzelwa ingoma azoyidedela ethi, "Lapho Ngifa," ekhuluma ngendlela afuna ukungcwatshwa ngayo. Indlela eqoshwe ngayo ikhalisa abaningi ngoba kunezithombe zakhe, abangani bakhe ababonakala bekhala, bephethe ibhokisi lakhe lomngcwabo kukhona nomngani wakhe omkhulu uMoshe Ndiki ongumethuli wezinhlelo obekhuluma kulo ngcwabo ngomngani wakhe. Abanye osaziwayo ababonakala kule vidiyo kubalwa abalingisi uLuthuli Dlamini, u-Anele Matoti, u-Ayanda Makayi nomlingisi u-Andile Nebulana, nabanye osaziwayo endimeni yezokungcebeleka. Lo mngcwabo uqoshwe emathuneni aseFourways Memorial Par, eyaziwa njengendawo yokuphumula yabantu abaqavile, okuhlanganisa namalungu omndeni wakwaMandela. Ukukhethwa kwendawo kwengeze uvalo kubantu bethi hawu akasekho ngempela, kodwa akukaze kuvele isimemezelo sokudlula kwakhe emhlabeni. Ngenkathi abanye abalandeli bencome isiqondiso sobuciko esinesibindi, abanye bakhuza umhlola wokudlala ngokufa. Ukuphawula kwabantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana: The Lord Of The Wings( Lisa) Arsenal Biggest Fan@WhyUfikelate·Apr 1 Hhaybo ngiphuthelwe yini? Sesidlala ngokufa? Ngathi engamthatha ngempela uNkulunkulu ngoba uyislima. yknipg@Yknip1·Apr 1Bayahlola oVusi ngempela, kuyacaca ukuthi amadlozi abo ajimile.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Bazongena bagamanxe emaphaketheni abashayeli uphethiloli unyuka ngo-R3 Sekuqinisekisiwe ukuthi uphethiloli uzokhuphuka ngamalini kusukela ngoLwesithathu ngomhla ka-1 Ephreli 2026. UMnyango wezimbiwa udalule ukuthi uphethroli uzonyuka mawala naphezu kokuhoxiswa kwentela ka-R3 okwesikhashana. Kusukela phakathi kwamabili, abashayeli bazokhokha lokhu okulandelayo: Ngemuva kwezinguquko ezizokwenzeka ngoLwesithathu, Ephreli 1, ilitha likaphethiloli i-95 Unleaded lizobiza u-R22.53 ezindaweni ezisogwini kanye no-R23.36 ezifundeni ezimaphakathi nezwe, lapho i-93 Unleaded izobiza u-R23.25. Intengo kadizili engu-50ppm izokhuphuka ifinyelele ku-R25.35 ogwini kube ngu-R26.11 eGauteng.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UWISEMAN Mncube uzolingisa indawo ephambili Emzini okungumdlalo omusha kwi-e.tv ISILOMO somlingisi waKwaZulu-Natal uWiseman Mncube, sikwabazolingisa indawo ephambili Emzini okungumdlalo ozoqala kwi-e.tv ngo-Ephreli 13. Lo mdlalo ozokhonjiswa njalo ngo-9 ebusuku phakathi nesonto, uzovala isikhala seSmoke and Mirrors ephelayo. UWiseman kuthiwa uzobe elingisa indawo yokuba yindodana kaKhabonina Qhubeka Emzini. Esikhangisweni, abanye abalingisi okuvele ukuthi bazobe belingisa ngoMuzi Mthabela, Dumisani Mbebe, Bokang Phelane, Lungelo Mathonsi, Motshabi Tyalele nabanye. UKHABONINA Qhubeka kwabazolingisa Emzini Lo mdlalo ubhalwe wuLoyiso Maqoma, oke wasebenza kwi-Mbewu: The Seed neSmoke and Mirrors. Omunye osebenze kwi-Smoke n Mirrors ozoba kulo mdlalo, nguZuko Nodada onguphrojusa omkhulu. Umdlalo uveza okwenzeka elokishini i-Alex, eGoli. Ukhuluma ngomndeni ohlonishwayo, onendawo yobumnandi ebizwa ngegama okuqanjwe ngalo umdlalo. Umndeni uzama ukuvikela umlando wawo njengoba unezimfihlo ngowakwenza ukuze uphumelele. I-Smoke and Mirrors ephelayo, igabe ngezinkakha zabalingisi okubalwa kuzo uMeshack Mavuso, Siyabonga Twala nezinye. Ingomunye wemidlalo lesi siteshi esimemezele ukuthi iyaphela. Eminye yi-Scandal! esidonse iminyaka kanjalo ne-House of Zwide, yomibili ezosongwa ngoJuni. Muva nje, lesi siteshi sishintshe izikhathi le midlalo edlala ngazo. Iqale nge-Kelders Van Geheime, esidlala ngo-7 ebusuku, nayo okulindeleke ukuthi iphele ngo-Agasti. I-House of Zwide eyayidlala ngo-7, isingena ngo-7.30 esikhaleni se-Scandal! esingena ngo-8. Kulandela Isitha ngo-8.30.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ubuhle nobukhazikhazi   uKhuli Chana noLamiez bebopha elikasofa silahlane Umgubho womshado kaLamiez Holworthy kanye noKhuli Chana kanokusho wezinsuku ezintathu uyaqhubeka eMahikeng. Ngemuva kweminyaka yokulungiselela nokuhlelela usuku olukhulu, uLamiez Holworthy noKhuli Chana bagcine bebophe ifindo likasofa silahlane kule mpelasonto. Lezi zihlabani zomculo ezidume umhlaba wonke okwamanje ziphakathi komgubho womshado oyimfihlo obanjelwe osaziwayo, abangani nezihlobo, oqale ngoLwesihlanu, 10 April, kanti uzosongwa ngeSonto. UKhuli noLamiez baqala ukuthandana ngo-2018 futhi bahlala kafushane ngaphambi kokuba uKhuli akhokhele ilobolo mhlaka 2 Novemba 2019. Kuthiwa izinhlelo zomshado zenziwe esithe ukuze uzoba sezingeni eliphezulu. Kumenywe kuphela nabangani abasondelene nabo, umndeni, kanye nedlanzana losaziwayo. Le mikhosi kuthiwa ayilona neze ihaba, kodwa kuhlelwe umshado wesintu owenziwe ngesimanje, ubukhazikhazi, nokugqama kwesiginesha yabashadikazi. ULamiez noKhuli, ogamalakhe langempela, uKhulane Morule, sekunesikhathi eside beyizithandani ezithandwa kakhulu eMzansi, ezaziwa ngokusebenza kwazo ngokuzinikela nokubonisa uthando emphakathini. Indaba yabo yothando yaqala ukunakeka kubalandeli lapho bephumela obala ngobudlelwano babo eminyakeni embalwa edlule, ngokushesha baba yizona zithandani okukhulunywa ngazo kakhulu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Naphezu kokuhlala ndawonye bengashadile ngokusemthethweni kuze kube manje, lo bebengenawo amahloni okubonisa impilo abo ndawonye, ​​baze wamukela ingane yabo yokuqala ngo-2023, into uLamiez ayithatha njengesikhathi senjabulo enkulu empilweni yakhe. Ngokuhamba kweminyaka, baye bamelana nokuhlolwa komphakathi, amahlebezi, nezingcindezi zodumo, kodwa bahlala beqinile, bevame ukuncomana ezingxoxweni nasekuthunyelweni kwe-inthanethi. UKhuli Chana, oyingqalabutho ku-hip hop yaseNingizimu Afrika, kanti no-Lamiez, u-DJ othandekayo nomsakazi, bobabili bajabulele imisebenzi ephumelelayo ngenkathi besekelana. Umshado wabo ibonakale njengokuhlanganiswa kwemihlaba emibili emikhulu kwezikaqedisizungu. Manje, ngemva kweminyaka yokuthandana ngokuzinikela ngaphandle kwezifungo ezisemthethweni, sebenqume ukuqinisa uthando lwawo phambi kwezihlobo abangani abasondelene nabo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNOBHALA jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula Image: Facebook/ MyANC AZONIKWA umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku eziyishumi, amalungu e-ANC anobulungu be-SACP ukuba acacise ukuthi azokhankasela liphi iqembu okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo njengoba womabili la madlelandawonye ezolungenela ukhetho. Unobhala jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, uthe azozifaka obishini amalungu azokhetha ukungayiphenduli incwadi yakhe. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba, izolo. UMbalula uthe uzobhalela wonke amalungu e-ANC incwadi ngoLwesine, lapho ezowacela khona ukuthi acacise ukuthi azohamba naliphi iqembu. "Amalungu e-ANC kufanele aphendule zingakapheli izinsuku eziyishumi. Uma kukhona abazokhetha ukungayiphenduli incwadi, baqoke ukukhankasela iSACP, bazoba nenkinga. Imigomo ye-ANC icacile ukuthi awukwazi ukukhankasela iqembu elibanga ne-ANC okhethweni." Kunenqwaba yabaholi be-SACP abanezikhundla kuhulumeni okubalwa kubo uNgqongqoshe wezeSayensi nezobuChwepheshe, uDkt Blade Nzimande, uNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, noNdunankulu waseLimpopo, uDkt Phophi Ramathuba. UMbalula uthe ngeke amalungu e-ANC aphoqwe ukuthi asule ekubeni amalungu eSACP. "Akukhona ukuthi silwa ne-SACP, into esiyenzayo wukuvikela i-ANC. Asinankinga nabantu abanobulungu be-SACP kodwa awukwazi ukukhankasela lezi zinhlangano zombili. Kufanele ukhethe iqembu elilodwa ozolikhankasela. Abanye bavele sebekhethile. Ngeke baxoshwe abantu abangamalungu e-SACP." UMbalula uthe abanalo itwetwe lokuthi ukungenela kweSACP ukhetho kungase kwenze ukuthi i-ANC ingenzi kahle okhethweni. Uthe ukungenela kweSACP ukhetho, ngeke kufane nokuvumbuka kweqembu eliholwa owayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, iMKP. "Le nto ayifani nekaZuma.EkaZuma yayifana nomlilo wequbula, owavuka singawulindele. I-SACP yasitshela ukuthi izongenela ukhetho. Sebesithathile isinqumo, ayikho into esingayenza ngalokho. Sizohlangana nabo okhethweni." UMbalula uthe sebeluqalile uhlelo lokuqoka abazomela i-ANC okhethweni oluzayo. "Amakhansela awenza kahle umsebenzi wawo sinethemba lokuthi azophinde akhethwe. Ngalena kwalokho sinethemba lokuthi kulo nyaka, sizothola amakhansela azosebenza ngokuzikhandla ukwedlula lawa esinawo njengamanje." Uthe uhlelo lokuqoka abazoba yizimeya bazoluphothula ngoJuni. UMbalula uthe bazokwenza okungajwayelekile kulo nyaka njengoba behlela ukuthi  abazophakanyiselwa kwesobumeya, basheshe bathathe izintambo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UZIME wakuleli uZozibini Tunzi ungomunye wabethuli abasha bohlelo iTop Billing INTOKAZI yakuleli eyathatha isicoco sikaMiss SA yaphinde yakhala yemuka nesikaMiss Universe, uZozibini Tunzi, ingomunye wabethuli abasha bohlelo iTop Billing, ekhuza ibuya kwiS3 ekupheleni kwale nyanga. Lolu hlelo obeselunyamalele minyaka, lubuya kulesi siteshi nalapho luzokhombisa khona imizi nemicimbi esezingeni eliphezulu. Le ntokazi egqame kwabaningi ithatha lezi zicoco, ayiyona umafikizolo kwezethelevishini njengoba isike yabonakala ilingisa efilimini yaphesheya kwezilwandle eyaqoshwa kuleli iThe Woman King neBad Influencer eyayikhonjiswa kwiNetflix. UZozi uthe kuye leli yithuba eliyingqayizivele ngoba ukuba kulolu hlelo kusho lukhulu - yinto akade ayilindela. "Kuningi okusha okusazovela ngohlelo. Kusekhona okuningi okuzolandela nokuzohluka endleleni uhlelo obelwaziwa ngayo phambilini," kuchaza yena. Kulolu hlelo kubuya izinkakha ezake zalwethula okukhona kuzo uDkt Michael Mol, Basetsana Kumalo, Jonathan Boynton-Lee, Dkt Fez Mkhize noRyle De Morny. Kubethuli abasha abazoqala ukubonakala kulo kubalwa uBryoni Govender, Arno Greeff noSine Mpulu. Ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuphendulwe ihlaya ezinkundleni zokuxhmana ngokuthi kumele baphenyisiswe abazobonakala beveza imizi yabo esezingeni eliphezulu, kwathiwa inkampani eqoqa intela i-SARS neKhomishini kaMadlanga, kumele bavule amehlo babophe bonke abazovela kulona. UPatience Stevens ongumqondisi enkampanini iCardova Productions, eqopha lolu hlelo, uthe bajabule ngokuthi ekugcineni abantu bakuleli bazophinda balubone. "Kulolu hlelo kusuke kukhonjiswa izindlela ezehlukene abantu abasuke beqhakambisa ngazo izinto abanazo. Ngakho ukulubuyisa manje kube yisikhathi esikahle njengoba sisesikhathini lapho kubungazwa ngezindlela ezihlukene izindaba esinazo kuleli, ngakho siyajabula. Sizoqhubeka ukuveza obekujwayelekile kulo kodwa ngendlela entsha, ezojatshulelwa ababukeli balo manje, abanye abangakaze balubone phambilini," kusho uPatience. UDichaba Phalatse wakwaSABC uthe ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuyindlela efana nesiko yokukhombisa izinhlelo zakuleli ezinomlando. Uthe kuningi abantu abazokubona, okuzobafundisa, kubavule amehlo. Uphethe ngokuthi ukubuyisa lolu hlelo yisinqumo abangazisoli ngaso.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: South Africa - Pretoria - 20 March 2026. Madlanga Commission of Inquiry witness USergeant Fannie Nkosi INGXENYE enkulu yomholo wephoyisa elisolwa enkohlakalweni, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, iphelela ekukhokheleni umuzi walo kanokusho. UNkosi kuvele ukuthi unomuzi kaR1.5 million, awukhokhela u-R7 500 njalo ngenyanga. UNkosi uhola u-R16 500 ngenyanga. Le mininingwane uyinekele inkantolo ngesikhathi ecela ibheyili eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, izolo. UNkosi akazange aveze ukuthi ikhona yini enye imali ayithola eceleni ngaphandle komholo. Usolwa ngokusondelana kanye nokwamukela imali kosomabhizinisi ababhekene namacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala, noMnuz Katiso 'KT' Molefe. UNkosi uboshelwe icala lokuphula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu, ukutholakala nezinhlamvu ezingekho emthethweni, ukutholakala namadokodo amacala asavalwa, ukutholakala neziqhumane kanye nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Uwaphikile wonke amacala abekwa wona, wasola uMbuso ngokumbophela amanqina enyathi. "Ngiyawaphika wonke amacala engibekwa wona. Zonke izibhamu engatholwa nazo zazisesisefweni. Kungamampunge ukuthi ezinye izibhamu zatholwa embhedeni." Encwadini efungelwe, uNkosi uthe izinhlamvu atholwa nazo yizinhlamvu azinikwa emsebenzini. "Awukho umthetho othi kufanele ngibuyisele emuva zonke izinhlamvu engazinikwa wumqashi uma ngimiswa emsebenzini. Ngesikhathi ngimiswa emsebenzini, angitshelwanga ukuthi angibuyise izinhlamvu. Ngatshelwa ukuthi angibuyise isibhamu nekhadi lokungena emsebenzini. Bekunzima ukuthi ngibuyisele izinhlamvu emuva ngoba ngesikhathi ngimiswa emsebenzini, ngatshelwa ukuthi angingalubhadi lapho ngisebenzela khona." Amadokodo atholwa nawo uthe kwakufanele abe kuye ngoba uyingxenye yethimba eliphenya amacala okubanjwa inkunzi kwezimoto ezithutha imali. Ukuphikile ukuthi watholwa nesiqhumane. UMbuso uthe ufuna uNkosi anganikwa ibheyili wathi angase abalekele icala uma ededelwa. UMbuso uthe uNkosi uyingozi ngenxa yokuthi usebenzisana nemigulukudu. Ukulalelwa kwesicelo sebheyili kuhlehliselwe uMsombuluko. Khonamanjalo kuhlehlele isonto elizayo ukulalelwa kwesicelo sebheyili, somlisa osolwa ngokubulala ufakazi owethula ubufakazi ngokuyimfihlo kwikhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa wuKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. UMnuz Matipandile Sotheni, uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBrakpan izolo, lapho ebhekene khona necala lokubulala uMnuz Marius Van Der Merwe. Ukulalelwa kwesicelo sakhe sebheyili kuhlehliselwe u-Ephreli 24.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-ALBERT Mazibuko odlule emhlabeni ngeSonto emuva kokugula UMFELANDAWONYE wezinyunyana zamaciko KwaZulu-Natal, iCultural and Creative Industries Federation of South Africa (Ccifsa), usuphakamise ukuthi ihlonishwe ngomngcwabo osezingeni lesifundazwe, ingwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, edlule emhlabeni ngeSonto emuva kokugula. UMazibuko (77), ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini emuva kokuxinwa wukugula. Ushona nje, bese kunguyena yedwa obeneminyaka eqenjini njengoba ajoyina ngo-1969. USihlalo weCcifsa eKZN, uThokozani "T'zozo" Zulu, uthe ukudlula emhlabeni kukaMazibuko kubalimazile njengoba bebefunda lukhulu kuye njengamaciko. "Ukuba khona kweMambazo kuthathe iKZN neNingizimu Afrika kwayigqamisa emhlabeni jikelele. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi obaba uMazibuko bayizingqalabutho ezawina amaGrammy hhayi kanye, hhayi kabili, hhayi kathathu kodwa kahlanu. Silahlekelwe kakhulu njengamaciko. Abafowethu beMambazo abalahlekelwe bodwa kodwa silahlekelwe sonke ngoba besibukela kakhulu kubaba nozakwabo," kusho uT'zozo. Uthe ngenxa yamagalelo akhe bebebona kufanele ukuthi ahlonishwe ngomngcwabo kahulumeni. "Siyafisa ukuthi uNdunankulu waseKZN, akuhloniphe ukufihlwa kwakhe kube nesithunzi abekwe ngokusezingeni lesifundazwe," kubeka uT'zozo. Okhulumela uNdunankulu,uThami Ntuli, uMnuz Bongani Gina, uthe umndeni kumele ubhalele ihhovisi likandunankulu incwadi, ubeke ukuthi ungajabula uma ehlonishwa ngomngcwabo kahulumeni ngenxa yamava akhe. "UNdunankulu uzobe esethatha incwadi abhalele umengameli wezwe asho ukuthi njengeKZN silahlekelwe yingqalabutho ekanje futhi nathi njengesifundazwe sibona kufanele ukuthi ihlonishwe ngomngcwabo kahulumeni," kusho uGina. Okhulumela iMambazo, uXolani Majozi, uthe bazolinda uMphathiswa wezobuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula, ukuthi ahlanganise amehlo nomndeni kusasa bese bethola umhlahlandlela. "Okwamanje ayikho inkulumo enjalo esike yavela ngoba besilinde kufike umphathiswa, mhlawumbe kube wuye ophakamisayo ngokubona kwakhe," kusho uMajozi. UMajozi ubuye waqinisekisa ukuthi usuku lomngcwabo kuzoba wu-Ephreli 18, lapho edabuka khona e-Estcourt. Uthe indawo isazoqinisekiswa. Uphinde wachaza nangegama lokuqala likaMazibuko, okunguMdletshe. "Empeleni igama lakhe wuMudliwetshe kodwa kwathi uma eya eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya kwathiwa ayikho into enjalo, unguMdletshe." Uphethe ngokubonga imiyalezo yenduduzo elokhu ingena ilakanyana. "Iyasiduduza kakhulu imiyalezo. Kade ngibuka nje imiyalezo engenayo futhi baningi abantu abakhombisa ukuzwelana kakhulu nomndeni. Ngisho abezindaba basemazweni omhlaba bayabika," kusho uMajozi.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULONDIE London neMzansi Magic asebememezele izindaba zokuza kohlelo ngempilo yakhe Image: Image: Instagram @londie_london_official KULINDELEKE ukuthi luqale maduzane uhlelo oluzophendula imibuzo abantu abakade baba nayo, ngentokazi yaKwaNongoma kodwa ezinze eGoli, uLondie London. ULondie neMzansi Magic bamemezele ukuthi kungekudala kuzoqala uhlelo ngempilo yale ntokazi oluthi Life with Londi. Kulolu hlelo, baveze kancane ukuthi kuzophenduleka imibuzo ehlukene ngezinto ebezilokhu zivela ngale ntokazi, ezinkundleni nakwezinye izinhlelo uLondie ake aba yingxenye yazo. Le ntokazi ike yabonakala ezinhlelweni okukhona kuzo i-The Real Housewives of Durban, ne-The Real Housewives Ultimate Girls Trip: South Africa. ULondie uthe usekubheke ngabomvu ukuthi abalandeli bakhe babone ukuthi ubaphatheleni ohlelweni oluthinta yena ngqo. "Okwamanje yize umuntu engeke aveze okuningi kodwa ngithi abantu abangithandayo abalindele okuningi, okunye abakade bezibuza ngami, uhlelo luyeza kuMzansi Magic futhi luzocacisa konke abafuna ukukwazi ngempilo yami yangasese, umculo nokunye okuningi," kusho uLondie ngamafuphi. Le ntokazi ikhuluma kanjena nje, isanda kuba sematheni njengoba ngesonto eledlule, igxekwe abaningi ikhuluma kabi ngomzimba wenye intokazi ezakhele igama ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uDineo Moloisane. Abaningi bamgxekile uLondie ngokukhuluma kabi ngomunye wesifazane, wagcina exolisile ngamazwi awakhulumile, wathi uyalibona iphutha lakhe. Kodwa ukukhuluma akuphelanga njengoba uDineo ephinde waveza ukuthi uLondie uyamsongela enkundleni yokuxhumana uWhatsApp, okuyinto uLondie ayiphikile wathi ingamanga. Esitatimendeni asikhiphile, uLondie uthe inombolo okuthiwa isetshenziswa uyena ukuthumela le miyalezo, akuseyona ayisebenzisayo. “Ngifuna ukukubeka ngikucacise ukuthi lokhu osekuvela manje kokuthi ngithumelela le ntokazi imiyalezo yokuyisabisa, akulona iqiniso. Mina Londie angikaze ngithumele imiyalezo yokusabisa muntu. Okunye engifuna ukukucacisa, ngiyanxusa ukuthi akekho umuntu oseke waxhumana nami ngalezi zinsolo futhi anginazo nami izinombolo zomuntu okuthiwa ngiyamsabisa," kusho uLondi kulesi sitatimende. Laba kuvela ukuthi impi yabo imayelana nombango wesoka.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ISIKOLE iMaphephetha High, eMatata, eNanda, sithungelwe ngomlilo BUSADIDEKILE ubuholi besikole imaphephetha High, ematata, enanda, kulandela isigameko sokungqongqiswa kwenye ingxenye yaso ngolwesihlanu. Emlilweni okuthiwa ubonwe omakhelwane ezintatha, kushiswe ihhovisi likathishanhloko, elephini lakhe, amane ama-head of department nekilasi elilodwa elincikene nompheme okungqongqiswe imoto ebisetshenziswa abafundi abenza izifundo zokukhenikha. Usihlalo wesigungu sesikole, umnuz Mzokhona Khumalo, uthe basashayisana ngamakhanda ngokuthi ubani lo obenesifiso sokucekela phansi isikole. “Kusobala ukuthi umlilo uthungelwe umuntu futhi sisola ukuthi ubesebenzisa ibhomu likaphethroli. Okusididayo ukuthi ukwenze lokhu nganhlosoni ngoba azikho izinxushunxushu esikoleni. Othisha bonke bayezwana, iSGB nayo iyezwana. Akukho muntu onanxa nomunye,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe kuningi okumqoka okubalahlekele ngaphakathi emagunjini ashisiwe. Phakathi kwakho ubale ama-riphothi abafundi abequkethe imiphumela yabo yokuphela kwesigaba sokuqala sonyaka, athe bebezonikwa wona maduze. Uphinde wabala nemishini emithathu yokufothokhopha, amaphepha abalulekile abafundi, izincwadi kanjalo nazo zonke ezinye izinsizakusebenza ezisetshenziswa othisha uma befundisa. “Sife olwembiza futhi asikazi nokuthi izothini indlela eya phambili. Abahloli bafikile ngosuku lwesigameko, bafike babuka umonakalo, babhala phansi abakubonile. Thina sizoba nomhlangano sodwa kusasa (esho namuhla) bese sibiza owabazali bonke maduze,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe ukufunda nokufundisa akukazoqhubeka ngoba umonakalo ucekele phansi zonke izinsizakusebenza zawo wonke amabanga esikole. Udalule ukuthi uthole ucingo lumbizela esigamekweni ngo-5:45 ekuseni, wathatha imizuzu engu-15 ukuthi afike khona. Uthe ufike kukhombisa ukuthi imoto isishe yangqongqa kanti kulawa amanye amahhovisi, umlilo ubusha ngaphakathi ungakaphumeli ngaphandle. Umthombo weSolezwe, uthe kwenzeka lesi sigameko nje, kunesonto kukhishwe wonke amafasitela emakilasini angomahamba nendlwana esikoleni. Uveze ukuthi ngasekuqaleni konyaka, kukhona umuntu owahamba wathwebula isikole, maqede wakhenikha isithombe nge-Artificial Interligence (AI), sakhombisa isikole sisha, wase esinameka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. “Kwathi uma kugijinywa kuyiwa esikoleni, kwatholakala ukuthi asinalutho. Akuzange kunakwe lutho ngaleso sikhathi kodwa sekuyacaca manje ukuthi leso senzo sasixoxa indaba,” kusho umthombo, othe ayinuki ingosiwe. Uphinde wadalula eyokuthi kukhona umoya wokudayiswa kwezikhala zokufundisa kulesi sikole, okuthiwa sinezikhala zothisha ezimbili. Nokho uthe akekho ofuna ukuphumela obala ngaleyo ndaba, okusolakala ukuthi ingahle ibe yisizathu sokushiswa kwesikole. AboMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal - kweminye imithombo yabezindaba - baveze ukuthi banalo ulwazi ngesigameko, bathi sithikameze ukufunda nokufundisa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo ku-Albert Mazibuko enkonzweni yomngcwabo wakhe eMtshezi High, ngoMgqibelo ekuseni UZOGCINWA ngencwadi nangeqophamlando, umlando wengwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, eshone emasontweni amabili adlule, emuva kokugula isikhashana. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela eThekwini, lapho ehlinzwe khona. Udlule emhlabeni esethathe umhlalaphansi ekunandiseni neqembu, ubeseba khona kuphela uma lizilolonga. NgoMgqibelo ekuseni, ufihlelwe emathuneni asekhaya eMtshezi, kwase kuqhubeka inkonzo enkundleni yemidlalo eMtshezi High. Lokhu kuye ngokwesifiso sakhe nokuthi endaweni kungcwatshwa engakashayi u-11 ekuseni, ngokusho kwemenenja yeMambazo, uXolani Majozi. UMajozi uthe uMazibuko bazomkhumbula ngokukhipha incwadi ekhuluma ngomlando wakhe. “Kuningi esikuqophile esaphila, kuzokwazi ukuthi kube nomthelela omuhle ekuhlanganiseni iqophamlando esizolenza,” kusho uMajozi. Ubonge nohulumeni wesifundazwe nokazwelonke ngokufaka isandla ezindlekweni zomngcwabo. “Uma umngcwabo kungowomndeni nomakhelwane, kuye kungabi nzima ukuwuthwala kodwa uma sekuzofika abantu abaningi, ngoba abantu abebesemngcwabeni bebalelwa ku-2 000, kuye kube nengcindezi emndenini ngezindleko. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal oholwa ubaba u(Thami) Ntuli ukwazile ukuthi usondele ubheke ukuthi umndeni yikuphi la odinga ngakhona, wase uyalekelela. NoMnyango kazwelonke wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko usondelile wanikela ukuze umcimbi ube sezingeni. Senelisekile ngokwesekwa kuhulumeni nasemphakathini,” kusho uMajozi. Enkonzweni bekukhona uNtuli, iPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezemiSebenzi yoMphakathi neNgqalasizinda uMnuz Sihle Zikalala, uMqondisi Jikelele woMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNkk Stella Khumalo, iMeya kaMasipala Inkosi Langalibalele, uMnuz Mduduzi Myeza, owayenguNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, uMnuz Zizi Kodwa nabanye. Umndeni ududuzwe ngomculo yiMambazo eyacela ukuthi uMazibuko angafihlwa ingakabuyi e-United States of America (USA), lapho eyayinomjikelezo khona, iqembu laseSwatini iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors, Abanqobi, Thee Legacy nabanye. Izikhulumi bezibabaza inhlonipho nokuzithoba kukaMazibuko oshiye emhlabeni umkakhe uBongiwe Mazibuko, izingane nabazukulu.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzovela enkantolo ngoLwesibili obulale i-ex yentombi yakhe. Isithembu somjolo obandakanya izaguga endaweni yaseMthozela, e-Eastern Cape, uphele ngokufa kowesilisa, 78, ngesikhathi eshaywa ebulawa yisoka le-ex yakhe eneminyaka engu-65 ubudala ngoLwesihlanu. Imininingwane emaphoyiseni iveze ukuthi ikhehla elineminyaka engu-78 ubudala belisemzini walo lihleli nowayeyintombi yalo (65) bephuza utshwala, ngesikhathi konakala umcimbi ngokufika kwesoka lalona wesifazane (59). Kuthiwa isoka lifike live nolaka lashaya umufi (78) ngenduku maqede lamgwaza amanxeba amaningi emzimbeni. Umufi kuthiwa useshonile endaweni yesigameko. Umsolwa uboshwe ngemuva kweswhlo, kanti uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseQumbu ngoLwesibili, ngecala lokubulala.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abasolwa ababili abebefunelwa amacala okubulala. La madoda amataniswa emacaleni amabili okubulala ahlukene enzeke ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka. Kuthiwa amaphoyisa alandele umkhondo wabasolwa emzini oseMhlasini, okuthe uma efika kwaduma izulu lezandla. Kutholakale izibhamu ezimbili endaweni yesigameko.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ISILO uMisuZulu kaZwelithini Image: SIPHAMANDLA MBHELE | KZN DSAC SELUPHINDE lwavutshelwa kabusha uthuthuva lombango wesihlalo sobukhosi bukaZulu, obekucatshangwa ukuthi usuphelile kulandela ukuvumbuka kwenselelo ephonswa uMntwana uMbonisi kaBhekuzulu, ofuna iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ibuyekeze isinqumo esavuna ubukhosi beSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini. Ukuvuswa kwaleli cala, kubuyisela iNdlunkulu kwesinye isibindolo sempicabadala yomdonsiswano ngeSihlalo, oklaye abaNtwana bayinhlakanhlaka esabekayo. UMntwana uMbonisi kanye nabanye abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu, bafuna ukuthi iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, iguqule isinqumo sayo esivuna isinqumo sikaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, sokuvuma ukuqokwa kweSilo. INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo yachitha isicelo sikaMntwana uMbonisi nabanye sokuba baphonsele inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe, esivuna uRamaphosa, ngoFebhuwari. Ngesikhathi kuphuma lesi sinqumo, abaningi babezitshela ukuthi sebefike kwangqingetshe labo abaphikisa ukuqokwa kweSilo njengoba iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ingeyokugcina. Manje uMntwana uMbonisi nahambisana nabo, bafuna ukuthi inkantolo ibavumele ukuthi baphonsele inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe. Encwadini efungelwe, uMntwana uMbonisi usayibhedlile indaba yokuthi akuzange kulandelwe imigomo ngesikhathi kuhlonzwa iSilo. "URamaphosa kwakungafanele avume ukuqokwa kweSilo ngoba wayazi ukuthi kunombango wesihlalo sobukhosi. Kwakunezikhalazo ngesikhathi uRamaphosa evuma ukuqokwa kweSilo." UMntwana uMbonisi uthe kuningi okuzokonakala uma bengagcina bengavunyelwanga ukuthi benze izethulo. "Lana sikhuluma ngodaba olubalulekile oluthinta isizwe esikhulu. Abantu babona iNkantolo eNkulu ePitoli ichitha isinqumo sikaRamaphosa sokuvuma ukuqokwa kweSilo, baphinde babona iNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe ivuna uRamaphosa. Manje abantu bafuna ukubona isiphetho." Uthe: "UMntwana uMbonisi uwumfowabo weSilo esakhothama, uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. UMntwana uMbonisi weseka uMntwana uBuzabazi Mbuzeli kaZwelithini embangweni wesihlalo." Phakathi kwabantwana abafake isicelo kukhona abaNtwana beSilo sakwaKhethomthandayo,  uMathuba, Vulindlela, Mxolisi noMntwana uLindiwe. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe bebenethemba lokuthi isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, sawuqeda umbango wesihlalo sobukhosi. "Kuyajabhisa ngoba imibango kade yayiba khona endlunkulu, kwaze kwaba khona lapho kubulawana khona. Njengoba ubukhosi busekhona namanje, kusho khona ukuthi kwakubuye kufike isikhathi lapho kuhlalwa phansi, kuxoxiswane. Iyangixaka lena yabafowethu abangaboni ukuthi sekufanele kuhlalwe phansi kuxoxiswane." UMntwana uThulani uthe okumdumaza kakhulu ukuhamba phambili kukaMntwana uMbonisi kulabo abaphikisa ukuqokwa kweSilo. "Kubi uma yenziwa uMntwana uMbonisi ngoba uyena omdala, okufanele ngabe uhlanganisa umndeni. IMbube ikhathazekile, kufanele iwafake amaphepha. Kusobala ukuthi kuzohlale kunombango. Kuyishwa lokhu okwenzekayo." Ungoti wezomthetho waseDonda Attorneys, uMnuz Melusi Xulu, uthe akuvamile ukuthi kube khona abantu abaphonsela inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. "Imvamisa uma kunesinqumo esikhishwa iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, esiphikisa isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe, kusuke sekuqediwe. Kodwa uma kunobufakazi obusha noma okubalulekile emthethweni njengoba kubhaliwe emaphepheni kaMntwana uMbonisi, kuyenzeka ukuthi kubuye kubhekisiswe. Sekuyocaca enkantolo ngamathuba okuthi aphumelele." UXulu uthe okukhalisa kakhulu uMntwana uMbonisi ukuthi iNdlunkulu ayizange inikwe ithuba lokuthi ihlonze ozongena esihlalweni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USIPHO Mbatha odume ngelikaSgqemeza oseveze olunye uhlangothi ngokuhamba kwakhe emsakazweni Ukhozi FM USIPHO Mbatha obenza uhlelo lwasekuseni phakathi nezinsuku emsakazweni Ukhozi FM, useveze ukuthi inkontileka yakhe ayivuselelwanga kulo nyaka, hhayi ukuthi uzicelele ukushiya. USgqemeza ukusho lokhu esitatimendeni asikhiphe ngoLwesibili emini, ngemuva kokwenza uhlelo lwakhe lokugcina kulo msakazo. Uthe kummangazile ukubona kwabezindaba ukuthi ubefuna ukushintsha uhlelo alwenzayo ngenxa yomsebenzi wobufundisi. Kodwa uthe abaphathi abayingenanga eyokuvuselela inkontileka yakhe. "Ngize ngaxhumana nezikhulu eziphezulu ngendlela udaba lwenkontileka yami olusingathwe  ngayo. Okungimangazayo ukubona kwabezindaba kuthiwa ngizicelele ukuhamba okungalona iqiniso. Ngingasho nje ukuthi ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka yami, kukhona okungahambanga kahle kukhona njengoba kwenzeka izinto engingaziqondi. Okwaholela ekutheni kuthathwe lesi sinqumo ikhona engikhala ngakho, yingakho ngaze ngatshela abaphathi e-SABC ngakho. Ngiyasihlonipha isinqumo abasithatha kodwa indlela okuhanjiswe ngayo iyona engingajabule ngayo," kusho uSipho. Uthe akazimisele ukuveza ukuthi kwenzakaleni njengoba ewuhlonipha umsakazo Ukhozi kanjalo ne-SABC. "Kuyihlazo elikhulu abakwenzile ukuthi baze bafike kulesi sinqumo kodwa ke ngizokhetha ukuthula yingakho ngingakukhulumi. Ngakho kuthe sesikhuluma siya phambili ngomsebenzi, ngagcina nginikwa olunye uhlelo, okuthe mina nomndeni wami uma sicubungula ngalo, sagcina sithathe isinqumo sokuthi ngishiye phansi. Angiyekanga ngoba ngifuna ukugxila emsebenzini wobufundisi, lokhu akulona iqiniso njengoba kuvela sengathi mina ngizicelele ukuhamba ukuze ngiyobhekana nalo msebenzi. Ngiyohlala ngiyihlonipha i-SABC noKhozi kodwa inkinga yami inabanye ezikhulwini ezikhona ezingaluphathanga kahle udaba lokuhamba kwami," kuchaza yena. Ube esebonga wonke umuntu omesekile kulo mkhakha wezokusakaza wathi, usavulelekile ukuthatha wonke amathuba azoqhamuka okusebenza. Kulo msakazo uSipho akuchithwanga yena kuphela njengoba kuhambe nabanye ozakwabo okukhona kubo uZeal Dladla, Ayanda Msweli, Sphongo Dladla, uMfundisi Lungisani Simelane, King Sfiso nabo abakhiphe izitatimende bebonga abalaleli balesi siteshi ngokubeseka.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Image: Oupa Mokoena/African News Agency(ANA) ULONGWE Twala, usephumele obala wanxusa ukuthi kungenelele uLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kanjalo neJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga, ukuze kuvele iqiniso ngokubulawa kukaSenzo Meyiwa. Usho kanje encwadini ebonwe yiSolezwe, elithole ngemithombo yalo ukuthi usanda kuyibhalela unina kaSenzo, uNkk Ntombifuthi Meyiwa. Kule ncwadi uLongwe ugcizelela eyokuthi yena akanasandla ekubulaweni kukaSenzo, nakuba kunukwa yena, ikakhulukazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. ULongwe uthe uNkk Meyiwa akazame ukuthola usizo kuMkhwanazi nakuMadlanga ngoba bayahlonishwa ngomsebenzi wabo. “Nginxusa ukuba ucindezele ukuthi ijaji, abameli, amaphoyisa kanjalo noMbuso, bakuvumele ukuthi ulalele inkulumo ephelele eqoshiwe lapho uBongani Ntanzi, egonyuluka khona phambi kweMantshi uVivienne Cronje,” kusho uLongwe. Uqhube wathi uNkk Meyiwa uma eselalela le nkulumo eqoshiwe, kufanele acele ukungayilaleli yedwa kodwa ayilalele noMkhwanazi noMadlanga. “Wena njengonina kaSenzo, kufanele uzizwele ukuthi wayekhuluma ngenkululeko noma wayengaphansi kwengcindezi,” kusho uLongwe. Ngo-Okthoba 2023, iJaji uRatha Mokgoatlheng lanquma ukuthi inkulumo eqoshiwe, ngeke yamukelwe njengobufakazi obuphathekayo enkantolo yomthetho. ULongwe uthe okuqukethwe kule nkulumo, yikho kanye okufanele kulalelwe uNkk Meyiwa, wathi kubalulekile ukuthi athole ubulungiswa ngokubulawa kwendodana yakhe. Ubuye wasola kakhulu umfowabo kaSenzo, uMnuz Sfiso Meyiwa kanjalo nabanye ngokuthi uma uNkk Meyiwa ezoqhubeka abalalele, akahlukene nomuntu ovimbela ubulungiswa ngomufi. Uthe ngesikhathi ijaji linquma ukuthi le nkulumo eqoshiwe ayingalalelwa enkantolo, uSfiso omunye wabantu abakhombisa ukukuthakasela lokho. “Zibuze umbuzo wokuthi uma labo abakukakile, okukhona kubo nendodana yakho, bethi balwela ubulungiswa, kungani bajabula uma ijaji linquma ukuthi ubufakazi obubalulekile kangaka bungamukelwa enkantolo? Kungani abantu abathi balwela ubulungiswa bebhiyozela ukufihlwa kobufakazi?” kusho uLongwe. Ethintwa uSfiso, uthe ubengakaze ayibone noma ezwe ngencwadi. Elinye ilungu lomndeni okuthiwa lihlala nonina kaMeyiwa kodwa elithintwe lingekho ekhaya, lithe nabo bebengakezwa lutho ngale ncwadi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: OBENGUSIGAXAMABHANDE emaphoyiseni kaMasipala weTheku, uMandlenkosi Gumbi ugwetshwe yiNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini izolo WEHLULEKILE ukuzibamba, wasikhihla isililo umndeni wowesilisa obengusigaxamabhande kaMasipala weTheku izolo, iNkantolo yesiFunda eThekwini imgixabeza ngeminyaka engu-45 ngecala lokubulala namabili okuzama ukubulala. Owesilisa, uMandlenkosi Gumbi (50), ugwetshwe ngecala lokudubula, abulale uMnuz Sanele Thembani (24) esigamekweni esenzeka emgwaqweni uM4 ngasePick n Pay Hyper, eDurban North ngo-Agasti 2023. Abomndeni kaGumbi bakhale baze bakhishelwa ngaphandle enkantolo. Ngokobufakazi bamaphoyisa, uGumbi wayeyingxenye yamaphoyisa ayenesivimbamgwaqo kule ndawo, kodwa ngokwalaba ababehamba ngemoto umufi athulela kuyo, kwakunengozi yomgwaqo. Kuthiwa umnikazi we-double cab, umufi ayehleli kuyo nabanye esikhenkeni, wanquma ukujika aphindele emuva ebona ezinye izimoto zijika, zibona ingozi. Kuthiwa yilapho uGumbi adubula khona kathathu, ebhekise evenini, inhlamvu yanemba uThembani. Imgweba izolo iMantshi, uNkk Sophie Reddy, ithe imnika iminyaka engu-15 ebhadla ejele ngecala lokubulala, engu-15 icala ngalinye, kwamabili okuzama ukubulala. Ithe lezi zigwebo uzozidonsa kanyekanye, yathi lokhu kwenza ibe ngu-15 iminyaka uGumbi azoyidonsa ngaphakathi. Inqume nokuthi akumfanele ukuthi aphinde aphathe isibhamu. Ngesikhathi endlalela isigwebo uNkk Reddy, usole uGumbi ngokusebenzisa kabi amandla akhe obuphoyisa, wathi wayengenza kangcono kakhulu ngesipiliyoni sakhe seminyaka engu-30, kunokukhetha ukudubula. “Wena waba yiphoyisa elazizwa lideleleka, lingahlonishwa wumnikazi wemoto, wabe ususebenzisa igunya lakho ngokuthi udubule. Wawungenza kangcono kunokuthi uphoqe umthetho ngendlela engalungile,” kusho uNkk Reddy. UNkk Reddy uwashaye indiva amaphuzu abekwe wummeli kaGumbi, uNksz Ncube, obezama ukuncenga inkantolo ukuthi imnike isigwebo esincane kunaleso esibekelwe abenze amacala afana nelenziwe uGumbi. Phakathi kwamaphuzu akhe uthe uGumbi obehlala eMlaza, ungowesilisa oseneminyaka engu-50, wathi ngesikhathi enza icala wayeneminyaka engu-47. Wathi akanazo izingane, akashadile, kodwa wuye onakelela unina osehola impesheni, aphinde anakekele izingane zikadadewabo ezintathu. Uphinde wabalula nokuthi emaphoyiseni kaMasipala weTheku wajoyina ngo-1997, kanti ubeqala ukwenza icala. UNkk Reddy uthe lezi akuzona izizathu ezibambekayo ezingenza ukuthi uGumbi athanjiselwe isigwebo, wathi kulaba ababalile ukuthi uyabanakekela, ayikho into ephathekayo eveza ukuthi bancike kuye ngokusemthethweni. Umshushisi woMbuso, uMnuz Celani Dludla ngesikhathi ecindezela ukuthi inkantolo ingagudluki nakancane esigwebeni esinikwa abasuke benze amacala afuze leli, uthe akukho lapho uGumbi ake wakhombisa khona ukuzisola kusaqulwa icala. “Okubonakele kuye ukukhombisa ukungazisoli lapho athe khona akakwamukeli ngokugcwele ukuthi wenze icala,” kusho uDludla othe okunye inkantolo okufanele izibuze imibuzo ngakho, yindlela ozakwabo ababezama ukumvikela ngayo." Uthe:“Umbuzo uthi ngabe bangaki abanye abantu ababalimazile, bakwazi ukuvikelana ngempumelelo. Lesi yisikhathi sokuthi inkantolo imnike isigwebo esizothumela umyalezo emphakathini, kuthi nalabo abahlale bekhala ngale ndlela yokuziphatha kwamaphoyisa, bagculiseke.” Uthe uphoxekile ngokuthi ngesikhathi kuqulwa icala, uGumbi wathi yena wayenza umsebenzi wakhe. “Ngesipiliyoni sakhe seminyaka ngeminyaka, kufanele ngabe wakwazi ukuzikhuza ngemigomo elawula ukusetshenziswa kwesibhamu, kunalokho wakhetha ukuqhubeka adubule,” usho kanje. Uphinde wagqamisa ukuthi njengoba umshayeli wemoto akhetha ukujika abuyele emuva, uGumbi wayengenaso isizathu sokudubula umuntu owayengumgibeli, owayengenzanga lutho. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi emva kophenyo lwangaphakathi emaphoyiseni, uGumbi akaxoshwanga kodwa wehliswa esikhundleni, wabekwa kwesingezansi, waqhubeka wasebenza, njengoba adedelwa ngebheyili kaR2 000 maphakathi no-2024, emva kokuboshwa kwakhe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUSINDA kwehlela phakathi koMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal nenhlangano ephakela izikole esifundazweni i-National School Nutrition Programme Service Providers, kulandela ukukhishwa ohlwini kwecala ebelifakwe ile nhlangano, mayelana nokumisa uhlelo lwabaphakela izikole. INkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu ikhiphe icala ohlwini lwamacala aphambi kwayo, ibe isiyalela abale nhlangano ukuthi bakhokhe izindleko zecala. UMnyango usamukele lesi sinqumo ngoba uthi uzoqhubeka nohlelo ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, usihlalo wenhlangano, uMnuz Lindani Matiwane, uthe bazosiphikisa isinqumo senkantolo. "Nakanjani sizosiphikisa isinqumo senkantolo ngoba asihambisani naso," usho kanje. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe bazobe belungisa ezinye zezinto ezithinta lolu hlelo, wathi uhlelo luyaqhubeka futhi bazimisele ukuthi lungaphazamiseki. "Sisemkhankasweni wokulungisa nokuqinisa ezinye zezinto okubalwa nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abenza lo msebenzi bakhokhelwa ngesikhathi. Asifuni kube nomfundi ozolamba nsuku zonke," usho kanje. Uthe bazimisele ukulandela yonke imigomo ethinta uhlelo, wathi lusiza ekwesekeni izinhlelo zokufunda nokufundisa. Inhlangano yabaphekela baphakele izikole yaya enkantolo iyokhala ngokungahambi kahle kohlelo ngesikhathi kuqokwa osonkontileka abasha abazophakela abafundi eminyakeni emithathu ezayo. Lolu hlelo laqala nyakenye kanti abasha kumele baqale ngoLwesithathu. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ngisho ezikoleni kunohlelo lokuqoka abazophekela abafundi kule minyaka emithathu ezayo. Le nhlangano ike yakhala ngokuphulwa kwemigomo njengoba uMnyango ujahe ukunqamula izinkontileka zabaphakayo ekubeni lungaphothuliwe uhlelo oluthinta izikhalazo. Isike yakhala futhi nangokuphuza ukukhokhelwa ngesikhathi kosonkontileka abenza lo msebenzi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INGAPHANDLE lomqulu wezolimi obhalwe wuMnuz Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, ozosiza abafundi basemabangeni emfundo aphansi ukuqonda amagama esiNgisi EZIKOLENI zasemakhaya kunenkinga yezingane ezithwala kanzima ezifundweni ezithile, kungekhona ukuthi azikuqondi ezikufundiswayo - kepha ngenxa yokuthi aziwaqondi amagama athile emibuzweni ukuthi aqonde ukuthini ngesiZulu. Usho kanjalo uMnuz Nhlanzeko Ngwenya waseMasundwini, KwaNongoma, elandisa ngomcabango wombono wakhe wosomqulu wamagama esiNgisi ahunyushelwe esiZulwini osihloko sithi ALL Action Assessment Verbs: for English First Additional Language and Mathematical Terminology Lists. Engxoxweni yakhe neSolezwe ngalo mqulu aqale ukuwuhlanganisa ngo-2017, kwaze kwaba wu-2018 - uthe umcabango wawo wamfikela ngokuthi kusukela aqala ukuba uthisha eminyakeni ewu-20 edlule ubeqaphela ukuthi abanye abafundi abami ndawonye emabangeni abakuwona ngoba bengakhaliphile, kepha bahlulwa wukuhumusha amanye amagama asetshenziswayo uma bebuzwa imibuzo ezivivinyweni. UMNUZ Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, obhale umqulu ozosiza ukuhumusha amagama alukhuni esiNgisi “Ngiqale kanjalo ukucwaninga ngamagama okuvame ukuthi anike abafundi inkinga yokungakwazi ukuwahumusha ngendlela efanele ikakhulu esiNgisini naseziBalweni nakwezinye izifundo, ngasebenzisa ulwazi lwami lwezemfundo namava obuthishela ukuqhamuka nezincazelo ezizokwenza kube lula ukuwaqonda kahle,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe inkinga ekhona okwamanje wukuthi akakayitholi indlela yokuthi lo mqulu ufinyelele kwaboMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal nasezweni lonke, athemba nakholelwa ekuthini ungabahlaba umxhwele futhi wenze babone ukuthi ungasiza kanjani. “Ngibona kuyinto ezoba wusizo ikakhulu ezikoleni zasemakhaya ngoba yilapho ziningi khona izingane ezithwala kanzima ukuhumusha amagama esiNgisi ngesiZulu ukuze ukufunda ngokuqonda kungabi wumthwalo,” kusho uNgwenya. UMNUZ Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, obhale umqulu ozosiza ukuhumusha amagama alukhuni esiNgisi Udalule nokuthi okunye futhi okuhle ngalo mqulu wukuthi udidiyele namanye amagama esiNgisi acotshelelwa wona wuSolwazi Thengamehlo Ngwenya ongasekho mhlabeni owayefundisa eDurban University of Technology, okusize ngokuwuqinisa. “Lawo magama kwavela ukuthi avame ukuba yinkinga kubafundi abasuke bezokwenza unyaka wokuqala emanyuvesi, okuveza ngokusobala ukuthi kunenkinga yokungakwazi ukuhumusha amagama esiNgisi,” kusho uNgwenya ofundisa isiNgisi kwaGrade 11 eKing Dinuzulu High, khona KwaNongoma. Ngale kwamava okufundisa eminyaka ewu-20, uNgwenya uneziqu zemfundo ze-BA in Communication Science ne-Post Graduate Certificate in Education kwase-University of Zululand; neze-BA Honours in Language Practice zase-University of The Free State.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULERATO Kganyago ongomunye wabasakazi beMetro FM abazophatha uhlelo emcimbini wezindondo walesi siteshi ozoba ngoMgqibelo, eThekwini KUVELA ukuthi zishayana ngamakhanda izikhulu zeSABC nesiteshi iMetro FM, ngokugqoza kokudayiswa kwamathikithi alo mcimbi okulindeleke ukuthi ube se-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo. Umcimbi amaMetro FM Awards, ukhuze ibuya kulo nyaka ngemuva kwesikhathi eside agcina, njengoba lo mcimbi uke wamiswa iminyaka. Umthombo weSolezwe oyingxenye yethimba elihlela umcimbi, uveze ukuthi abakhangisa umcimbi bezwakalise ukukhathazeka kuqala njengoba abantu bebebonakala bewuthakasela umcimbi uma ufakwe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okulethe ithemba kusaqalwa. "Kodwa izinto zishintshe sekubhekwa indlela amathikithi ahamba ngayo eTicketpro lapho edayiswa khona, kwacaca ukuthi athengwa kancane okuyinto ebingalindelekile," kusho umthombo. Omunye umthombo uveze ukuthi izikhulu eziphezulu zalo mcimbi zishayana ngamakhanda manje ukubheka enye indlela yokuthi abantu bathenge amathikithi. "Manje kusetshenziswana nemisakazo emikhulu namaphepha eThekwini, ukuthi bakhangise umcimbi njengoba befuna ube sezingeni, kodwa kuyala njengoba manje sisesontweni lokugcina lalo mcimbi. Sekuthenjwe ukuthi ngoLwesihlanu, abanye abantu bazobe beholile ngakho kungenzeka kube khona athengwayo. Nawomcimbi osePeople's Park nakhona yiso leso njengoba amathikithi engahambi yize abaculi abazobe bekhona bedonsa amehlo," kuchaza umthombo. Uveze ukuthi abanye basola ukuthi umcimbi awukhangiswanga ngendlela njengoba bekumele kuhanjelwe emalokishini, ukutshela abantu ngawo. Uthe kunalokho kuvele kwayiwa ezindaweni ezimbalwa ezindaweni zokuzijabulisa edolobheni eThekwini, nokuyinto abaningi abangayinakanga. Okhulumela iSABC uMmoni Ngubane, uthunyelelwe i-email agcine engaphendulanga kuyo ukuzwa izinhlelo zalo mcimbi. Ukuvotela bonke abaculi abaqokwe kuwona kuvalwe ngeSonto. NgoLwesihlanu kulindeleke ukuthi kube nemicimbi ehlukene ukundlalela omkhulu ngoMgqibelo. NgoMgqibelo kuzoba nosePeople's Park, nase-ICC. Kuyona kulindeleke ukuthi kunandise abaculi okukhona kubo uYoung Stuna, DJ Tira, Goldmax, Mthandeni SK, Benny Maverick, Sammy K, Umafikizolo, Khuzani nabanye. Uhlelo emcimbini omkhulu luyobe luphethwe uLerato Kganyago noLawrence Maleka.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umculi kamaskandi uNtencane osebonge abalandeli ngokwenza kahle kwe-albhamu yakhe ethi, Awuyiphumuze enamacwecwe ajatshulelwe abantu abahlukene USEBONGE bonke abalandeli bakamaskandi ngokuqhubeka bagqamise umculo kamaskandi, uSenzo "Ntencane" Zondi, okhiphe amangwevu kwi-albhamu yakhe entsha, ayikhiphe ngenyanga edlule ethi, Awuyiphumuze. Emacwecweni akule albhamu kukhona elithi Ukhethe Mina nelithi Engalobolile, angamanye adla lubi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ekuqaleni kwaleli sonto uNtencane uveze ukuthi ingoma ethi Ukhethe Mina, isifinyelele ku-5 million wabantu abayidlalayo. Uthe lokhu akusho nje ukuthi ukhiphe i-albhamu eshisa izikhotha, kodwa kuyaveza ukuthi umculo kamaskandi wenza kahle kulezi zinsuku. "Njengamanje ngihlele ukuthi ngenze imicimbi lapho ngizohambela khona izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme ngiyojabulisa izitshudeni ngomculo wami. Ngizobe ngizibonga ngezingenzela kona ngomculo. Okuvelayo muva nje wukuthi izitshudeni yizona ezilalela kakhulu umculo kamaskandi njengoba usungenisile nakuzo. Lokhu kwenze ukuthi umuntu afinyelele kulezi zibalo akuzo manje," kusho uNtencane. Kule albhamu uthe akwenzile okuhlukile wukuthi abheke ukuthi abalandeli bakhe bafunani ezingomeni zakhe bese eyakusebenzisa. "Angiyishintshanga indlela engicula ngayo, kodwa ngibheke emuva lokho abalandeli bami ababethe angikwenze ezingomeni zami, ngempela ngikwenzile lokho njengoba kukhona ushuni omusha engiqhamuke nawo wesimanje. Ngibheke uthando okuyinto wonke umuntu ayithandayo nesikholelwayo kuyona sonke, ngacula ngalo, yingakho lezi zingoma ezimbili kubonakala sengathi yizona ezidlisa kakhulu kule albhamu," kusho yena. Uthe le albhamu bekumele iphume ngoDisemba, kodwa wabona ukuthi akahlehlise ukuyikhipha, okuyinto angazisoli ngayo. NgoDisemba uthe basuke bebaningi abaculi abakhipha izingoma, kodwa naye isikhathi akhiphe ngaso kuye kube ngesikahle. Ubonge abantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ikakhulukazi iTikTok, athe kubo bengabaculi ifike yenza omkhulu umehluko ngokwenza izingoma zabo zifinyelele kubantu balula.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ISILO uMisuZulu kaZwelithini Image: SIPHAMANDLA MBHELE | KZN DSAC LIHLALELWE ifulaha lomsebenzi ithimba elijutshwe iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini ukuba liyonxenxa amaqembu ezepolitiki ameleleke ePhalamende ukuba aseke isiphakamiso sokuba kuchibiyelwe umthetho olawula ukuphathwa kwesikhwama esigade umhlaba kaZulu, iNgonyama Trust. Ithimba eliqokwe yiMbube lizokuba nemihlangano namaqembu ameleleke ePhalamende ngesonto elizayo. Amaqembu avume ukuhlangana nethimba i-ANC, MKP, DA, EFF, IFP, PA, ACDP, PA, Bosa, Rise Mzansi, PAC, ActionSA, FF Plus ne-UDM. Kuzobe kuphekwa kuthululwa njengoba le mihlangano izokuba ngoLwesine nangoLwesihlanu. Ithimba kuzofanele ligawule libheke lapha ePhalamende ngoba lolu daba luke lwaphathwa kuleli zinga kanti imiphumela ayibanga njengesifiso seNdlunkulu. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iPhalamende lake lajuba ithimba elaliholwa owayengumengameli, uMnuz Kgalema Motlanthe. Umbiko waleli thimba waphakamisa ukuthi kuqedwe ngeNgonyama Trust. Amaqembu ezepolitiki amaningi ayekhona ePhalamende ngaleso sikhathi azwakalisa ukuzeseka izincomo zombiko wango-2017. Kepha lo mbiko wagcina uphelela emoyeni emva kokubhoka kukaZulu uholwa yiSilo uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. Akuyona imfihlo ukuthi amaqembu amaningi ezepolitiki awajabule ngendlela okuphethwe ngayo iNgonyama Trust. Amanye avame ukuzwakalisa ukuthi umhlaba ongaphansi kwalesi sikhwama kufanele kube ngokahulumeni. Okuningi ukushaya amakhala kusuke kuthinta izimali lapho izikhulu zeNgonyama Trust zibizwa ukuba zizophendula ePhalamende ngokusetshenziswa kwezimali. Ithimba leNdlulamithi liya ePhalamende ngesikhathi esibukhunyana lapho lingekho iqembu elaphumelela ukhetho ngamalengiso. Lesi simo senza umsebenzi wethimba ube nzima njengoba kuzofanele lizame ukubonisana nezicagogo ngezicagogo zamaqembu ameleleke ePhalamende. Lowo akuwona umsebenzi olula. Kunzima ukuphasisa ukushintshwa komthetho ePhalamende ngoba kwawona amaqembu abusa ngokubambisana abuye engavumelani ewodwa. Lokhu kwabonakala kakhulu ngesikhathi kunesiphakamiso sokwenyusa ngo-2% intela eyengezwa empahleni ethengwayo. Sagcina singaphumelelanga lesi esiphakamiso ngenxa yokungavumelani kwamaqembu abusa ngokubambisana. Ithimba kuzofanele lizilungiselele ukubhekana nazo zonke lezi zimo. AMANDLA KAZULU NESILO Kungenzeka nokho ukuthi lesi simo sivune ithimba ngoba amaqembu amaningi ezepolitiki aseyakugwema ukuphikisana neSilo bukhoma. Lokhu kungenxa yokwesabela ukuthi ukuphikisana neSilo kwenza ukuthi abantu baKwaZulu-Natal bengalivoteli lelo qembu eliphikisana noMlomo ongathethi manga. Lona unyaka wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya, kwazi bani mhlawumbe ithimba lingase liyinqobe le mpi ngokusetshenzelwa yisihe osopolitiki ababa naso ngale sizini. Injongo enkulu yomhlangano ukuba kunxenxwe amaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi aseke isiphakamiso sokuba kuchibiyelwe umthetho iNgonyama Trust Act ukuze iMbube izonikwa amandla okuqoka amalungu ebhodi. Umthetho okhona njengamanje unikeza uNgqongqoshe wezoMhlaba amandla okuqoka amalungu ebhodi. Akusiniki ukuthula iSilo ukunikwa kukangqongqoshe amandla okuqoka amalungu ebhodi. Amalungu ebhodi akhona njengamanje abhekene ngeziqu zamehlo neSilo. Ukube kuya ngayo iMbube ngabe kade la malungu ebhodi axoshwa.
