IMbube ikhala ngokuthi amalungu ebhodi awayihloniphi futhi awafuni ukuyamukela njengoSihlalo webhodi. La malungu aqokwa ngesikhathi uMnyango usaphethwe uNkk Thoko Didiza, osenguSomlomo wePhalamende. Ungqongqoshe ophethe, uMnuz Mzwanele Nyhontso, usezame kaningi ukuxosha amalungu ebhodi. Mumva nje uNyhontso uzame ukuxosha amalungu ngenxa yokuthi sekusule ubuthaphuthaphu amanye nokwenza abasele bangabi yisibalo esanele ukuthi bakwazi ukwenza umsebenzi.  Amalungu ebhodi anikela eNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu eyophonsela inselelo isinqumo sikaNyhontso. Nebala inkantolo yakhipha isivimbelo sesikhashana esichitha isinqumo sikaNyhontso sokuxosha amalungu ebhodi. KUBOSHELWE IZINGQWEQWE Okunye okufunwa iiMbube ukuthi iNgonyama Trust iwele ngaphansi kukahulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal esikhundleni sikahulumeni kazwelonke. Ithimba leMbube eliholwa uNdunankulu kaZulu, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, libophele izingqweqwe zemikhakha eyahlukene, ikakhulu kwezomthetho. Phakathi kwamanye amafolosi, kukhona iJaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi uMjabuliseni Isaac Madondo, nommeli wasemaJajini, u-Advocate Tembeka Ngcukaitobi. Amakhosi asesifundazweni azwakalise ukuyeseka imizamo yeMbube yokuba kuchibiyelwe umthetho olawula iNgonyama Trust. Amakhosi athe afuna ukuthi iMbube kube yiyo ngokubambisana nawo elawula iNgonyama Trust. Akusho lokhu emhlanganweni wawo okhethekile obungoLwesibili. Umhlangano ubuhanjelwe amakhosi aqhamuka kuzo zonke izifunda. Kuleli sonto iMbube ihlangane noNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, lapho igcizelele khona ukubaluleka kokuba kubuyiswe uzinzo kwiNgonyama Trust. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe iSilo siyalele uNtuli ukuba axhumane noNyhontso ukuze bezoqhamuka neqhinga lokuxazulula izinkinga ezibhekene neNgonyama Trust. "Lokhu kubalwa ukubhekana nezinselelo zokuphatha, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi kunomthetho ocacile, nokubuyisela ukusebenza okugcwele kwalesi sikhungo ngendlela evikela izimfuno zesizwe samaZulu nokuqinisekisa ukwethenjwa ngumphakathi. "ISilo sigcizelele ukuthi ukusebenzisana phakathi kwehhovisi likaNdunankulu, uMnyango wezoMhlaba nehhovisi lomphathi weNgonyama Trust. INgonyama iphinde yathi i-Ingonyama Trust iseyimpahla ebalulekile esizweni nasesifundazweni, edinga ukuphathwa ngobunono, obala, nangokuvumelana nawo wonke amazinga kahulumeni."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ICHANGAN Uni-S yiSUV yemindeni engase ehehe abaningi ngendlela ebukeka ngayo INKAMPANI yaseChina, iChangan Motors, izethule ngokusemthethweni eNingizimu Afrika ekupheleni kuka-2025 ngezimoto ezine esizilamanise ngentsha i-Uni-S abanethemba elikhulu ngayo. Izimoto zakwaChangan zilethwa kuleli yiJameel Motors South Africa. Isikhulu seJameel, uMarinus Venter, sithe njengoba sebefikile emakethe yakuleli sekuyisikhathi sokudlondlobala. Uthe isibalo samagaraji adayisa izimoto zabo angu-20 kuzophela unyaka sesidlule kancane kuka-40. Ukukhula kwabo bazimisele ukuthi kuholwe phambili yi Uni-S abayibona njengemoto ebalulekile ezobadobela amakhasimende amasha. I-Uni-S yiSUV abathi izoba yimbangi enkulu yeHaval Jolion. Babala ne-VW Tiguan, Chery Tiggo 7 Pro nezinye. Abathanda imoto ebukekayo baningi abazothatheka ngoba yinhle ngaphandle. Le SUV ifika ihlukene ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyiCS, CL neCE. Kuya ngenhlobo yakho kodwa amarimu aphakathi kuka-18 inch no-19 inch. Konke kwenziwa kwi-touchscreen infotainment system kwiChangan Uni-S njengoba ingenawo amabhathini Ngaphambili alambu angamaLED futhi kuneligudla kwi-grille ephicwe kahle liwahlanganise. Yinto efanayo nangemuva lapho kunelambu elikhanya lize liyoshaya kolunye uhlangothi kuze kukhanye nophawu lwayo. Ngaphakathi ifana nezimoto ezivela ezweni layo ngokungabi namabhathini kodwa izinto zenziwe kwi-touchscreen ye-infotainment system enkulu engu-12.80 inch. Yinto eyenza ibukeke kahle kodwa idinga isikhathi ukuthi uzijwayeze ukuhlela izibuko, amazinga okushisa nokunye. Kule-screen uphinde uxhume iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ubone nengaphandle njengoba inamakhamera aveza umzimba wonke. Kunezindawo ezanele zokushaja okukhona kuyo neyokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo, ine-automatic climate control, 10.25 inch instrument cluster nesiteringi esinamabhathini. Ngibone ivuleke kahle futhi okhakhayini kune-panoramic sunroof. Izihlalo zangaphambili zihlelwa ngogesi futhi iyakwazi nokuziqandisa. Zonke izinhlobo ze-Uni-S zihamba ngenjini efanayo engu-1.5 litre turbo kaphethroli esebenza ne-7 speed Dual-Clutch Transmission. Amandla angu-138kW ne-torque engu-300Nm. Ngesikhathi yethulwa eKempton Park sihamba siyojika ePitoli kuleli sonto isikhathi esiningi ngisichithe ngihleli ngemuva. Amadolo abenesikhala esanele kwazise izihlalo ziphansi. Ukuba kwazo phansi kwenza usondelane nomgwaqo ugcine uzwa ubunjalo bawo emigwaqeni emibi kodwa okungeyona into ebuhlungu kangako. Umsindo wenqawe uma uhleli ngemuva ubuzwakala kakhulu hhayi ngendlela emnandi. Amandla enjini abezwakala enele nezinye izimoto zidluleka kalula. Abayincishanga izinsiza zomshayeli njengoba ifika nenqwaba yezinto. Phakathi kwakho kubalwa i-adaptive cruise control, iyakusiza ukuhlala emzileni, iyakuxwayisa futhi izibhrekele uma uzoshayisa, iyasho uma kunemoto eseceleni nokunye. Baphinde bayifaka nama-airbag amabili ngaphambili nangamakhethini kwezinye izinhlobo. Zifika ne-service plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-150 000km.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, uthe kuyamkhathaza ukungathathelwa ngokushesha izinyathelo zokuqondiswa kobugwegwe kwezikhulu zeminyango kahulumeni wesifundazwe, ezisolwa enkohlakalweni kanye neziphula imithetho yokuphathwa kwemali. UNtuli uthe ukungathathelwa ngokushesha izinyathelo kwezikhulu ezisolwa enkohlakalweni, kwenza ukuthi abantu bangawuthembi uhulumeni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma emhlanganweni weKhabhinethi yesifundazwe okhethekile, obuhanjelwe yizo zonke izinhloko zeminyango kahulumeni wesifundazwe. Esitatimendeni, uNtuli uthe bafuna ukuthi bathathelwe izinyathelo ngokushesha  abangawulandeli umthetho wokuphathwa kwemali. "Ngesikhathi singena emandleni, sazibophezela ngokuthi sizoyiphatha ngobuqotho imali yomphakathi. Siphelile isikhathi senkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa kanye nesabantu abahlulwa wukwenza umsebenzi wabo. Ukungathathelwa ngokushesha izinyathelo kwabasolwa enkohlakalweni, kwenza ngibe nomuzwa wokuthi abantu bazobona sengathi bayayekwa abenza okuphambene nomthetho. Lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangawuthembi uhulumeni wesifundazwe. Akufanele sigcine ngokukhuluma nje, kodwa kufanele sihambe emazwini esawasho ngesikhathi sizibophezela ekuholeni ngobuqotho." UNtuli uthe uyazi ukuthi kwesinye isikhathi ukuqondiswa ubugwegwe kwezikhulu kubanjezelwa wukuthi kunemigomo okufanele ilandelwe uma kunohlelo lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. "Kufanele kube nezingxoxo nezinye izinhlaka ezifana neSpecial Investigating Unit, ukuze kubonakale ukuthi zingaxazululwa kanjani izinkinga ezibambezela ukuqondiswa kobugwegwe. Kufanele kube khona indlela yokusebenzisana ezokwenza ukuthi bathathelwe izinyathelo ngokushesha abathintekayo." UNtuli uphinde watshela izikhulu zeminyango ukuba ziqinisekise ukuthi bakhokhelwa zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30, osomabhizinisi abasuke benikwe amathenda. "Umthetho obekwe wuMnyango kaMgcinimafa uthi kufanele iminyango kahulumeni ikhokhele usomabhizinisi zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30, ngaphandle uma kunezizathu ezivimba ukuthi umnyango uhlangabezane nalo mnqamulajuqu. Yonke iminyango kahulumeni kufanele ilwele ukuthi ibakhokhela bonke osomabhizinisi zingakapheli izinsuku ezibekiwe. Ukukhokha ngesikhathi kweminyango kahulumeni, kuzokwenza ukuthi amabhizinisi amancane angaphazamiseki kuphinde kudaleke namathuba emisebenzi."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMntwana uGcinabantu Thembisile 'Sister Eunice' IPHINDE yagubuzelwa yifu elimnyama iNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukuguqa kukaMntwana Gcinabani Thembisile "Sister Eunice" Zulu (78), waseZibindini. UMntwana uGcinabani ushone ngoMgqibelo, nokuwusuku obekufihlwa ngalo omunye uMntwana waseNdlunkulu kaZulu, uGibizizwe Zulu (67), wasoSuthu. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uzwakalise ukukhathazeka ngokuguqa ngokulandelana kwabantwana baseNdlunkulu. "Nina beSilo senginamahloni ukuthi ngilokhu ngibika ngezindaba ezibuhlungu nezingehli kahle. INdlunkulu kaZulu isiphinde yehlelwa yifu elimnyama. Egameni leSilo samabandla onke, nasegameni leNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke sithi akwehlanga olungehliyo, nilale ngenxeba nina beSilo." UMntwana uThulani uchaze uMntwana uGcinabani njengomuntu obenenhliziyo emnene futhi ezinikele okholweni. UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uzofihlwa ngoMgqibelo. "Umngcwabo uzokuba seKuthokozeni kweZibindi, eShoba, eFilidi. Sengathi umoya wakhe ungalala ngokuthula." UMntwana uGibizizwe yena ufihlwe ngoMgqibelo, oSuthu. UMntwana uGibizizwe ubeseduze kweSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini, futhi uyena owayekhongela iMbube ekhweni layo kwaMyeni. UMntwana uThulani uthe ukushona kwabaNtwana ikakhulukazi labo abangoyise beNgonyama, kuphazamisa umsebenzi weMbube. "Siyazi ukuthi abaNtwana njengoba bengoyise beNgonyama yibona ethembele kubo ukuthi njengoba ikhona ihlezi esihlalweni, mayibheka ngapha nangapha ibona ukuthi oyise bakhona, okwenza ukuthi izinze. Kodwa lokhu kufana nokuhlwithwa amaphiko ayo okundiza." Baningi abanye abaNtwana abayizinsika eNdlunkulu kaZulu abaguqe kule minyaka edlule. Phakathi kwabaguqe ngonyaka odlule kubalwa uMntwana uHenrietta Zulu kanye noNdlunkulu Thoko Mantombela Zulu owayegane owayeyibamba bukhosi, uMntwana uMcwayizeni Zulu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: DOCTOR NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS AMALUNGU e-IFP asekhululekile ukugqoka izikibha ezinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Lesi sinyathelo kuvunyelwane ngaso emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP, obuseMpangeni, ngeSonto. Kulo mhlangano kuphinde kwavela nokuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu izoba ngonyaka ozayo. Isolezwe lithole ngemithombo yalo ukuthi amalungu eqembu, anikezwe imvume yokuthi afake izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini amalungu eqembu abevunyelwe ukufaka izikibha zomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi. Omunye umthombo uveze ukuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu izoba ngonyaka ozayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi be-IFP kuzwelonke nasesifundazweni izoba ngoMashi. Uthe banqume ukuthi zonke izingqungquthela zibe ngonyaka ozayo ukuze kungaphazamiseki umkhankaso wokhetho. I-IFP yagcina ukuba nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu ngo-2019, ngesikhathi uButhelezi edlulisela izintambo kuHlabisa. UHlengwa akazange ayiphendule imibuzo mayelana nokusetshenziswa kobuso bukaHlabisa ezikibheni. Umholi we-IFP ocele ukuba igama lakhe lingadalulwa, uthe ujabulise okwengane ngesikhathi uMkhandlu kaZwelonke uvumelana ngokuthi sezingafakwa izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. "Ngangizibuza ukuthi azigqokwa ngani izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu omdala ngoba uyena umholi weqembu. Ngijabule kabi uma umkhandlu kazwelonke uthi sesingazigqoka izikibha. UBulawayo wakhonjwa emazulwini, buka ukuthi i-IFP ikhula kanjani. Kuyasho ukuthi wangena ngendlela eqondile esikhundleni. Wanikezwa wumnikazi weqembu." Uthe: "Ulokhu eqhubekile nokwamukela amalungu amasha. Ebuholi bakhe sinongqongqoshe namaphini ongqongqoshe kuhulumeni kazwelonke. Lapha KwaZulu-Natal yithina esiphethe uhulumeni. Ngijabulise okwengane encane." Lo mholi uthe ubevele eseqalile ukugqoka isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa. "Le nto yezikibha ibuhlukumeza. Bese ngivele ngisigqoka. Uma ungena emhlanganweni weNkatha ububukwa ngelinye iso. Bebekuxwaya kube sengathi kungena umuntu weMKP noma owe-ANC. Ngihamba ngikhululekile, namanje ngisigqokile." Eqhuba uthe yena akasiboni isidingo sokuthi kube nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi. "Yini lena esiyijahile? Angisho ukuthi ayingabi khona. Kodwa mina ngithi ingqungquthela ayibe khona uma sekuwukuthi sibona sengathi lona okhona uyayizikisa inqanawe. Ngokomthetho kufanele kuze kusho yena umuntu omkhulu ukuthi usebuthaka." Uphinde wanxusa amalungu eqembu ukuba aseke uHlabisa. "Sonke nje ngothi lwethu asesekeni uBulawayo ukuze ayise i-IFP phambili."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-GASH1 noThato Immaculate omemezele ukuthi buphelile ubudlelwano babo ISIPHENDUKE indaba egudwini ezinkundleni zokuxhumana eyokuphela komshado kaThato Immaculate Mthombeni noGashwan “Gash 1” Mthombeni, ababopha ifindo likasofasilahlane emuva kokutholana endlini ohlelweni lwethevishini i-Big Brother Mzansi eminyakeni edlule. Laba bobabili babekwi-Big Brother Mzansi, eba nesiteshi sayo futhi ephinde ikhonjiswe nakuMzansi Magic ngo-2022. Kuleyo sizini kwakukhona oB.U Mthembu, Themba Mabaso, Tulz nabanye. Kwagcine kunqobe uMpho Wabadimo, uGash1 walala isibili. Akuyena kuphela uThato noGash1 ababa sebudlelwaneni emuva kwesizini yesithathu ye-Big Brother Mzansi njengoba noThemba noMpho baphenduka izithandani. Izindaba zokuphela kobudlelwano kwalezi zithandani ezinengane yomfana zidalulwe wuThato ngesitatimende. UThato, osanda kuhlukana neMetro FM njengomsakazi ngesikhathi lesi siteshi senza izinguquko ekuqaleni kwenyanga, uthe emuva kweminyaka emithathu eshadile, yena noGash1 sebehlukene. “Ngithathe isinqumo sokuhamba emuva kwezigameko ezenzeke ezinsukwini ezimbalwa ezedlule, ezingeke zisalungiseka ngokwemigomo nengikholelwa kukho,” kusho uThato. Uthe imindenni yabo ihlangene ukukhuluma ngalolu daba futhi uyibikelile phambi kukaGash1 ukuthi umile esinqumeni sakhe. “Ngeke ngande kakhulu ukuvikela imindeni yethu nendodana yami. Ngenkulu inhlonipho, nginxusa ukuthi lokhu kungaphenduki impi kaThato noGash1. Sihlanganile, sathandana, sazama ukwakha umndeni ngokwamandla ethu. Ngiphatheke kabi kodwa kumele ngiqinisele, ngiqhubeke ngisebenze,” kusho uThato. Uthe akaze afise ukuthi akhulise ingane yakhe yedwa kodwa ubelokhu emile ekutheni kunezinto angeke azimele noma ngabe zincane kangakannani komunye umuntu. “Lesi yisitatimende sami sokugcina ngalolu daba. Ngeke ngisaphawula ngoba uzoqhubeka nokuba wubaba wengane yami. Ngiyabonga kubalandeli bami ngothando nokuqonda. Ukuya phambili, sekuzoba yimi nengane yami futhi ngigxile ekwakheni ikusasa lethu elinempilo nenjabulo.” Ngesikhathi uGash1 engakathi vu ngalolu daba, abantu baqalile ukuqagela, bemsola ngobusoka. UThato ubuye wabhala ku-X ecacisa ukuthi lokhu akulona iqiniso.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUZOCACA kuleli sonto ngekusasa likaMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Mbali Shinga, olahlwe yicala lokushaya indiva umyalelo weqembu. I-NFP izokhipha isigwebo esizonikwa uNksz Shinga ngoLwesithathu. Lokhu kuvezwe uNobhala Jikelele weNFP obambile, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, encwadini ayibhekise ezinhlakeni zeqembu. UNksz Shinga ubekade ebhekene nekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe, emva kokuba ashaya indiva umyalelo weqembu wokuba aseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, esasifakwe yiMKP. I-NFP iyona engababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. UXaba uthe embikweni wesikhashana, ulahlwe yiwo wonke amacala abhekene nawo. "Isinqumo sekomiti siveza obala ubucayi bamacala awenzile. Isinqumo siyisifundo kulabo abangafuni ukulandela umthetho. Onke amalungu kufanele ahloniphe umthetho weqembu, akukhathaleki ukuthi uphethe siphi isikhundla." UXaba uthe ikomiti kulindeleke ukuthi likhiphe isigwebo ngoLwesithathu. "Amalungu ekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP, ayanxuswa ukuba alungiselele ukukhishwa kwesigwebo. Ayanxuswa ukuba aqhubeke nokuhola iqembu ngokucophelela." Umthombo ongaphakathi uthe kulindeleke ukuthi iNFP imxoshe uNksz Shinga ekubeni yilungu leqembu, okuzomlahlekisela ngesikhundla sokuba uMphathiswa. Uqhuba umthombo, uthe iNFP ihlela ukufaka umholi wayo, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, esikhundleni sikaNksz Shinga. "Bake bazama vele ukukhipha uNksz Shinga befake uBarnes kodwa bahluleka. Bazophinde bazame futhi." Uqhuba umthombo, uthe uNksz Shinga uzokuphonsela inselelo ukuxoshwa kwakhe. "Kusukela kwasekuqaleni ethweswa amacala, ubelokhu ekhala ngokuthi ubuholi beqembu abuyilandeli imigomo yeqembu. Le ndaba izophelela enkantolo. Engingakutshela khona ukuthi kuzokuba nzima enkantolo. I-NFP ijwayele ukuhlulwa emacaleni lapho isuke izama ukuxosha abantu ebajube ezikhundleni." Ukuxoshwa kukaNksz Shinga kungabeka engcupheni uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe esifundazweni. Ukuphuma kweNFP kuhulumeni wesifundazwe kungashiya amaqembu abusa ngokubambisana nezihlalo ezingu-40 kwezingu-80 esiShayamthetho. Ubuholi beNFP kade bamemezela ukuhoxa kwabo kuhulumeni wesifundazwe, baze bayalela noNksz Shinga ukuba asule esikhundleni sokuba uMphathiswa. Kuze kube namhlanje, uNksz Shinga akakaze asule esikhundleni futhi uyaqhubeka nokuvota namaqembu abusa ngokubambisana esiShayamthetho. UNksz Shinga uphinde abe uSihlalo weNFP esifundazweni.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCWANINGI Mabhuku Jikelele, uNksz Tsakani Maluleke UMUNWE ukhomba kubaholi neziphathimandla zoMasipala KwaZulu-Natal abawu-42 kwabawu-54 okuvele ukuthi bahlushwa yisihlava sobunuku emalini okumele ngabe isebenza ukulungisa nokufeza izidingo zomphakathi, kodwa igcine isebenza kokungafanele. Lokho kushiwo wuSihlalo we-Action SA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zwakele Mncwango, ngenkathi ezwakalisa ilaka lakhe mayelana nombiko okhishwe wuMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, uNksz Tsakani Maluleke, embikweni awethule esiShayamthetho ngoLwesine. Embikweni kaNksz Maluleke kuvele ukuthi bane kuphela omasipala okungatholakalanga gcobho kubona okungowaseMhlathuze, Richmond, Umlalazi neKing Cetshwayo. Kuvele nokuthi omasipala abawu-42 basaphaze imali elinganiselwa ku-R7.8 billion ngonyaka wemali odlule, kanti futhi okukhathaza kakhulu wukuthi labo masipala yibona abathole ingxenye enkulu yesabelomali esitholwa womasipala baseKZN - njengoba bethole u-88% ku-R125.1 billion oklanyelwa omasipala. UMncwango uthe lesi simo sikhomba ukuthi izwe libuswa abaholi abangakulungele ukuphatha izwe ngobuqotho, futhi indlela abenza ngayo ikhomba ukuthi abayikhathalele inhlalakahle nentuthuko yomphakathi. “Kuyiqiniso elingenakuphikwa ukuthi okunye okusibeka lapho esikhona manje wukuthi ezinye iziphathimandla zomasipala zithatha imali okumele ngabe isiza ezidingweni zomphakathi,  ziyitshale emikhankasweni yazo yokhetho - okuyisenzo esiphambene nomthetho. “Lilonke nje kusobala ukuthi ubuholi obusemandleni manje kudingeka ukuthi buzinuke amakhwapha ngendlela okwengamela ngayo imali yokusiza umphakathi.Kuyacaca ukuthi sekuyisikhathi sokuthi kutholakale isandla sobuholi obusha obuzobeka izidingo zomphakathi phambili - ngoba laba abakhona manje sebehlulekile,” kusho uMncwango. UMncwango udalule nokuthi okufakazela ukungathembeki nokungaholi ngobuqotho komasipala wukuthi kumanje sekuphele iminyaka emibili yonke afaka incwadi efuna ukucaciseleleka ngezinsolo zokuqashwa kwabantu abayizipoki ohlelweni lwe-EPWP. Leli phephandaba liyibonile incwadi eyathunyelwa wuMncwango ngoJulayi ngo-2024, ayeyibhekise kuMasipala weTheku ebuza ukuthi kwagcina kwenzekenii ngalezo zinsolo, aveze ukuthi kuze kube yimanje do impendulo. UMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele udalule nokuthi kuleli qoqo lomasipala abanogcobho kukhona noMkhandlu omkhulu weTheku, omasipala bezifunda nomasipala abayizizinda nensika yomnotho wesifundazwe. Kuvele nokuthi kunomasipala abawu-10 asebehlale kuleli qoqo labangenzi kahle iminyaka ewu-10 nangaphezulu, okukhomba ubukhulu bomonakalo oqhubekayo ngalesi simo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: 1008536259__20260131__0 ASADINGEKA ama-passports kwabaseLesotho abahlela ukuvakashela kuleli Image: Henk Kruger/Independent Newspapers BAKHATHAZEKILE aboMnyango wezaseKhaya, abachithe njengamampunge imibiko esabalele yokuthi abaseLesotho akusadingeki ukuthi baveze ama-passports uma bengena emingceleni yakuleli. UMnyango uthe asikho isivumelwano esifuze lesi phakathi kwelakuleli nelaseLesotho. "AbaseLesotho basazowaveza ama-passports uma bengena kuleli. Ngeke bakwazi ukusebenzisa omazisi babo kuphela uma beza kuleli," kusho uMnyango. UMnyango uveze ukuthi ukungena kuleli ngaphandle kwe-passports, kuzobe kuwukuphula imithetho yezwe. "ONgqongqoshe beminyango yezaseKhaya eLesotho nakuleli, bahlangana eKapa, ngo-Ephreli 17, 2026, ukuze kuxoxwe ngeziphakamiso ezithinta imingcele. Uma kumele kwenziwe izinguquko kwezemingcele, kudingeka ukuthi kuchitshiyelwe umthetho okufaka nePhalamende. Akukho hlelo oluthinta lokhu oluqhubekayo." UMnyango uthe kusamile ukuthi abantu bakuleli uma beya eLesotho kudingeka baveze ama-passports kanti nakanjalo nabaseLesotho kumele benze okufanayo uma beza kuleli.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wezokuXhumana, uMnuz Solly Malatsi Image: X / IOLGraphics UHULUMENI ushicilele imigomo yokulawula ukusebenza kwe-Artificial Intelligence (AI), wase umema umphakathi ukuthi uphawule ngayo kuze kube wu-4 ntambama ngoJuni 10. Le migomo ishicilelwe wuMnyango wezokuXhumana nobuChwepheshe kusomqulu kahulumeni ngoLwesihlanu. Uhulumeni ukuhlukanise ngokwezigaba ezintathu ukwethulwa kwemigomo. Ngonyaka-zimali wokuqala osongwe ngenyanga edlule, ubeke eqhulwini ukuthi kuphothule imiyalelo futhi ubheke imigomo ephuthumayo ye-AI. Ngo-2026/27, ufuna ukuqala ushicilele imiyalelo futhi ulawule imikhakha esengcupheni kwi-AI. Ngonyaka zimali ka-27/28, ufuna imigomo isebenze ngokugcwele futhi uyithuthukise ihambisane nokushintsha kwayo i-AI. Uhulumeni uthe ufuna ukuthi imigomo iholele ekutheni kunyuke ukusetshenziswa kwe-AI ezikhungweni zomphakathi, ezizimele nasemphakathini. Ufuna i-AI idale amathuba omsebenzi. Ufuna kusetshenziswe i-AI ukugcina ulimi, ubuciko, nomculo kwakudala. Abantu okubhekwe ukuthi bahlomule ngemigomo ngabantu abasha, izingane, abesifazane abaphila nokukhubazeka, osomabhiiznisi, abatshalimali nezikhungo zikahulumeni. Kunabasebenzisa i-AI ukwenza imifanekiso engekho, umuntu ebonakala enza noma esho into angakaze ayisho. Uhulumeni ufuna kusungulwe nesikhwama esifana nesokunxephezela abalimale emgwaqweni i-Road Accident Fund. Lesi ngesokunxephezela abantu noma izikhungo i-AI, ethathe izinqumo ngabo kodwa ezingashayi emhloleni kungaziwa kuzogxekwa bani. Isibonelo, kungaba yi-AI enqaba isicelo sokuboleka imali kungafanele, imifanekiso okungeyona ngomuntu okungaziwa yenziwe ngubani, ukulinyazwa wumsihini osebenza nge-AI nokunye. I-AI ifuna kuvikelwe nezingane ezikhangisweni ze-AI, ezingenza ukuthi zichithe isikhathi esithe xaxa zidlala amakhompyutha noma amaselula.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ S'bu Mpisane eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, izolo Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media ASIBANGE sisalalelwa izolo, eNkantolo eNkulu yaseThekwini, isicelo sombango wamafa ophakathi kowayeyiphoyisa likaMasipala weTheku, uMnuz S'bu Mpisane nowayengunkosikazi wakhe, uNksz Shauwn Mkhize. Bekulindeleke ukuthi inkantolo ilalele isicelo sombango wamafa kulandela isehlukaniso somshado esakhishwa yinkantolo ngoNovemba 2024. Nokho kwagcina kungafinyelelwanga ekutheni bazohlukaniselana kanjani amafa. UMpisane ufuna kubuyekezwe izinto ezimbalwa mayelana nokwahlukaniselana kwamafa njengoba babeshade umshado owahlanganisayo. UMpisane obeswenke ngesudi emnyama enemikhono emfishane, ubonakale efika enkantolo ngethemba lokuthi udaba lwakhe luzolalelwa. Nokho ubonakale eqhwetshwa ebizelwa ngaphandle ngabameli bakhe, ukuyongqumuza okuthile, okuthe emva kwesikhathi babonakala bephuma behamba. Ubebukela ezikhululekele ebusweni, engakhombisi kudinwa noma kuphatheka kabi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi abameli bakhe belulekwe ngokuthi bambhalele incwadi uNksz Mkhize, emphoqa ukuba abekhona enkantolo uma sekulalelwa isicelo sikaMpisane. Ngaleso sizathu icala lagcina lingahlalanga, kwangacaca nokuthi lizophinde lihlale nini. Ngokwamaphepha asenkantolo, uMpisane ufuna kubuyekelwe isigaba sesibili sencwadi yesehlukaniso, ukuze kwengezwe ezinye izinto, eveza eyombango oqhubekayo wempahla abayithola ngesikhathi beshade umshado ohlanganisa amafa. Umshado walaba ababili wabhidlika emva kweminyaka eyevile ku-20 beshadile. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uNksz Mkhize ujahwa abe-South African Revenue Service (SARS) ngesikweletu sentela ebalelwa phakathi kuka-R37 million kuya ku-R40 million.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: BAKHALA ngokugqigqela ubala emahhovisi oMnyango wezaseKhaya oLundi, abathi sekusizwa abantu abayisithupha kuphela ngosuku kulandela ukuphephuka kwamahhovisi oMnyango asesiShayamthetho esidala. Abantu basoLundi bathe kuhlula noma sebelala khona emahhovisi oMnyango kodwa kuba nzima ukuthi bathole usizo. Uphahla esiShayamthetho esidala lwaphephuka ngoFebhuwari, wangonyaka owedlule. UMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi wanquma ukuthi akuphephile ukuthi abasebenzi baqhubeke nokusebenzela kulesi sakhiwo. Isikhulu esiphezulu eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Cyril Mncwabe, sithe ukuphephuka kophahla kwaphoqa ukuthi basebenzele emalolini oMnyango ngenxa yokuthi uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi ubungakabatholeli enye indawo abazosebenzela kuyo. UMncwabe uthe ukusebenzela emalolini kuphoqe ukuthi banciphise umthamo wabantu ababasizayo. UMncwabe uthe ngosuku basiza abantu abaphakathi kuka-34 no-40 kanti phambilini bebekwazi ukusiza abantu ababalelwa ku-100. "Njengoba sisebenzela emalolini, asikwazi ukubafaka bonke abasebenzi boMnyango emalolini ngenxa yesikhala. Njengoba abasebenzi besebenzela emalolini, kufanele sibheke izinto ezifana nesimo sezulu nezindlu zangasese." UMncwabe uthe bafuna ukuthi uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi ubavumele ukuthi bazitholele bona indawo yokuhlala. "Udaba lwasoLundi lubucayi kakhulu. Siyaxolisa kubantu basoLundi abangakwazi ukusizakala. Siyazama ngakho konke okusemandleni ethu ukuthola indawo esizosebenza kuyo ngokukhululeka. Isimo sibi impela oLundi." Usotswebhu weNFP eZululand, uMnuz Siphamandla Ntombela, uthe abanye abantu sebelala khona emahhovisi kodwa abanye bagcine bengasizakala khona kunjalo. "Kufanele uvuke ezintathakusa ukuze uzozibeka emathubeni okusizakala. Abantu bahamba amabanga ango-70 km, kunabantu abasuka eMthonjaneni ngoba awekho amahhovisi khona, kufika abantu abasuka koBabanango naKwaCeza. Bagcina bebuyela emuva bengasizakalanga. Abanye bagcina belala ezihlotsheni." UNtombela uthe abantu abahlupheka kakhulu ilabo abafuna omazisi. "Izingane ezifunda u-matric zisenkingeni enkulu. Ezinye ziyalova ezikoleni kodwa futhi zigcine zingasizakalanga." UNtombela unxuse ukuthi uMnyango uzame ukusebenzela ezinkantolo zamakhosi nasemahhovisi omasipala. "Izinkantolo zamakhosi zihlezi zivuliwe, abakhulume namakhosi. Okuhle ukuthi izinkantolo zamakhosi ziseduze nabantu." Okhulumela uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Steve Bhengu, akazange ayiphendule imibuzo ayithunyelwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UYAQHUBEKA umsebenzi wokuhlolwa komonakalo odalwe yizikhukhula eThekwini naseMgungundlovu. Lokhu kuvezwe yilabo masipala izolo, kulandela izikhukhula ezihlasele ngeSonto ebusuku. Ngokwesitatimende esikhishwe wuMasipala waseMsunduzi, kwaziswe abantu ukuthi umsebenzi wokukhucululwa kwezindawo ezikhahlamezekile uyaqhubeka. UMONAKALO odalwe yizikhukhula Image: ETHEKWINI MUNICIPALITY “Ukuhlolwa komonakalo emawadini ehlukene kumasipala nakho kuyaqhubeka,” kusho isitatimende. Siqhube sathi isimo sezulu esibi, ebesihambisana nemvula, umoya onamandla, ukuduma kwezulu kanjalo nesichotho, siholele ekutheni konakale izinto ezehlukene. Kuzona kubalwe ingqalasizinda, ukuwa kwezihlahla emgwaqweni kanjalo nokuthikamezeka kukagesi ezindaweni ezehlukene. UMONAKALO odalwe yizikhukhula Image: ETHEKWINI MUNICIPALITY “Amathimba kamasipala atshaliwe ezindaweni ezehlukene ukubheka ukuthi ungakanani umonakalo odalekile ukuze umasipala ungenelele ngendlela efanele,” kusho isitatimende. Sithe okwamanje umasipala ubusagxile ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izindawo ezehlukene ziyakhucululwa, imigwaqo evalekile iyavulwa, bese kubuyiselwa nogesi lapho uhambe khona. UMasipala weTheku uthe izikhukhula zidale omkhulu umonakalo njengoba eminye imigwaqo ivalwe amanzi, kwacekeleka phansi izimoto, kunezihlahla ebezivale imigwaqo. Siveze uthi izindawo ezikhahlamezeke kakhulu kube yiMorningside kanjalo neChatsworth, okubikwe kuzo izigameko ezingu-22. Sithe entshonalanga yeTheku, okukhona kuyo neWestville, kubikwe izigameko ezingu-13, kwathi enyakatho yeTheku okukhona kuyo iNewlands West, kwabikwa eziyisikhombisa. Kunxuswe izakhamuzi ukuthi ziqaphele, zigweme imigwaqo egcwele amanzi kanjalo namabhuloho amafishane agcwele amanzi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Iyaqhubeka impi yokunqanda isifo sofuba KUYALWE abesilisa ukuthi bayeke ukuhambela kude nokuyohlolwa isifo sofuba iTB njengoba kuyibo abancane kwabahlolwayo. Leli khwelo lihlatshwe yiPhini likaMengameli wezwe uMnuz Paul Mashatile izolo, kugujwa usuku lweTB emhlabeni, eWestern Cape. Uthe lesi sifo siyalapheka kodwa sisabhubhisa inqwaba yabantu kuleli, nasemhlabeni jikelele. "Sihlaba ikhwelo kwabesilisa ukuthi bahlolwe lesi sifo ngoba yibona abahambela kude nokuhlolwa. Ezinyangeni ezingu-11 ezedlule, izibalo zikhomba ukuthi bambalwa abesilisa abahlolwa lesi sifo ekubeni kuyibo esibahaqe kakhulu. Sinxusa nalabo asebedla imishanguzo yaso ukuthi bangayiyeki, kodwa bayidle baze bayiqede," usho kanje. Uthe lesi sifo sigadla kakhulu kwabahaqwe yiHIV/AIDS. Uveze nokuthi u-3.5 million wabantu abahlolwe lesi sifo selokhu kuqale umkhankaso wokuhlola nyakenye. "Sifuna ukukhulisa isibalo sabantu abahlolwa leli gciwane ukuze silwe nokubhebhetheka kwalo. Kunenhlansi yethemba ngokuthi sizoyinqoba impi yalesi sifo. Yisibalo esikhulu esake saba naso ngonyaka sabantu abahlolwa iTB kuleli." Uthe abantu asebeke bahlangana nomuntu one-TB kumele bayohlolwa ukuze kutholakale ukuthi abathelelekanga ngaso. UNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo kuleli, uDkt Aaron Motsoaledi, uthe umkhankaso owathulwa nyakenye owokuhlola abantu abangu-5 million ngonyaka kulesi sifo. Uthe abantu bacabanga ukuthi lesi sifo sihambisana nesifuba kuphela kanti akunjalo. "Sihlala noma yikuphi emzimbeni. Singahlala esibelethweni sowesifazane, nakwezinye izindawo emzimbeni," usho kanje.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, usole umndeni wosomabhizinisi abafunelwa amacala kuleli, abakwaGupta, njengongqondongqondo emkhankasweni weMKP wokhetho lwango-2024, owawudla lubi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. UMbalula uthe abakwaGupta yibona abapheka umkhankaso weMKP, owawushisa kakhulu enkundleni yezokuxhumana i-Tiktok. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma kwiLekgotla ye-ANC Youth League, eqhubeka eMangaung, eFree State. AbakwaGupta kusolwa ukuthi babezitamuzela kumathenda kuleli ngesikhathi umholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, engumengameli wezwe. Lo mndeni walifulathela elakuleli emva kokunindeka ezinsolweni ezenziwa kwiKhomishini eyayiphenya izinsolo zokuLawulwa koMbuso yiDlanzana. UMbalula uthe ubheke ukuthi iMKP iphinde ivimbanise kuzo zonke izinkundla zokuxhumana njengoba ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya seluseMome. "Iqembu likaZuma lalimandla kuTiktok ngoba umkhankaso walo wawuphushwa abakwaGupta. Sebecwilile manje kodwa uzobabona bazobuya njengoba sibheke okhethweni. Uzoze uzibuze ukuthi bavukaphi la bantu? Indlela abanamandla ngayo, benza uze ukhohlwe ukuthi uZuma akuyena owayephethe izwe ngesikhathi kunezinsolo zokulawulwa koMbuso yidlanzana." I-MKP yamangaza abaningi okhethweni lwango-2024, njengoba yaba yiqembu lesithathu ngobukhulu ePhalamende. UMbalula uthe ukugxeka kwabo iMKP ngesikhathi kubhekwe okhethweni, akuzange kubasize. "Abanye bethu bacabanga ukuthi uma begxeka uZuma, sizothola amavoti. Ukugxeka uZuma akusisizi, empeleni ukumgxeka kwenza isimo sethu sibe sibi kakhulu." UMbalula uthe abaholi be-ANC nabo kufanele bazilungiselele ukulwa impi eqhubeka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. "Sibaningi kabi singabaholi be-ANC. Kungani kungethina esimandla lapha ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngoba ithina esibaningi? Abantu bakholelwa izinto ezikhulunywa abantu abagxeka i-ANC ngenxa yokuthi thina asiphawuli ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Asikhulumi ngezinto ezinhle ezenziwa uhulumeni, nokwenza ukuthi abantu bakholelwe kulaba abagxeka uhulumeni." UMbalula uthe kufanele bazibambe ziqine njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya. "Akuzukuba lula okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya." Okuzokwenza ukuthi kube nzima kakhulu kwi-ANC kulolu khetho ukujikelwa idlelandawonye layo, i-SACP, elinqume ukungenela ukhetho ngokuzimela. I-SAPC ibiyaye iseke i-ANC uma kunokhetho kodwa kulolu khetho inqume ukuzimela. Izolo, i-ANC ibibambe imihlangano ezifundeni ezahlukene, lapho ibiyazisa khona amalungu ayo ngesinqumo esithathwe isigungu esiphezulu ngodaba lokungenela ukhetho kwamaKhomanisi. Namhlanje abaholi be-ANC, bazochazela abezindaba ngesinqumo esithathiwe.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo u-Andile KaMajola obengomunye wamaciko ahlonishwe ngezindondo emcimbini Uvukile Gospel Music Festival obungeSonto, osekusuke ukukhuluma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngokuhleleka kwawo UMHLELI womcimbi Uvukile Gospel Music Festival, uPastor Mjosty useveze ukuthi konke  akwenzile emcimbini obungeSonto, enkundleni yezemidlalo i-Sports and Leisure, ePort Shepstone ukwenze ngephakethe lakhe, okwenze ezinye izinto zangaba sezingeni ebelilindelekile. UMjosty ukhulume kanje kulandela ukuthi abanye abantu abebehambele umcimbi, bebhale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi isteji nezindawo zokuhlala bekungekho ezingeni elijwayelekile lalo mcimbi. Ekhuluma neSolezwe uMjosty, uthe akazi nokuthi kumele abe nomuzwa onjani njengoba abantu sebemgxeka ngemizamo ayenzile. "Ngimemezele zisuka nje ngalo mcimbi ukuthi uxhaso asilutholanga ngakho konke besikwenza kusuka ephaketheni lethu. Abaculi, abantu abasinike isteji kanye namatende, onogada konke besikunikelelwe abantu esisebudlelwaneni obuhle kakhulu nabo, imali besingenayo. Yingakho izinto bezingekho esimeni esijwayelekile futhi ngalokho sithanda ukuxolisa kakhulu," kusho uMjosty. Uthe ukubonile ukuphawula kwabantu futhi ucela behlise umoya njengoba benza konke ukuthi umcimbi uqhubeke ube khona yize babebhekene nobunzima njengabahleli. "Mina ngithanda ukubonga kubona bonke abantu nabaculi ngokuzinikela ekutheni beze kulo mcimbi, siyathembisa ukuthi ngokuzayo konke kuzoba ngcono kunalokhu okuyikhona manje. Umoya wami wonakele kakhulu ngengikuzwayo futhi njengoba konke bekubheke mina, akukho ebengingakwenza ngedwa. Engingakusho nje wukuthi ngiphatheke kabi, kodwa okunye bekumele kuxoxwe njengoba kulo mkhakha sisebenzisana," kuchaza uMjosty. Emcimbini walo nyaka kuqopheke umlando kuhlonishwa abaculi bowokholo abahlukene ngezindondo abahleli bomcimbi abazimemezela ngonyaka odlule. UThobekile, Andile KaMajola iqembu i-Avante nabanye bahlonishwe ngezindondo kulo mcimbi ngomsebenzi wabo emculweni wokholo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: Kusukela kwesokunxele wuSimzuzile Damisa, Thandeka Ngobese, Mendy Mbatha, Akhona Cele, Akhona Ngema no-Andile Moyana bephahle uNksz Zime Msweli - ongumsunguli womncintiswano wokumodela u-Miss KZN Queen ABESIFAZANE asebenezingane kodwa abanothando nentshisekelo yokuchuma emkhakheni wokumodela sebenikwe ithuba lokungenela u-Miss KZN Queen 2026/27, umncintiswano wokumodela osuvulele intsha yesifazane amathuba amaningi okumodela. Lezi zindaba zidalulwe wumsunguli walo mncintiswano, uNksz Zime Msweli othe bese kuyisikhathi eside kakhulu abantu bemcela ukuthi axegise kancane imithetho yokungenela umncintiswano, ukuze onobuhle asebezele bangavaleleki ngaphandle. “Ngibuye ngaphushwa nawukuthi okuningi kwesikwenzayo sisuke silandela imithetho nendlela yokwenza emincintiswaneni yokumodela emikhulu o-Miss Universe no-Miss World, nabo asebevele sebekwenzile lokhu kokuxegisa imithetho, sibonile futhi kwenzeka okufanayo nakuMiss South Africa lana ezweni lethu,” kusho uNksz Msweli. UNELISA Khumalo ophethe isicoco sika-Miss KZN Queen 2026 Eqhuba, uthe njengoba bebuya ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulo nyaka ngalo mncintiswano babheke ukwamukela onobuhle abawu-30 abazobahlukanisa kabili ngokwemikhakha yeminyaka yabo okungowe-Teen ongenelwa ngabano-15 kuya ku-32, nowama-Senior ongenelwa onobuhle abaneminyaka ewu-19 kuya ku-34. Ukungenela nonyaka kuvalwa ngoMeyi 16. “Sesivele sesivulile ngokusemthethweni imingenelo yalo nyaka esibheke ukuthi sizame ukwenza kube khona onobuhle asebezele esizobanika ithuba lokuzibonakalisa ukuthi yikuphi okuhle abangeza nakho kulo mncintiswano. Nokho kumele sisho ukuthi ngeke sibathambisele isandla  konke sizozama ukukwenza ngendlela eqondile nenobulungiswa,” kusho uNksz Msweli. “Nanokuthi njengoba ngiwumuntu osebenzisa kakhulu izinkundla zokuxhumana bese kukaningi ngiqaphela ukugxekwa kubuye kukhulunywe kabi ngabantu besifazana abanezingane, engicabanga ukuthi leli thuba lizokwenza ukuthi bazibonakalise,” kusho yena. UNELISA Khumalo ophethe isicoco sika-Miss KZN Queen 2026 U-Miss KZN Queen usuvule iminyango futhi wathuthukisa onobuhle abehlukene endimeni kubalwa u-Ayanda Thabethe owawunqoba ngo-2020, nowalala isibili kuMiss SA ngo-2022, Anelisa Nxele noSibusisiwe Zwane abangena kwi-Top 30 yawo uMiss SA ngo-2023. Konobuhle abanqobe lo mncintiswano eminyakeni edlule kukhona uSithabile Mnyandu ngo-2018, Kholeka Dlamini ngo-2019, Ayanda Thabethe ngo-2020/21.Philasande Ngcamu ngo-2022, Sibusisiwe Zwane ngo-2023, Nkazimulo Tshabalala ngo-2024, Nothando Mngadi ngo-2025 nophethe isicoco kulo nyaka uNelisa Khumalo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ZETHUKILE izikhulu kuMasipala uMdoni, eScottburgh, kulandela ukuvela kwezinsolo zokuthi inkabi ethelwe othulini ngamaphoyisa ezintatha zayizolo, ibihlela ukuyobulala ezinye zezikhulu. Lokhu kuvele ngesikhathi abesiteshi sezindaba zikamabonakude esikhokhelwayo, i-eNCA, beveza ukuthi umufi oneminyaka engu-41 obulawe ePinetown, ngesikhathi kukhona ukudubulana phakathi wakhe namaphoyisa, ubehlela ukuyosoconga izikhulu zalo masipala. Umthombo ongomunye wosopolitiki ngaphakathi kulo masipala, uthe zibethusile lezi zindaba ngoba bekungakaze kube khona osolayo ukuthi uzoyiswa kwagoqanyawo. “Akekho obeseke wathola izinsongo zokuthi uzobulawa futhi azikho izinxushunxushu ezikhona kumasipala ngakho-ke sididekile ukuthi lolu lwazi luqhamukaphi,” kusho umthombo. Uthe nakuba bengenalo ulwazi lokuthi izinsolo ziqhamukaphi kodwa lubathe heqe uvalo ngesikhathi bethola ngazo. “Phela ezinye izigelekeqe zihlanganisa itulo lokubulala umuntu, kungabi bikho miyalezo yezinsongo ethunyelwayo kulowo osuke ezobulawa, kubonakale ngaye nje esesocongwa,” kusho umthombo. Udalule eyokuthi lona wesilisa ongqoklozwe amaphoyisa ebhace ePinetown, udabuka eMzinto. “Kubo kukhona la eMzinto, ubedume ngelikaCilo. Sengisilibele isibongo sakhe,” kusho umthombo. Uthe umufi ubazana kakhulu nenye inkabi ayigagule ngegama, athe ibulawe eduze kwesitolo sendawo ngoJanuwari nonyaka. Uveze ukuthi yasocongwa kade kunomhlangano mayelana nokulungiswa komgwaqo endaweni. “Umufi waziwa kakhulu ngokuba yinkabi ebisetshenziswa ukuqotha abemboni yamatekisi,” kuqhuba umthombo. Kuthintwa iMeya kaMasipala waseMdoni, uNkk Mbali Cele-Luthuli, ithe akukho abakwaziyo ngokuthi kukhona izikhulu ebese zibalelwe izinsuku zokuphila. Nokho ithe ngeke babayithandabuze eyokuqinisa ezokuphepha kwezikhulu zalo masipala uma kuvela ukuthi izinsolo zokusocongwa kwazo ziyiqiniso. “Sisathumele imenenja kamasipala ukuthi isixhumanele namaphoyisa ukuthola kabanzi ngalezi zinsolo esizibone ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Uma ebuyisa impendulo ekhomba ukuthi kukhona izikhulu ezisengcupheni yokubulawa, sizoziqinisa ezokuphepha,” kusho uNkk Cele-Luthuli. Uthe bazoyiphenya eyalezi zinsolo ukuthi iqhamukaphi. “Akekho obesabike ngokuthi kukhona izinsongo zokubulala noma zokusatshiswa,” isho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe umsolwa obefunelwa uxhaxha lwamacala eSouth Coast, udutshulwe wabulawa ngesikhathi kukhona ukudubulana phakathi kwakhe namaphoyisa eManors, ePinetown. "Amaphoyisa athole umkhondo ngendawo lapho umsolwa abemfuna ebebhace khona. Athe uma enikela khona, kube khona ukudubulana phakathi kwakhe namaphoyisa, wafa. Kutholwe isibhamu ezincane nezinkulu endaweni yesigameko," kusho uNetshiunda.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UWinnie Ntshaba ongumsunguli wamaRoyalty Soapie Awards Image: Instagram/Winnie Ntshaba AYAQHUBEKA amalungiselelo amaRoyalty Soapie Awards okulindeleke ukuthi abuye nonyaka emuva kokungasingathwa nyakenye ngenxa yezizathu ezahlukene. Le miklomelo yasungulwa nguWinnie Ntshaba ongumlingisi ozakhele udumo kwiGenerations: The Legacy neminye imidlalo. Emuva kwamaSouth African Film and Television Awards abengempelasonto eGoli abalingisi nabasemkhakheni wethelevishini basuke sebebheke wona. Okhulumela abagqugquzeli, uSimphiwe Majola, utshele Isolezwe phambilini ukuthi u-2025 bekungowokucabangisisa nokuhlela izinto kabusha. “Esikhundleni sokujaha ukwenza into engeke ibe sezingeni lethu, sithathe isinqumo sokuhlaba ikhefu silungise bese siqinisa isisekelo. Okubalulekile kithina ukwenza imiklomelo ekhombisa izinga eliphezulu, ethembekile futhi enomthelela omuhle, hhayi ukugcina icala,” kusho uSimphiwe. USimphiwe uphinde washayelwa ebuzwa ngamalungiselelo kulandela ukungamenyezelwa kwabaqokiwe nokuvula ukuvota ngenyanga edlule njengoba kwakushiwo. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kwathiwa abantu abalindele uMashi 14 kodwa kwagcina kungenzekanga lutho. Uthe amalungiselelo aqhubeka kahle. "Imiklomelo ihlelelwe uSepthemba futhi konke kusahlelwa ngasese. Imingenelo ihambe kahle futhi ithimba lisebenza ngesigaba esilandelayo," kusho uSimphiwe. Uthe ngokuhamba kwesikhathi bazomemezela usuku lokumenyezelwa kwabaqokiwe, abaxhasi neminye imininingwane. AmaRoyalty Soapie Awards anonyaka, uma egcina enzekile, kuzobe kungawesishiyagalombili. Isiyonke iminxa iwu-28 futhi kulokhu kuzokwethulwa nomusha we-Outstanding Pan-African Show. Kuzoklonyeliswa imidlalo yasemazweni ase-Afrika angaphandle kweNingizimu Afrika.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kulindeleke ukuthi bavele abasolwa ngokubamba imoto yemali ngaseFilidi NgoMgqibelo mhla Ephreli oKlebe e-Richards Bay Serious Organised Crime Investigation esebenzisana neZululand District Task Team abophe abasolwa abathathu abaneminyaka engu-35, 44 no-64. Laba bobathathu baboshelwe icala lokuphanga imoto yemali elenzeka eGluckstadt ngasejikeni laseLenjani ngomhlaka-14 Mashi 2026. Kusolwa ukuthi imoto ibihamba ku-R34 isuka oLundi iya eVryheid ngesikhathi ihlaselwa abasolwa. Badubula kaningi bebhekise kuyo yaze yama. Babe sebekhipha onogada babaphuca izibhamu zomsebenzi. Abasolwa bathathe onogada babayisa endaweni evulekile base besebenzisa iziqhumane ukuqhumisa imoto. Abasolwa babaleke nesamba semali esingadalulwanga nezibhamu ezimbili kanye nesibhamu esisodwa sohlobo lwe-9mm. Kubikwe icala lemali lokugebenga kuhlonyiwe lavulwa esiteshini samaphoyisa eGluckstadt kanti amalungu oKlebe ahambele endaweni yesigameko. Emuva kwamasonto amathathu kwatholakala imininingwane yokuthi abasolwa bakuphi kwase kwenziwa uhlelo lokulandela umkhondo wabo. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso kuboshwe abasolwa abathathu kwashaqwa nezimoto ezimbili ezasetshenziswa kwenziwa ubugebengu. Kulindeleke ukuthi bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseVryheid namuhla, 7 Ephreli 2026.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kubikwa ukuthi uzovela eNkantolo ngoLwesibili uFannie Nkosi Image: Oupa Mokoena / IOL Graphics Kubikwa ukuthi kibhaliswe icala ePretoria North elithinta ilungu le-SAPS elimisiwe uSgt Fannie Hezekiel Nkosi. La macala ahlanganisa ukutholakala nezinhlamvu ezingekho emthethweni, ukweba, ukwephula umthetho, nokwehluleka ukugcina izibhamu nezinhlamvu ngokoMthetho Wokulawulwa Kwezibhamu. ngoLwesine mhla ku-Ephreli cishe ngo-07:30, “Ithimba loKlebe ligasele ekhaya likaNkosi nencwadi i-J50. Ngesikhathi kuqhutshwa umsebenzi, iziphathimandla zishaqe izinhlamvu ezingu-490 ezingekho emthethweni kanye nebhomu lesandla elilodwa. Kuphinde kwatholakala namadokodo amaningi avela eziteshini zamaphoyisa ezahlukene. Ithimba liphinde lathola izibhamu eziningi zingagcinwanga endaweni ephephile. Lezi zihlanganisa izibhamu ezine, izibhamu ezintathu kanye nesibhamu esisodwa. Ukuhlolwa kuqinisekisiwe ukuthi izibhamu zibhaliswe negama likaNkosi, namalayisensi asemthethweni aveziwe. Ngemuva kwalokho kusesha, kwengezwe amacala, okuhlanganisa ukuphatha budedengu izibhamu kanye nokutholakala nesiqhumane esingavunyelwe. UNkosi uboshwe wagqunywa esiteshini zamaphoyisa ePretoria North ngaphansi kwenqubo yeSAPS 14. Kulindeleke ukuthi avele enkantolo ngoLwesibili, mhla ka-7 Ephreli 2026. Kubikwa ukuthi ithimba lakwaMadlanga” lihlela ukumsusa e-Pretoria North imyise endaweni ephephile nengakadalulwa. Izungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana incwadi yokuboshwa kukaFannie Nkosi

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Omunye wabaculi baphesheya kwezilwandle uJill Scott, oke wabonakala kuleli enandisa emcimbini iDStv Delicious festival ABAPHATHI abasha benkampani yakwaMultichoice, iCanal + bayaqhubeka nokwenza izinguquko kule nkampani njengoba sekuvela izindaba zokuthi sebeqedile ngesivumelwano sokuba yingxenye yomcimbi omkhulu iDStv Delicious Festival. Kuvele ukuthi bathe umcimbi awubasizi ngalutho. Lo mcimbi obudonsa amehlo abaningi kuleli nase-Afrika yonkana, udonsa izinsuku ezimbili futhi kusuke kuboshelwe abaculi bakuleli, abase-Afrika nabaphesheya kwezilwandle. Umthombo weSolezwe ongaphakathi, uziqinisekisile lezi zindaba ezisabalale ngempelasonto wathi ziningi izinguquko ezizozwakala njengoba iCanal+ ihlela ukunciphisa izindleko zemali ephumayo kule nkampani. "Okwamanje iCanal+, ekufunayo wukuthi amakhasimende ayo abukele izinhlelo ngezindleko eziphansi ukuze akwazi ukuthenga ama-decoder futhi aqhubeke nokujabulela izinhlelo ezehlukene zethelevishini. Bafuna kubuye amakhasimende amadala azokwazi ukukhokhela ukubuka izinhlelo, kunokuthi balahlekelwe akhona manje abambe le nkampani ukuthi ingawi bhu phansi," kusho umthombo weSolezwe. Bathe bakhethe ukungabi yingxenye yabaxhasa lo mcimbi ngenxa yokuthi udla izindodla zemali. "Miningi imicimbi iDStv engeke isaba yingxenye yayo ngenxa yokuthi ivaliwe ekutheni ibe abaxhasi bayo. Imicimbi yezindondo ebijwayele ukuba khona yeMzansi Magic, neyesiteshi sesibhunu ikykNET, yonke kuthiwa izovalwa ngoba ayikho inzuzo eyingenisa esiteshini. Neminye ebiyenziwa yinkampani kuvezwa izinhlelo neminye emikhulu, nayo ivaliwe ngenxa yokuncishiswa kwezindleko," kuphetha umthombo. Kuthiwa iCanal+ lokhu ayikwenzi nje kuleli kuphela kodwa nakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika babhekene nenkinga efanayo yokunciphisa izindleko bese bezama ukungenisa inzuzo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje basanda kuvala isiteshi iShowmax, ebesibukwa ngokukhokhelwa, naso abakhale ngokuthi sidla imali eningi njengoba kuqashwe izikhulu nabasebenzi abakhokhelwa imali eshisiwe kodwa naso ayikho imali esiyingenisayo. Elinye lamaphephandaba angempelasonto, liveze ukuthi iCanal+ ihlela ukuthi ngo-2030 ibe isibuyise imali engu €400 million (R7.5 billion), ngokunciphisa ukuxhasa imicimbi ehlukene edla imali eshisiwe.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-LIMIT Nala ongomunye wabaculi bakamaskandi abasanda kukhipha i-albhamu eshisa izikhotha abazobe bekhona emcimbini i-Blue Nation Festival UMCULI waseMandaba, eNkandla, uKhuzani Mpungose, useveze ukuthi umcimbi i-Blue Naton Festival awenza eCarnival City, owokuhlanganisa abalandeli bakhe amaBlue Nation kodwa okukhulu ukuthi kuphinde kubumbane isizwe sikamaskandi. Lo mcimbi ozoba ngowesibili kulo nyaka, uzoba ngoMeyi 2, kanti uqale ngegiya eliphezulu ngonyaka odlule, lapho wahanjelwa yizinkumbi zabantu zisuka ezindaweni ezahlukene kuleli ziyojabula naleli qhawe. Emcimbini walo nyaka, uKhuzani uthe ufuna ukuqhubeka nokuhlanganisa isizwe sikamaskandi, ngokwenza umcimbi walolu hlobo nozakwabo abashisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku, ngezingoma zabo. "Abanye ozakwethu sengibamemezele abazoba yingxenye yomcimbi, abantu abakhombise ukubathakasela kakhulu. Ngifuna umkhakha kamaskandi ubumbane ube yinto eyodwa usebenzisa umculo wawo. Konke lokhu sizokwenza ngokuthi sibambane uma senza imicimbi efana nalena. Liyajabulisa isasasa elikhonjiswa ngisho abeza kuwo njengoba bethenga amathikithi ubuthaphuthaphu, okuyinto ebakhuthazayo," kusho uKhuzani. Uthe abanye abaculi ababaqashayo babathatha ngento abayenzayo kulo mculo njengoba bewuphethe ngesizotha, abanye bazibhalela wona futhi bawucula ngezindlela ezithinta izinhliziyo zabantu abahlukene. "Kukhona abaculi abathi uma bengena esteji bavuse injabulo, amandla nomoya wesintu kubantu abasuke besemcimbini ngomculo wabo. Abanye izingoma zabo zinomsindo ohlukile nomdlandla esteji, okuyinto leyo ejabulisa abantu abasuke bebukele. Abanye baneminyaka embalwa kule ndima kodwa amandla abanawo manje, izingoma zabo zithinta inhliziyo okuyinto esiyifunela abalandeli bethu leyo uma sihlela imicimbi yalolu hlobo," kusho uKhuzani. Kubaculi aseveze ukuthi bazoba khona okwamanje kubalwa insizwa yaseNquthu, uJaiva Zimnike, Gatsheni, Njoko, Menzi, Limit Nala, Mzukulu, Shenge waseHlalankosi, Mlabalaba, Mafikizolo, Nkeshemba, Feza. Namhlanje uKhuzani uveze ukuthi uzokhipha uhlu oluphelele lwabaculi nabaphathi bohlelo abazobe bekhona. Umsakazi woKhozi FM uZimdollar, osanda kumemezela ukuthi usebeka amakhokho ethala ekuphatheni imicimbi kamaskandi, kulindeleke ukuthi avalelise kuwona lo mcimbi okokugcina enza lo msebenzi. Amathikithi alo mcimbi ayatholakala eWebticket ngo-R200, R250 no-R300.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UKUFIKA kwamasosha eKapa, akushintshe lutho njengoba eqhubeka amaqembu emigulukudu ngempi yezibhamu KUDUTSHULWE abantu abayisishiyagalombili eMitchells Plain ngoLwesibili ntambama, ezigamekweni ezahlukene. Izigameko zokudubulana zithuse abaningi njengoba bebenethemba lokuthi ukufika kombutho wezokuVikela waseNingizimu Afrika (i-SANDF) ojutshwe eCape Flats, kuzokwenza umehluko. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseWestern Cape, uColonel Andrè Traut, uthe izigameko zokudubula zidluliselwe ophikweni olulwa nezigelekeqe ukuze luphenye. Esigamekweni sokuqala, kudutshulwa abantu abayisikhombisa ngaphambi kwehora lesithathu ntambama erenki yamatekisi eHazeldene. "Kubikwa ukuthi abasolwa abangaziwa bavulele ngenhlamvu bebhekise kwiqulu labantu, kwashona amadoda amabili aneminyaka engu-20 no-22. Zombili izisulu kuthiwa zishonele endaweni yesigameko. Abesilisa ababili abadala nezingane ezintathu, okuhlanganisa nentombazane eneminyaka eyisithupha ubudala nabafana ababili abaneminyaka engu-12 no-13, balimele baphuthunyiswa esibhedlela ukuze bathole ukwelashwa," kusho uTraut. Amaphoyisa avule amadokodo amabili okubulala nayisihlanu okuzama ukubulala ukuze kuphenywe. UTraut uthe imbangela yokuhlasela ayikaziwa okwamanje, wathi abasolwa babaleke endaweni yesigameko ngemuva kwesigameko sokudubula. Kwesinye isigameko esenzeke ePortlands, owesilisa (26), udutshulwe wabulawa abasolwa abangaziwa kuMerrydale Street. Abasolwa babaleke endaweni yesigameko ngemoto. "Isisulu sibe namanxeba amaningi okudutshulwa kanti kuthiwa sishonele endaweni yesigameko. Lesi sigameko kukholakala ukuthi sihlobene namaqembu ezigelekeqe," kusho uTraut. Zombili izigameko zokudubula ziphenywa ngamalungu ophiko olulwa nezigelekeqe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kudedelwe imigomo ethinta ukukhulelwa kwabafundi ezikoleni ukuze umphakathi uphawule ngayo INGCABHA isemphakathini ukuthi uphawule ngemigomo ethinta indlela okumele izikole zisingathe ngayo udaba lokukhulelwa kwabafundi besafunda. Le migomo esemthethweni iBasic Educations Laws Act (Bela), idedelwe nguNgqongqoshe woMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube ukuze umphakathi uphawule ngayo. Uthe le migomo ivikela ilungelo lomfundi osuke ekhulelwe esasesikoleni. "Iqinisekisa ukuthi umfundi okhulelwe, kumele asekwe yisikole ngesikhathi esakhulelwe. Iqinisekisa nokuthi kumele abuyele esikoleni uma esetetile, angaxoshwa noma anqatshelwe ukubuyela esikoleni," usho kanje. Uthe izikole akumele zihlukumeze umfundi osuke ekhulelwe noma zimkhiphe inyumbazane. "Ngokubambisana nomnyango wezeMpilo, kumele asekwe ngesikhathi engakateti kanjalo noma esetetile ngokuthi anikwe usizo lwezokululekwa. Likhulu ibanga eselihanjiwe kuleli ukuvikela abafundi abakhulelwe," kusho uNksz Gwarube. Uthe sesadlula isikhathi lapho abafundi abakhulelwe, abebexoshwa ezikoleni ngenxa yokuthi bakhulelwe. "Ukuxoshwa kwabo kwakunyusa izinga lokuthi balaxaze isikole, bengaqedanga. Sifuna wonke umfundi alithole ithuba lokuqeda isikole ngaphandle kokucwaswa." Okunye akuvezile ngukuthi kuzobaluleka ukubika abafundi abangaphansi kweminyaka engu-16, abakhulelwe. "Kumele babikwe ngokushesha emnyangweni wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi kanjalo nasemaphoyiseni ukuze kube nokungenelela." Sezike zakhala izinyunyana zothisha ngokukhishwa amancozuncozu kwale migomo ethinta izikole, kulandela ukuphasiswa kwalo mthetho. Yasusa umsindo eyalo mthetho ngesikhathi kunezigcawu zomphakathi njengoba kukhona ababewuchitha. Okunye okuqukethwe kuwona ngukuthi uGrade R, usuyimpoqo kuleli ekubeni phambilini uGrade 1 iwona owawuyimpoqo. Kusaneminye imigomo esazodedelwa emuva kokuphothulwa kwethinta ukukhulelwa kwabafundi. UNksz Gwarube uthe abantu bangaletha ukuphawula kwabo ku:[email protected]. Bangakwenza lokhu zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30 njengoba isimemezelo sishicilelwe emqulwini kahulumeni, ngoMashi 25, 2026.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMLINGISI wodumo emidlalweni yethelevishini, uThobani Nzuza ukhuza ibuya ngomdlalo wakhe weshashalazi othi, Boy Ntulikazi, azolingisa kuwo eThekwini ngenyanga ezayo OMUNYE wabalingisi abangaconsi phansi emdlalweni we-etv othi Isitha: The Enemy, uThobani Nzuza usememezele ukuthi nonyaka uzokhuza ibuya ngomdlalo wakhe weshashalazi othi, Boy Ntulikazi, okuyiwona aphendla ngawo intuba kwezokulingisa. Lo mdlalo weshashalazi agqama ngawo esaqeqeshelwa ukulingisa eDurban University of Technology ngo-2015, nanqoba inqwaba yemiklomelo ngawo, uzokhonjiswa eSeabroke Theatre, eDurban High School, eThekwini ngoMeyi 1 kuya ku-3. Engxoxweni neSolezwe ngalo mdlalo awubhale ngokuhlanganyela noKagiso Tsimakwane, uThobani uthe uqoke ukuwubuyisa kulo nyaka ngenxa yokuthi bese kuyisikhathi eside agcina ukuwenza njengoba wagcina ukuba khona ngo-2019. Uthe ubengasitholi kahle isikhathi sokugxila kuwona ngenxa yokuthi ubehlale exinwe kakhulu yimidlalo yethelevishini asebenza kuyo. “Ngikuqondanise nokuthi kulo nyaka kulo mcimbi kuzobe kutholakala nencwadi yawo lo mdlalo, esikwenzele ukuthi kube lula ukuqonda indikimba yawo ebantiwni abakhonze ukulandela imisebenzi yokubuciko ngokufunda izincwadi,” usho kanje. AMAZWIBELA okunye okuzokwenzeka emdlalweni weshashalazi kaThobani Nzuza osihloko sithi, Boy Ntulikazi, akhuza ngawo ibuya nazolingisa kuwo ngakubo eThekwini ngenyanga ezayo Eqhuba uthe lo mdlalo uqukethe indikimba ngokwenza ukuthi abantu abasha bangene ebugebengwini nokwenza ukuthi bakhulelwe besebancane. “Kukhona futhi uhlangothi lwendaba oluveza ukuthi ukucwasa ngokwebala kuba nomthelela omubi kangakanani emuntwini, okuwuhlangothi oluvezwe kakhulu wuKagiso ngoba yena ukhulele eKimberly, eNorthern Cape, ngakho izimo zokucwasana ngokwebala uzibone eduze, mina ngigqamisa engikubone elokishini ngoba ngikhulele eMlaza,” kusho uThobani. Udalule nokuthi uzolingisa izindawo zabalingisi abawu-11 bomdlalo eyedwa, bese elekelelwa wumculi uHloniphani Art, ozobe ecula futhi edlala nesiginci kube kuqhubeka umdlalo. NgoMeyi 1 no-2 lo mdlalo uzokhonjiswa ngo-7 kusihlwa, bese kuthi ngoMeyi 3 ukhonjiswe ngo-3 ntambama. Amathikithi okuwubuka abiza u-R200 eComputicket, eShoprite naseCheckers - kanti nencwadi yawo izobe itholakala emcimbini ngawo uR200 iyinye. Amagalelo kaThobani ayazikhulumela endimeni yokulingisa njengoba eselingise emidlalweni yethelevishini ehlukene esingabala kuyona iHostela, Isipho: The Gift, i-The Black Door, nalingisa kuwona manje - Isitha: The Enemy.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuthiwa uyalulama esibhedlela u-Offset ngemuva kokudutshulwa eCasino Image: Picture:X/@KiariMedia NgoMsombuluko ebusuku (April 6), kubikwa ukuthi umrepha owayeyilungu leqembu i-Migos u-Offset usinde edutshulwa eSeminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino eHollywood, ngesikhathi edutshulwa ngezithuba zabo-7 ebusuku. Kuthiwa lezi zindaba ziqinisekiswe umkhulumeli wakhe ngesitatimende esithunyelwe kwabezindaba ukuthi lo mrepha usesimweni esigculisayo esibhedlela sendawo. "Singaqinisekisa ukuthi u-Offset ogama lakhe langempela nguKiari Kendrell Cephus udutshuliwe futhi okwamanje usesibhedlela uthola usizo lwezempilo.Uzinzile futhi uqashwe ngeso lokhozi,” sifundeka isitatimende. Ngokusho kwe-TMZ, amaphoyisa ase-Seminole unikeze imininingwane ngesigameko, lapho kuboshwe abantu ababili. "Siyazi ngesigameko esenzeke ngemuva kwehora lesikhombisa ebusuku ngoMsombuluko ngaphandle kwaseSeminole Hard Rock Hollywood esiholele ekulimaleni komuntu oyedwa ophuthunyiswe esibhedlela iMemorial Regional Hospital eHollywood," kusho amaphoyisa ngesitatimende. Amaphoyisa afike ngokuphazima kweso kwavalwa indawo okwenzeke kuyo lesi sehlo. "Abantu ababili baboshwe." Uphenyo lusaqhubeka. Indawo ivikelekile futhi akukho usongo emphakathini. Imisebenzi isaqhubeka njengokujwayelekile."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu INGXENYE yethimba lesikhashana elihola i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal, idliwe yizembe ngesikhathi kwenziwa izinguquko ebuholini nguNobhala Jikelele wenhlangano, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, abuchaza njengohlobo lwemoto i-Tazz. UMbalula umemezele izinguquko ebuholini besifundazwe ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba, izolo, eThekwini. Wenze isimemezelo emva kokuhlangana nobuholi esifundazweni. Kulezi zinguquko abaholi abaqavile okubalwa kubo obengumdidiyeli wethimba, uMnuz Jeff Radebe, obeyiphini lomdidiyeli wethimba, uNkk Weziwe Thusi, nobeyiPhini likamgqugquzeli, uNkk Nomusa Dube-Ncube, badliwe yizembe. Obengumgqugquzeli wethimba, uMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu, uyena osezoba umdidiyeli wethimba. Owayeyimeya kaMasipala waseThekwini, uMnuz James Nxumalo, uqokelwe kwesikamgquguqquzeli wethimba. Owayengumphathiswa woMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uNkk Bongi Sithole-Moloi, uqokelwe kwesePhini likamdidiyeli. IMeya kaMasipala wesiFunda uMkhanyakude, uMnuz Siphile Mdaka, iqokelwe kwesePhini lomgqugquzeli. Abaphathiswa; uMnuz Siboniso Duma noNksz Nomagugu Simelane bazoqhubeka nezikhundla abaziphethe. UMbalula umemezele ukuthi kuzoncishiswa isibalo samalungu ethimba. Phambilini, uMbalula wakhala ngokuthi ithimba ebelikhona liyahluleka ukwenza umsebenzi walo waze walifanisa nemoto i-Tazz. Kepha izolo, uMbalula akazange afune ukubeka amabala ithimba ebeliphethe. "Isikhathi sabo bese siphelile. Senze izinguquko ngenxa yokuthi sifuna ukuthi iqembu lisebenze kangcono esifundazweni. Angifuni ukugxila kakhulu ezintweni ezedlule. Sibheke kabanzi isimo esifundazweni futhi siyazi ukuthi yini okufanele siyenze. Sizojuba amalungu esigungu esiphezulu ukuthi ayolekelela ithimba. Amalungu esigungu esiphezulu azojutshwa kuzo zonke izifunda." UMbalula ubonge abebeyingxenye yethimba. Uthe uRadebe unikezwe omunye umsebenzi eqenjini. "Sizomemezela maduze ukuthi unikezwe muphi umsebenzi." UMbalula uphinde waveza ukuthi bazoba nemihlangano kuzo zonke izifunda lapho bezokwazisa khona amalungu enhlangano ngesinqumo esithinta ubudlelwano babo nedlelandawonye elizongenela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngokuzimela, i-SACP. "Sizokwazisa onke amalungu enhlangano ngesinqumo esithathwe emhlanganweni wesigungu esiphezulu okhethekile obungesonto eledlule. Sesiqalile vele ukwazisa amadlelandawonye ngesinqumo sesigungu esiphezulu. Sizoxoxa namakadebona kwi-ANC, uphiko lwabesifazane kanye nophiko lwentsha."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Timothy Bernard/Independent Media ILUNGU lePhalamende leRise Mzansi, uMnuz Makashule Gana, selihlabe ikhwelo kuNgqongqoshe wezoHwebo neziMboni nokuNcintisana, uMnuz Parks Tau, nophiko lwasezifundazweni olukhipha amalayisensi ezinkampanini zokugembula nge-internet (online), ukuthi balumise nse lolu hlelo. UGana uthe lezi zimvume zikhishwa kalula nanoma yikanjani, wafanisa lokhu nokuthenga uswidi esitolo. Uthe amanye amazwe anemigomo eqinile ethinta ukukhishwa kwalezi zimvume, njengoba kuleli isibalo sazo sikhule saya ku-402. Image: Independent Media Archives Lesi sibalo sikhishwe nguTau ephendula uGana obebuze ukuthi zingaki lezi zinkampani ezinemvume yokwenza lokhu kuleli? UTau uveze ukuthi zevile ku-400 kanti kwamanye amazwe zincane kakhulu. "E-Australia zibalelwa ku-200, eBrazil zingu-81 kuthi eDenmark zingu-26. Kuleli zingu-402," kusho uTau empendulweni. Uthe lesi sibalo sikhule sisuka ku-288 ngo-2020 saya ku-402 nyakenye, okusho ukuthi sinyuke ngo-40% eminyakeni emihlanu edlule. UGana uthe isibalo salezi zinkampani sicwilisa abantu ebubheni abagembula imali yabo. "Kunento engahambi kahle ohlelweni lokukhishwa kwalezi zimvume kuleli. Sifuna ukuqeda ngesihlava sokugembula esihlasele kuleli," kusho uGana. Leli qembu lisekhaleni yokulwa le mpi yokugembula okuthiwa isidlange kakhulu ngisho kwabesifazane nakwizitshudeni. Izitshudeni kuthiwa zigembula ngemali eziyithola kuhulumeni yoxhaso, esikhwameni i-NSFAS. Umbiko webhodi elengamele ukugembula onyakenimali u-2024/2025, waveza ukuthi abantu bakuleli bachitha ngaphezu kuka-R1.5 trillion ngokugembula. Le mali kuthiwa yanyuka ngo-R400 billion uma uqhathanisa nonyakamali ongaphambilini. Leli bhodi laveza nokuthi kugembula ngisho nabahola isibonelelo sikahulumeni, sakwa-Sassa. Laveza nokuthi abantu abangu-52% abangasebenzi bangene shi ekugembuleni. Abaphakathi kweminyaka u-30 no-49, okuthiwa bangenwe kulo mshungo wokugembula. Iningi labo kwathiwa abesilisa. Okunye okwavela ukuthi umgembuli oyedwa kwabahlanu, bavuma ukuthi baze baboleke imali noma badayise izinto zabo ukuze bakwazi ukuqhubeka bagembule.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UPANJARO elenga kwibhonethi imoto ibe iphenduka emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Craig Kolesky/Red Bull Content Pool USIVIKELE ngempumelelo isicoco sakhe uJean “Panjaro” Kruger emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay’iMoto obuseSuncoast Casino, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Lo mncintiswano ubusubuya eThekwini okwesibili iminyaka ilandelana njengoba ubuqala ukuba khona nyakenye. Yilapho uPanjaro, ohlala eMahikeng, athatha khona isicoco kuBoksie waseKapa. Abashayeli banikezwa imizuzu emibili nohhafu wokuthi bashaye izidudla, bechushe nasezikhaleni, benze neminye imigilingwane ngemoto. Abanye baphuma imoto ihamba babuye bangene baqhubeke nokushayela. U-KING Tyler nomsizi wakhe benza abadume ngazo kwi-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Mpumelelo Macu/Red Bull Content Pool UPanjaro uhehe izethameli elenga kwibhonethi evulekile imoto ibe ishaya isidudla. Konke abakwenzayo kumele kwenelise amajaji nezethameli nazo ezivotayo. NgoLwesihlanu ebusuku, umncintiswano uqale kunabashayeli abangu-16, kwase kuyiwa kowamanqamu ngoMgqibelo, sekusele abayisishiyagalombili. Abane abathole amaphuzu amaningi banikwe ithuba lokuzikhethela abafuna ukuqhudelana nabo. Bese kusele uPanjaro, Magesh Junior, Team VQ25, King Tyler, uBubu okunguye yedwa obemele iKwaZulu-Natal, King Kruger ongumfowabo kaPanjaro, Team 2xSpicy JZ noBemors. Uhlelo beluphethwe nguHope Mbhele nomakadebona kulo mdlalo, uVic Pardal. Ngokunqoba kabili kulandelana, uPanjaro ulandele ezinyathelweni zikaSam Sam obeyijaji okokuqala kulokhu. USam Sam wanqoba ngo-2021 nango-2022. UPanjaro ongandanga ngamazwi uthe: “Ngiyabonga kakhulu ngokungeseka, ngizonibona ngonyaka ozayo.”

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-BLONDIE Makhene, ozogqamisa impilo yakhe neyomndeni ohlelweni oluzoqala ngeSonto kuMzansi Magic oluthi, The Makhene's INKAKHA endimeni yomculo neyazakhela igama ngeminyaka yama80s, uBlondie Makhene, isinxuse abantu bakuleli ukuthi abazokubona ohlelweni olugqamisa impilo yomndeni wakhe, uyakholelwa ukuthi abaningi badlulile kukho futhi abanye kukhona abazokufunda. Uhlelo i-The Makhene's luzoqala ukukhonjiswa ngeSonto, kuMzansi Magic ngo-7 ebusuku. Uthe ukubona abantu beshutha futhi konke kwenzeka phambi kwamehlo akhe ukuhlanganisa lolu hlelo, kumenze wangakholwa kusaqalwa kodwa manje ujabule ngoba lolu hlelo seluya kwithelevishini. "Kuyajabulisa ukubona konke sekugoqiwe, ekuqaleni bengingakholwa ukuthi sizofika lana sikhona manje. Ngisuka kude ezikhathini ezimnandi nezinzima kule ndima umuntu akuyona ngakho abantu bazobona ukuthi njengoba bese ngingabonakali nje bekwenzakali empilweni yami. Ukuba kulolu hlelo ngiyabona ngenye yezindlela zokubhekana nokhwantalala umuntu analo empilweni." Uthe: "Ngeke ngiqambe amanga, kube umzuzu ojabulisayo ukuqopha lolu hlelo, ukubona umndeni uhlangene kusho lukhulu kimi, njengoba konke sikwenze sizwana yize kukhona izinto okumele sizilungise sonke." Yize ethe yena ubedumile kodwa abantu bazobona ukuthi nabo njengabantu abasemehlweni omphakathi, kuzobonakala ukuthi bake babhekane nezinkinga ezinkulu futhi bazama ukuthola izixazululo zazo. "Ngikulindele ukugxekwa ngezinye izinto ezizovela kodwa engikwaziyo ukuthi kumele ukwamukela ukugxekwa okuyinto engayenza kudala empilweni. Ngazibekela umgomo wokuthi abantu kodwa akumele bangene bathi shi ezindabeni zami nomndeni wami, sonke siyawenza amaphutha. Ngisho ngibuka lana ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kugxekwa amalungu omndeni wami, ngibuka ngeso lokuthi akumele kube yinto abantu abasizakala ngayo, izinkundla zokuxhumana zilibulele izwe, kugcwele amabhoklolo akanise kuzona azenza ezawo. Lokhu kwenza ubuhlungu kubantu  esikhundleni sokuthi sibambane, siduduzane la kudingeka khona kodwa siyagxekana," kusho yena Kodwa nje akugcizelelayo ukuthi abantu balubuke uhlelo ngoba kukhona abangakufunda kulo, nasezintweni abadlule kuzo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMHOLI weRISE Mzansi, uMnuz Songezo Zibi AZONGENELA ukhetho ngokuzimela amaqembu amathathu, ayememezele ukuthi azobumbana, angenele ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change. La maqembu okuyiGOOD Party, RISE Mzansi neBosa, izolo akhiphe isitatimende esiveze ukuthi asezongenela ukhetho ngawodwana. Athe ngeke esangenela ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change ngoba kunezinto okusadingeke ukuthi kubhungwe kabanzi ngazo. "Phezu kokuba lilikhulu ibanga eselihanjiwe ekutheni kuhlanganiswe la maqembu ukuze angenele ukhetho ngokubambisana kodwa kunesidingo sokuthi kuqale kulungiswe ezinye zezinto. Lezi zinto ngeke zikwazi ukuphothulwa ngokushesha, njengoba ukhetho luseMome. Yingakho kunesidingo sokuthi amaqembu, aqhubeke nokuzimela okhethweni," kusho isitatimende salawa maqembu. Sithe la maqembu azobakhona ephepheni lokuvota, lapho ezobe ezimele geqe. "Ngeke esangenela ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change. Izwe lisenkingeni ngakho lidinga abaholi abanamava." Phambilini, la maqembu ayethe azobhalisa kwikhomishini eyengamele ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change, ukuze angenele ukhetho ngokuhlanganyela. Tourism Minister Patricia de Lille says the sector continues to play a vital role in strengthening South Africa’s economy, noting that international and domestic visitors contribute significantly to revenue while sustaining jobs across industries such as hospitality, transport, retail and heritage tourism.  UMHOLI weGOOD Party, uNkk Patricia de Lille IBosa iholwa nguDkt Mmusi Maimane, iGOOD Party iholwa nguNkk Patricia de Lille, kuthi iRISE Mzansi iholwa nguMnuz Songezo Zibi. La maqembu ayethe azojuba abantu abanamava abazowamela okhethweni. Ayethe azogxila ezintweni ezithinta imisebenzi, ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo kubantu, ezokuphepha, ukulwa nenkohlakalo, ukukhulisa umnotho nezinye izinselelo ezibhekene nezwe. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kulindeleke ukuthi usuku lokhetho lumenyezelwe ngaphambi kokuphela kukaJuni nonyaka. Ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari wangonyaka ozayo. Umholi we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, onguNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu kuleli, nguyena ozomemezela usuku lokhetho ngenxa yokuthi olohulumeni basekhaya. Uma kuwukhetho lukazwelonke, lumenyezelwa nguMengameli wezwe. UMHOLI weBosa, uDkt Mmusi Maimane Image: Phando Jikelo/ParliamentRSA

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBASETSANA Kumalo owake wathula uhlelo i-Top Billing, ekhuza ibuya ekupheleni kwale nyanga kuS3 KUPHENDULWE ihlaya ngokuthi kumele kuphenywe kanzima abazobonakala bekhombisa imizi yabo esezingeni eliphezulu, uma sekukhonjiswa uhlelo i-Top Billing, ezoqala ukubonakala ngo-Ephreli 30, ngo-7 ebusuku, kuS3. Lolu hlelo obeseluneminyaka lwaphela, kulindeleke ukuthi luqhubeke luvakashele osomabhizinisi, osaziwayo bakuleli nabaphumelele ukubona imizi abahlala kuyo. Kulona kubhekwa imizi emikhulu emihle, nemicimbi esezingeni eliphezulu, nayo okungeyona ekanoma ubani kodwa eyomntakabani. UBasetsana Kumalo wake wathula uhlelo i-Top Billing, ekhuza ibuya ekupheleni kwale nyanga kuS3. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, abantu bakuphendule ihlaya ukubuya kwalolu hlelo, kwathiwa inkampani eqoqa intela i-SARS neKhomishini kaMadlanga, kumele bavule amehlo babophe bonke abazovela kulo. U-@XekiHlongwane uthe: "Lubuyile uhlelo i-Top Billing, luzoba uhlelo oluzodonsa amehlo abaningi, uma nje i-SARS ingabalandeli labo abavelile". U-@uMaster_Sandz uthe: "Isibindi esikhulu kodwa ukubuyisa uhlelo i-Top Billing ngalesi sikhathi esibi kangaka ezweni". UBubang Semono uthe: "Ngiyibekile iMadlanga". U-@Markosonke1 uthe: "Ekugcineni i-Top Billing iyabuya. Njengabahlali bakuleli silindele iziqephu ezisezingeni eliphezulu. Ngifisa ukuthi isiqephu sokuqala sihambele emzini kaGareth Mnisi, sibone ukuthi wayisebenzisa kanjani imali ewu-R36 million. Isiqephu sesibili sibone umuzi kaHangwani Maumela, izimoto, nezinto eziphakathi endlini ezathengwa phesheya. Kule sizini umethuli kumele kube ophuma kwa-SARS, umshuthi kube abaphuma kumaHawks abeKhomishini kaMadlanga kube yibona abasichazela konke okusendlini. Asibafuni osaziwayo, sifuna osomathenda". UPatience Stevens ongumqondisi enkampanini iCardova Productions, eqopha lolu hlelo, uthe bajabule ukuthi ekugcineni abantu bakuleli bazolubona lolu hlelo. "Kulolu hlelo kusuke kukhonjiswa izindlela ezehlukene abantu abasuke bebungaza ngazo izinto abanazo. Ngakho ukulubuyisa manje kube isikhathi esikahle njengoba sisesikhathini la kubungazwa khona ngezindlela ezehlukene izindaba esinazo kuleli ngakho siyajabula. Sizoqhubeka ukuveza obekujwayeleke kulo kodwa ngendlela entsha, ejwayelekile ezokwazi ukuthi ijatshulelwe ababukeli balo manje, abanye abangakaze balubone phambilini," kusho uPatience. UDichaba Phalatse wakwaSABC uthe ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuyindlela efana nesiko yokukhombisa izinhlelo ezinomlando zakuleli. Uthe kuningi abantu abazokubona, okuzobafundisa, kubavule amehlo, okuyisinqumo abangazisoli ngaso ukubuyisa uhlelo olufana nalolu.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Kia Tasman entsha ishiya abantu abaningi behlukene phakathi ngendlela ebukeka ngayo BASUKELE isidleke sezinyosi kwaKia South Africa ngokwethula iveni labo lokuqala ngqa, iTasman, ababheke ukuzuza lukhulu ngalo. Umphumela kuyoba wukuthi zibatinyele okanye bafinyelele ekhekheni kube wuju lodwa. Izinyosi kulokhu yizingqungqulu ezikhonya emkhakheni wamaveni angama-double cab okuyi-Ford Ranger, Toyota Hilux, Isuzu D-Max, VW Amarok, GWM P-Series, Nissan Navara ne-Foton Tunland. Ngeke ubasole ngokuzama ukufika ojwini kwazise iconsisa amathe le makethe njengoba nyakenye kudayiswe ama-double cab angaphezu kuka-63 000. Uqala nje unyaka u-2026, evile ku-10 000 asefinyelele emakhasimendeni. Uma betinyeleka bazobe belandela ezinyathelweni zeMercedes-Benz ngeveni labo iX-Class eyayisuselwe kwiNissan Navara eyabhacaza baze bayihoxisa. Nokho iTasman ayifani neX-Class ngoba yona ayisuselwe ndawo, kunalokho kwaKia bayakhe kusuka phansi kuya phezulu. Ivele okokuqala emehlweni abantu ngo-2024 kwasuka okukhulu ukukhuluma ngendlela ebukeka ngayo. Namanje lokho kukhuluma akukapheli kusashiya abantu bengundaza ngezizathu ezingefani. Ngingomunye obeshaya amakhala kodwa emuva kokuyizwa ngezami izandla izinsukwana eWestern Cape ngesikhathi yethulwa, ngigcine sengingenankinga ngayo. Nabanye kungenzeka bajike umqondo uma sebeyijwayela. Ukuba le moto ingumuntu mhlawumbe beyizophiwa igama lokuthi uBuhlebuyeza. Ibukeka njengemoto encane okanye iSUV ngaphakathi iKia Tasman Okwamanje ezweni kukhona angu-150 futhi esinye isitokwe samaTasman angu-300 sisendleleni. Lokhu kukhombisa ngokusobala ukuzimisela kwabo ngokunyusa isibalo sezimoto abazidayisayo nonyaka, ngokusho kwesikhulu sakwa-Kia South Africa, uPaul Turnbull. Nyakenye badayise izimoto ezingu-18 843 nokuyisibalo esinyuke sisuka ku-14 103 ngo-2024. Ngo-2026, uTurnbull uthe bafuna ukudayisa ezingu-23 000 kuya phezulu. Ngale kweTasman, kunezinye izimoto ezintsha sha eziyisihlanu ezizayo nonyaka nezimbili ezinamagama asevele ekhona kuleli. Uma sibuyela kwiTasman, ngaphambili igolozile, iyagqama uma ithushuka. Iyagqama njengoba ubude bungu-5.410 mm kuthi ububanzi bube ngu- 1.930 mm. Ama-LED headlights ahlanganiswe nama-daytime running lights bawanameke ezinhlangothini bese ezansi kuba nama-fog lights. Ngikubone kuwabeka engcupheni yokulimala, ikakhulukazi uma usugudla ehlathini elithothene. Uma uyibuka ohlangothini kuvela amarimu angu-17 inch afakwe emasondweni angama-all terrain newindi langemuva elidimile. Kugqama amafenda aqumbile anombala omnyama okuthi uma uthanda uthole afana nombala ofana nomzimba wemoto. Esikhenkeni kunokokusivikela ukuthi singaklwebheki uma ulayishe impahla. Ngikuthandile ukuthi isivalo sesikhenke asisindi uma usivula noma usivala. Kuningi okunye ongakwengeza ngokuthanda kwakho njenge-bull bar, styling bar, i-roller shutter esikhenkeni kanjalo ne-towbar. I-towbar le ungakwazi ukudonsa ngayo isisindo esingu-3 500kg. ITasman ifika ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyi-LX edonsa ngamasondo amabili, SX ne-X-Pro ezidonsa ngawo wonke. “Wu-last number” iX-Pro ebesihamba ngayo. Ngaphakathi ungafunga ukuthi yi-SUV. Inezihlalo zesikhumba, ezangaphambili okwazi ukuzifudumeza uphinde uzibandise. Okunye okokushisisa yisiteringi. Iphinde ibe ne-touchscreen infotainment system engu-12.3 inch ehlangene ne-digital instrument cluster. Phakathi nendawo kuwona la ma-screen kunesinye esincane esikukhombisa amazinga okushisa nokuthi umoya uphuma kuphi. Besingabonakali kahle ngasohlangothini lomshayeli kudingeka ngitshekise ikhanda ukulunguza. Kwi-infotainment udlala umculo ngezipikha ezikhala kamnandi ze-Harman Kardon, ikukhombisa lonke ingaphandle njengoba inamakhamera zinhlangothi zombili ngaphambili nangemuva, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo nokunye. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi kunamabhathini asheshe akufikise kofuna ukukwenza ungathinti kwi-touchscreen ize ingcole. Ngibala inkinobho yokunyusa umsindo, ezokushintsha amazinga okushisa nokunye. Kunezimbobo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB ngaphambili, eyokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo nezinye ezimbili zokushaja ngemuva. Ngemuva isikhala sabagibeli ngisibone sikahle, kuphela ezinyaweni sincanyana. ITasman ifika nenjini eyodwa engu-2.2 litre kadizili ekhona nakwezinye izimoto zakwa-Kia njengeSorento. Inamandla angu-154kW ne-torque engu-440Nm bese kuthi u-gearbox ube yi-8 speed automatic. Indlela isisuse eWaterfront yaze yayophelela eLambert’s Bay, bude buduze nasezweni elingumakhelwane iNamibia. Sigudle etiyeleni, sangena obhuqwini, saphinde sabuyela etiyeleni. Ngisanda kuyisusa ngiyizwe sengathi inokuthanda ukushintshashintsha amagiya kodwa sagcina sijwayelene. Ngemuva ifika nokokuvikela isikhenke iKia Tasman Amandla abezwakala enele uma isukuma futhi iyicela indlela uma ngifuna ukudlula ezinye izimoto namaloli ahudula izinqola ezilayishe impahla. Inama-drive modes amane okungu-Eco, Normal, Sport no-Tow. Ngaphakathi ithule futhi uma umgwaqo uqala ukuba mubi bekuzwakala kodwa hhayi ngendlela ekhalisayo. Ngeke nokho uyibeke ezingeni leRanger. Ngichazwe yindlela ebambelela ngayo okusizwa kakhulu wukuthi idonsa ngawo wonke amasondo amandlla iwafake lapho edingeka khona. Uma uthanda uyayishintsha idonse ngamabili bese kuthi uma ususobhuqwini uyifake ku-4H okanye u-4Low. Ngike ngayishiya ku-4 Auto obhuqwini ngayibona ilubamba kodwa ngiyizwa ne-traction control ingenelela ukungigcina endleleni. Obhuqwini ibingakhalisi nhlobo ingazweli kakhulu futhi ilinyusa nejubane ngale kokukuthusa ngokuthi ingakuphosa esikhotheni. Akukho lapho sixakeke khona kwadingeka ukuthi sisebenzise i-diff lock kwazise asiziqwalanga izintaba. Angiboni ukuthi ibizoshaya phansi ngoba igabade ilishiye ngo-252mm. Ikwazi nokuzihambela yona uma uyifaka kuX-Trek ongawufanisa ne-cruise control yasobhuqwini. Siphinde sayihloma esihlabathini, okuyindawo ekwazi ukuhamba kuyo ngale kokuxakeka. Esiteringini kunamabhathini okukutshela ukuthi uhamba endaweni enjani njengasesihlabathini, ematsheni nasodakeni Yona ibe isizilungisa ngendlela efanele njengokuthi ithi ukulibamba igiya esihlabathini. KwaKia bathi ngo-100km iphuza amalitha angu-7.8 litres ethangini elingu-80 litres. Ngilunguze ngayibona idla 8.9l/100km. Ngokwami iTasman yiveni elisezingeni nelingase licoshacoshe emakhasimendeni. Izinyanga ezizayo yizona ezizosidweba sicace isithombe sokuthi abashayeli baseNingizimu Afrika bahamba nayo noma bazoqhubeka nokubambelela ezintandokazini zabo iRanger, Hilux okulindeleke entsha maduze neD-Max ethuthukisiwe ezokwethulwa noma yinini. Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4x2 LX                        R 679,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD SX                      R 879,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD X-PRO               R 999 995 Zifika ne-service plan yeminyaka eyisithupha noma u-90 000km, Roadside assistance weminyaka emihlanu engakalelwe banga ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu nayo engakalelwe banga.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABANYE babelaphi bendabuko ebebeyingxenye yosuku lokuvulwa kwekhemisi eHluhluwe iMfolozi Park KUHLOSWE ukuthi kulungiswe inkinga yokuvunwa kwezihlahla ngokwedlulele kanjalo nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, ngekhemisi labelaphi bendabuko elivulwe yinhlangano yokongiwa kwemvelo esiqiwini iHluhluwe iMfolozi Park (HiP) ngoMgqibelo. Lokhu kushiwe uMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMnotho, ezokuVakasha nezeMvelo KwaZulu-Natal, uMfundisi Musa Zondi, obeyingxenye yalo mcimbi. Kuthiwa bonke abelaphi bendabuko abasemthethweni, sebezothenga izihlahla kanjalo nokunye okufana namathambo, amafutha, izikhumba zezilwane ezithile nokunye kuleli khemisi elethiwe ngokuthi iseMpilweni Warehouse. UZondi uthe ukukhula kokuvunwa kwezihlahla nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, okuholele ekutheni basibone isidingo sokuvula indawo efuze le, ezodayisa lezi zinto ngokusemthethweni. “Ukuvunwa kwazo okungekho emthethweni nokudayiswa kwazo emakethe engavumelekile, kuyingozi kwimvelo kanjalo nakulezo zitshalo nezilwane ezisengcupheni yokushabalala,” kusho uZondi. Uthe ukwakhiwa kwaleli khemisi akwenziwanga njengoba kulula kodwa kwenziwe ngoba kubonakala isidingo. “Besibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokudayiswa nokuthengwa obekungalawuleki, ukuvuna okwedlulele ezindaweni ezivikelekile yize kunezimvume,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi lokhu bekugcina kuholela ekutheni kulahleke imali emakethe engakahleleki. Uthe konke okuzodayiswa kule ndawo kuzobe kuqinisekisiwe, kulandeleka futhi kuyamene nemithetho ehambisana nokongiwa kwemvelo. Uveze ukuthi kubalulekile ukuthi kuqhakambiswe ukuthi le ndawo yenzelwe ukweseka ababelaphi bendabuko. Ubalule nokuthi lokhu kuzobuyisa kabusha isithunzi kwezokwelapha, ubuqotho kanjalo nokusimamisa kezokwelapha ngendabuko. UZondi uthe imali ezophuma ekudayisweni kwalezi zinto, izophinde itshalwe ukuphindaphinda okufanayo. Uthe ikhemisi lenzeke layimpumelelo ngokubambisana kwezeMvelo KZN Wildlife, SAPPI, Provincial People and Parks, kanjalo neNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, wathi kulindeleke ukuthi le ndawo iqale ukusebenza ngokugcwele emva kwezinsuku eziyisikhombisa. Uveze nokuthi bahlela ukuthi eminyakeni emihlanu ezayo, kube sekukhona amakhemisi afana naleli nakwezinye izingxenye zesifundazwe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Babhekene nenkinga omasitende abangakatitholi inkokhelo kwabeNsfas BABHEKENE nengwadla omastende abakhala ngokuqonga kwezindleko zamanzi, ugesi kanjalo nezinye izinto kulabo abaqashise izitshudeni ezikhokhelwa yisikhwama esixhasa ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nasemakolishi amakhono amaTVET KwaZulu-Natal, iNational Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS). Labo mastende bakhala ngokuthi selokhu kuqale unyaka, abakaze bakhokhelwe yiNSFAS. Bathe iNSFAS izisabisa okwenyoka izitshudeni, bona ayibashayi ndiva ngoba ziyabhikisha uma imihlomulo yazo ingangenanga. Omunye womastende okhulume neSolezwe, wacela ukungavezwa, uthe sebecabanga ngisho ukukhipha izitshudeni, ngenxa yokuthi abakhokhelwe. "Asazi manje ukuthi kumele senzenjani, ngoba sihambise yonke into ezikhungweni nakwiNSFAS, kodwa kuze kube yimanje asikakhokhelwa. Konke okuthinta imininingwane yezitshudeni, nokusayinwa kwezinkontileka kwahanjiswa kodwa lutho imali." Umastende uveze ukuthi uma sekumele bakhokhelwe, uhlelo olusha olusetshenziswayo luyabakhahlela. "Senza ubuntu ngoba iNSFAS isikhokhela izinyanga ezingu-10 kuphela ngonyaka, kodwa thina siyazamukela izitshudeni kusuka ngoJanuwari ngoba zisuke zingenayo indawo yokufihla ikhanda. Sikwenza lokhu ngoba sisuke singafuni ukuthi zihlupheke, noma zilale endle kodwa thina asicatshangelwa futhi asibongwa ngokwenza lokhu." Uthe bafuna ukukhokhelwa okungokwabo kusuka ngoFebhuwari kuze kube yimanje. "Kuyophela u-Ephreli manje kodwa lutho imali. Siqashe onogada ezindaweni zethu okuhlala kuzo izitshudeni. Sikhokhela ugesi, amanzi nabanye abasebenzi abahlanza lezi zindawo. Sikhokhela ngisho i-WiFi ukuze izitshudeni zikwazi ukufunda. Sesicabanga nokungazikhokheli zonke lezi zidingo ukuze sifake ingcindezi yokuthi sikhokhelwe." Omunye umastende naye ocele ukungavezwa, uthe bekuzoshuba ukuba bekuyizitshudeni ezingayitholi imihlomulo. "Ngabe kume nse yonke into manje ukuba bekuyizitshudeni ezingayitholi imihlomulo yazo. Akekho umuntu okungaphela izinyanga ezingaka engakhokhelwe bese engawi bhu. Bayasiwisa bhu phansi ngoba sizogcina sesivala ngenxa yokungakhokhelwa," kusho lo mastende othe, sebejahwa omashonisa futhi abasakwazi nokuthola imali emabhange. Uthe phambilini iXquel, iyona eyayikhokhelwa yiNSFAS, ukuze ikhokhele omastende abazimele eKZN kodwa yaphucwa la mandla. "Manje sekudingeka umastende axhumane ngqo neNSFAS. Asikwazi ukuxhumana neNSFAS ngoba akukho mnyango obhekele imali esingakwazi ukuxhumana nawo uma singakhokhelwe. Sidukuza ebumnyameni ekubeni yonke into efunwa yiNSFAS sayenza singomastende." Empendulweni ebhekiswe kwiSolezwe ekhishwe ngaphansi kwebamba lesikhulu esiphezulu seNSFAS uMnuz Waseem Carrim, ithe abalesi sikhwama yibona asebengamele uhlelo lokukhokhelwa komastende. Ithe ukuze kungabambezeleki ukukhokhelwa komastende, imininingwane yabo yasemabhange kumele iqinisekiswe (verified) ukuze uhlelo lokukhokhelwa lungabakhahleli. "Inombolo kamazisi noma yokubhaliswa kwebhizinisi, kumele ihambisane ne-akhawunti yasebhange. Isibongo noma igama lenkampani kumele kuhambisane nomnikazi we-akhawunti," kusho iNSFAS. INSFAS ithe isixoxile nezinhlangano ezimele omastende, ngezinselelo ezithinta ukukhahlelwa komastende uma sekumele bakhokhelwe nebhange iFNB, ukuze kucetshiswe omastende ngokumele bakwenze.
